Rows.Name: BW5_001_BRIEFING
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_001_BRIEFING-Text-0", "So ...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_001_BRIEFING-Text-1", "The Lagos Unit\'s looking for data on the deserts.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_001_BRIEFING-Text-2", "Between satellites falling outta the sky, exotics screwing with imaging, and their exploration team just ... not coming back, the desert\'s a blank on the map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_001_BRIEFING-Text-3", "They want you to find a way into the region, then take some terrain scans, so they can start tagging drop zones.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_001_BRIEFING-Text-4", "There\'s a lot of questions here, and they\'re payin\' top dollar for answers.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_001_BRIEFING-Text-5", "Choice is yours.")

Rows.Name: BW5_002_EXITDROPSHIP
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_002_EXITDROPSHIP-Text-0", "If you\'re heading to the desert, you need a way through the mountains.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_002_EXITDROPSHIP-Text-1", "Exploration teams reported a cave system. Could be a path down there. But that was the last anyone heard from them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_002_EXITDROPSHIP-Text-2", "It ain\'t your first rodeo, but this is Icarus - so don\'t let your guard down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_002_EXITDROPSHIP-Text-3", "You\'ll need a radar. And the region\'s marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_002_EXITDROPSHIP-Text-4", "Between the dust storms, wild animals, and whatever else is lurkin\' up there, you\'ll have your work cut out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_002_EXITDROPSHIP-Text-5", "Safe journey, friend.")

Rows.Name: BW5_003_APPROACHCAVE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_003_APPROACHCAVE-Text-0", "Looks like you found the cave system.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_003_APPROACHCAVE-Text-1", "Hopefully, there\'s a way through, but tidal forces from Minos mean subterranean networks are anything BUT stable.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_003_APPROACHCAVE-Text-2", "Ain\'t got much choice, though, do ya?")

Rows.Name: BW5_004_CAVEBLOCKER
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_004_CAVEBLOCKER-Text-0", "Damn. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_004_CAVEBLOCKER-Text-1", "Cave roof\'s collapsed - looks recent.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_004_CAVEBLOCKER-Text-2", "But it\'s the only way through.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_004_CAVEBLOCKER-Text-3", "So you\'re gonna need to drill it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_004_CAVEBLOCKER-Text-4", "Better get your equipment sorted.")

Rows.Name: BW5_005_DESTROYBLOCKER
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_005_DESTROYBLOCKER-Text-0", "Okay, you cleared it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_005_DESTROYBLOCKER-Text-1", "Nice work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_005_DESTROYBLOCKER-Text-2", "Time to get the hell outta the underground.")

Rows.Name: BW5_006_EXITCAVE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_006_EXITCAVE-Text-0", "There it is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_006_EXITCAVE-Text-1", "The aftermath of our attempt to cool this planet down to something liveable.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_006_EXITCAVE-Text-2", "Guess the joke\'s on us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_006_EXITCAVE-Text-3", "Get yourself to the scanning zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_006_EXITCAVE-Text-4", "And keep your eyes open.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_006_EXITCAVE-Text-5", "You\'re off the edge of the map out here.")

Rows.Name: BW5_007_ENTERRADARZONE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_007_ENTERRADARZONE-Text-0", "Alright.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_007_ENTERRADARZONE-Text-1", "You made it to the scanning zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_007_ENTERRADARZONE-Text-2", "The radar does the work, all you gotta do is keep it safe.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_007_ENTERRADARZONE-Text-3", "Shouldn\'t be too hard.")

Rows.Name: BW5_008_RADARACTIVE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_008_RADARACTIVE-Text-0", "Okay.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_008_RADARACTIVE-Text-1", "These things can be ... temperamental.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_008_RADARACTIVE-Text-2", "So don\'t wander off.")

Rows.Name: BW5_009_RADARSTOPPED
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_009_RADARSTOPPED-Text-0", "We lost the signal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_009_RADARSTOPPED-Text-1", "Reactivate the radar ... when you get a moment!")

Rows.Name: BW5_010_BOSSSPAWN
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_010_BOSSSPAWN-Text-0", "What in SEVEN FLAVORS OF FUCK is THAT?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_010_BOSSSPAWN-Text-1", "And how do you KILL it?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_010_BOSSSPAWN-Text-2", "Aim for the head! or whatever that is!")

Rows.Name: BW5_011_BOSSSPAWNPG
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_011_BOSSSPAWNPG-Text-0", "What in SEVEN FLAVORS OF HELL is THAT?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_011_BOSSSPAWNPG-Text-1", "And how do you KILL it?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_011_BOSSSPAWNPG-Text-2", "Aim for the head! or whatever that is!")

Rows.Name: BW5_012_RADARDONEWORMALIVE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_012_RADARDONEWORMALIVE-Text-0", "Scans done!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_012_RADARDONEWORMALIVE-Text-1", "But that thing\'s still breathin\'!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_012_RADARDONEWORMALIVE-Text-2", "Might wanna fix that!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_012_RADARDONEWORMALIVE-Text-3", "Or not!")

Rows.Name: BW5_013_RADARDONEWORMDEAD
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_013_RADARDONEWORMDEAD-Text-0", "Scan looks clean and green.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_013_RADARDONEWORMDEAD-Text-1", "Good work.")

Rows.Name: BW5_014_DROPPINGSCALES
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_014_DROPPINGSCALES-Text-0", "It\'s dropping scales!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_014_DROPPINGSCALES-Text-1", "Group 15\'s gonna want those!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_014_DROPPINGSCALES-Text-2", "Try and get some!")

Rows.Name: BW5_015_GOTSAMPLES
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_015_GOTSAMPLES-Text-0", "You got scales!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_015_GOTSAMPLES-Text-1", "Group 15\'s gonna love you.")

Rows.Name: BW5_BOSSDEATH
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BOSSDEATH-Text-0", "Pickup")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BOSSDEATH-Text-1", "It\'s dead.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BOSSDEATH-Text-2", "How the hell does something like that evolve?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BOSSDEATH-Text-3", "Tough damn critter.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BOSSDEATH-Text-4", "Atmosphere didn\'t even seem to bother it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BOSSDEATH-Text-5", "(laughs)")

Rows.Name: BW5_RETURNTODROPSHIP
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_RETURNTODROPSHIP-Text-0", "I guess we\'re done here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_RETURNTODROPSHIP-Text-1", "Time to head back to the dropship.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_RETURNTODROPSHIP-Text-2", "Unless you got other plans.")

Rows.Name: BW5_BACKATDROPSHIP
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BACKATDROPSHIP-Text-0", "Well, that was one wild trip.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BACKATDROPSHIP-Text-1", "But you made it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BACKATDROPSHIP-Text-2", "And Icarus, well, it just got weirder.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BACKATDROPSHIP-Text-3", "Which is sayin\' something.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW5_BACKATDROPSHIP-Text-4", "See you in orbit, friend.")

Rows.Name: BW4_001_BRIEFING
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_001_BRIEFING-Text-0", "Welcome back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_001_BRIEFING-Text-1", "When the terraforming went south, UDA mothballed their bio-satellites and walked away.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_001_BRIEFING-Text-2", "And now they\'re falling outta the sky. Three in the last month.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_001_BRIEFING-Text-3", "Their payload\'s some kinda enzyme, biotech designed to reshape worlds.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_001_BRIEFING-Text-4", "So there\'s a few interested parties, but UDA figures they\'ve done enough damage.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_001_BRIEFING-Text-5", "They want \'em back before anyone else gets them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_001_BRIEFING-Text-6", "There\'s fragments right up into the arctic, so you\'ll be facin\' the worst of the wilds.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_001_BRIEFING-Text-7", "Think you\'re ready?")

Rows.Name: BW4_002_EXITEDROPHIP
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_002_EXITEDROPHIP-Text-0", "It may not be your first time down, but this one\'s gonna take some planning.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_002_EXITEDROPHIP-Text-1", "We don\'t have much terrain data. The crash sites are marked on your map though. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_002_EXITEDROPHIP-Text-2", "UDA needs you to get \'em before anyone else gets too ambitious.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_002_EXITEDROPHIP-Text-3", "You\'re heading into serious territory, so gear up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_002_EXITEDROPHIP-Text-4", "Safe journeys, friend.")

Rows.Name: BW4_003_ENTERZONE1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_003_ENTERZONE1-Text-0", "You\'re getting close. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_003_ENTERZONE1-Text-1", "You\'ll need to reactivate the satellite before you can extract the payload.")

Rows.Name: BW4_004_ACTIVATESATTELITE1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_004_ACTIVATESATTELITE1-Text-0", "Okay, it\'s arming.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_004_ACTIVATESATTELITE1-Text-1", "Oh, I forgot to mention that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_004_ACTIVATESATTELITE1-Text-2", "You gotta arm it to get the warhead out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_004_ACTIVATESATTELITE1-Text-3", "But don\'t worry. It\'s only a planet-killing bioweapon. Shouldn\'t take long.")

Rows.Name: BW4_005_COUNTERRESET
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_005_COUNTERRESET-Text-0", "Something\'s wrong.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_005_COUNTERRESET-Text-1", "Could be Inaris added a proximity failsafe.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_005_COUNTERRESET-Text-2", "Or maybe the arming circuits took a few hits coming down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_005_COUNTERRESET-Text-3", "Either way,you\'ll need to reactivate it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_005_COUNTERRESET-Text-4", "I\'d stay close if I were you.")

Rows.Name: BW4_006_BOSSSPAWN1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_006_BOSSSPAWN1-Text-0", "Activating the satellite must\'ve alerted the wildlife.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_006_BOSSSPAWN1-Text-1", "Interesting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_006_BOSSSPAWN1-Text-2", "You got company.")

Rows.Name: BW4_007_TIMERCOMPLETE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_007_TIMERCOMPLETE-Text-0", "You should be able to access the warhead now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_007_TIMERCOMPLETE-Text-1", "Just ... be careful.")

Rows.Name: BW4_008_ITEMRETRIEVED1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_008_ITEMRETRIEVED1-Text-0", "That\'s the one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_008_ITEMRETRIEVED1-Text-1", "Little advice: This is where Icarus\'s problems all began.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_008_ITEMRETRIEVED1-Text-2", "Don\'t drop it. Don\'t shake it. And whatever you do, DON\'T open it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_008_ITEMRETRIEVED1-Text-3", "What\'s in there, you want it to STAY in there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_008_ITEMRETRIEVED1-Text-4", "Time to go find the next one.")

Rows.Name: BW4_009_BOSSDEATH
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_009_BOSSDEATH-Text-0", "Nice work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_009_BOSSDEATH-Text-1", "That\'s one less psychotic, genetically-engineered beast jacked up on exotics for you to worry about.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_009_BOSSDEATH-Text-2", "Only fifty thousand to go.")

Rows.Name: BW4_010_ENTERZONE2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_010_ENTERZONE2-Text-0", "Okay, you found it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_010_ENTERZONE2-Text-1", "Number two.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_010_ENTERZONE2-Text-2", "Time to fire it up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_010_ENTERZONE2-Text-3", "And hope it doesn\'t smother you in flesh eating enzymes.")

Rows.Name: BW4_011_ACTIVATESATTELITE2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_011_ACTIVATESATTELITE2-Text-0", "Okay, it\'s arming.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_011_ACTIVATESATTELITE2-Text-1", "Maybe, stand back. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_011_ACTIVATESATTELITE2-Text-2", "Just in case.")

Rows.Name: BW4_012_BOSSSPAWN2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_012_BOSSSPAWN2-Text-0", "Whatever that satellite\'s doing, the wildlife really don\'t like it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_012_BOSSSPAWN2-Text-1", "Group 15\'ll be interested to hear about this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_012_BOSSSPAWN2-Text-2", "Somethin\' wild\'s coming your way.")

Rows.Name: BW4_013_COUNTERRESET2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_013_COUNTERRESET2-Text-0", "The satellite\'s failsafe kicked in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_013_COUNTERRESET2-Text-1", "Looks like it\'s proximity sensitive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_013_COUNTERRESET2-Text-2", "You\'ll need to reactivate that piece of junk.")

Rows.Name: BW4_014_TIMERCOMPLETE2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_014_TIMERCOMPLETE2-Text-0", "Alright, you\'re good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_014_TIMERCOMPLETE2-Text-1", "Warhead\'s ready when you are.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_014_TIMERCOMPLETE2-Text-2", "Don\'t hear that every day.")

Rows.Name: BW4_015_ITEMRETRIEVED2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_015_ITEMRETRIEVED2-Text-0", "Okay, number two. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_015_ITEMRETRIEVED2-Text-1", "These things were designed to be deployed in orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_015_ITEMRETRIEVED2-Text-2", "You crack that at ground level, and it\'d eat everything from here to the horizon.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_015_ITEMRETRIEVED2-Text-3", "So ............... don\'t.")

Rows.Name: BW4_016_ONBOSSDEATH2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_016_ONBOSSDEATH2-Text-0", "Not bad.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_016_ONBOSSDEATH2-Text-1", "Data from arctic bio-samples shows raised exotics levels.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_016_ONBOSSDEATH2-Text-2", "Things\'re growing faster, and more aggressive, even if we don\'t know why yet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_016_ONBOSSDEATH2-Text-3", "Either that, or they just really don\'t like you.")

Rows.Name: BW4_017_ENTERZONE3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_017_ENTERZONE3-Text-0", "One more warhead, then we can all sleep tight ... till the next time UDA loses one of their toys.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_017_ENTERZONE3-Text-1", "Arm that thing, and watch your back.")

Rows.Name: BW4_018_ACTIVATESATTELITE3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_018_ACTIVATESATTELITE3-Text-0", "Alright, it\'s hot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_018_ACTIVATESATTELITE3-Text-1", "One enzyme warhead, coming up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_018_ACTIVATESATTELITE3-Text-2", "Stay close, in case it changes its mind.")

Rows.Name: BW4_019_BOSSSPAWN3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_019_BOSSSPAWN3-Text-0", "Surprise surprise, the locals don\'t like you firing up the satellite.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_019_BOSSSPAWN3-Text-1", "You\'re gonna need to take care of this.")

Rows.Name: BW4_020_COUNTERRESET3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_020_COUNTERRESET3-Text-0", "The satellite\'s reset.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_020_COUNTERRESET3-Text-1", "Get in there and reactivate it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_020_COUNTERRESET3-Text-2", "And stay close, so it doesn\'t shut down.")

Rows.Name: BW4_021_TIMECOMPLETE3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_021_TIMECOMPLETE3-Text-0", "Warhead\'s ready.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_021_TIMECOMPLETE3-Text-1", "Whenever you are.")

Rows.Name: BW4_022_ITEMRETRIEVED3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_022_ITEMRETRIEVED3-Text-0", "Last one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_022_ITEMRETRIEVED3-Text-1", "You got enough bio-enzymes there to reshape a decent chunk of this planet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_022_ITEMRETRIEVED3-Text-2", "I guess that\'s why the UDA don\'t want it just lying around.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_022_ITEMRETRIEVED3-Text-3", "Time to head back to the dropship.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_022_ITEMRETRIEVED3-Text-4", "If you can stay alive, you\'re about to make the UDA real happy.")

Rows.Name: BW4_023_BOSSDEATH3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_023_BOSSDEATH3-Text-0", "Thought that mighta been the one that ended you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_023_BOSSDEATH3-Text-1", "Glad you\'re still here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_023_BOSSDEATH3-Text-2", "Good kill.")

Rows.Name: BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP-Text-0", "Well, well - you did it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP-Text-1", "Congratulations")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP-Text-2", "But watch yourself")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP-Text-3", "Success brings problems all of its own.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP-Text-4", "You\'re on the UDA\'s radar now. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP-Text-5", "They\'re gonna want more from you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP-Text-6", "Be careful what you sign up for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP-Text-7", "That\'s all i can say.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW4_024_BACKTODROPSHIP-Text-8", "See you in orbit, friend.")

Rows.Name: Recon1Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Briefing-Text-0", "Welcome to Icarus, friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Briefing-Text-1", "UDA says we gotta drop you in a safe, well-mapped zone your first time down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Briefing-Text-2", "They must\'ve been thinking of some \'other\' planet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Briefing-Text-3", "You\'ll see for yourself soon enough.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Briefing-Text-4", "There\'s a ways to go before you head out hunting for exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Briefing-Text-5", "Right now, it\'s about learning to survive on the surface.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Briefing-Text-6", "So head down, take a look around.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Briefing-Text-7", "Then we\'ll talk.")

Rows.Name: Recon1Landing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Landing-Text-0", "Welcome to Icarus, friend. Looks like your first time down here. Call me Sol.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Landing-Text-1", "Looks like paradise, but don\'t be fooled: the air\'s poison, wildlife\'s out to kill ya, and the weather\'s like nothing you\'ve ever seen.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Landing-Text-2", "You\'ll need to make yourself some shelter soon enough, but you know what you\'re doin, right? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Landing-Text-3", "That\'s why you came all the way out here, and dropped with nothing - \'cause you could.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Landing-Text-4", "Well, UDA wants you to show you understand the basics, before they send you anywhere really dangerous.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Landing-Text-5", "So get acquainted, then head back up when you\'re ready.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Landing-Text-6", "Best of luck friend, stay safe.")

Rows.Name: Recon1Finish
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Finish-Text-0", "Time to head back to orbit?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Finish-Text-1", "You done well.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Finish-Text-2", "I mean, you\'re still breathin\'.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Finish-Text-3", "And Group\'s ready to task you up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1Finish-Text-4", "See ya upstairs.")

Rows.Name: Recon1FinishSubLevel10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1FinishSubLevel10-Text-0", "You can head back, but until UDA\'s satisfied you know what you\'re doin, they\'re just gonna send you back down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon1FinishSubLevel10-Text-1", "Don\'t say I didn\'t warn ya.")

Rows.Name: Recon_Low_Water
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Low_Water-Text-0", "Before you start building, you need to hydrate")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Low_Water-Text-1", "There\'s a lake down there. Go take a drink.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Low_Water-Text-2", "Even a basic envirosuit\'ll filter out anything dangerous.")

Rows.Name: Recon_Low_Food
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Low_Food-Text-0", "The terraforming went to crap, but they left a few critters behind.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Low_Food-Text-1", "Changed their genes some, but you can still eat \'em.")

Rows.Name: Recon_Low_Oxygen
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Low_Oxygen-Text-0", "Surviving\'s about more than just nails and boards ...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Low_Oxygen-Text-1", "When your oxygen gets low, you\'ll need to find oxite.")

Rows.Name: Recon_Drink_Water
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Drink_Water-Text-0", "Here in the terrazone, the water\'s pretty clean. Fish don\'t seem to mind it.")

Rows.Name: Recon_Consume_Oxygen
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Consume_Oxygen-Text-0", "Oxite. Just another minor miracle brought to you by the weirdest planet in the spiral arm.")

Rows.Name: Recon_Build
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Build-Text-0", "How you build, that\'s up to you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Build-Text-1", "So long as you learn the basics, your chances are the same as anyone else. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Build-Text-2", "And I get paid.")

Rows.Name: Recon_1min
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_1min-Text-0", "How you build, that\'s up to you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_1min-Text-1", "So long as you learn the basics, your chances are the same as anyone else. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_1min-Text-2", "And I get paid.")

Rows.Name: Recon_2min
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_2min-Text-0", "How you build, that\'s up to you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_2min-Text-1", "So long as you learn the basics, your chances are the same as anyone else. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_2min-Text-2", "And I get paid.")

Rows.Name: Recon_Points
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Points-Text-0", "Good work, freshfoot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Points-Text-1", "With new skills, come new possibilities.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Recon_Points-Text-2", "What you do with that knowledge, well, that\'s up to you.")

Rows.Name: Scanning1Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Briefing-Text-0", "Welcome back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Briefing-Text-1", "Lagos Unit runs Icarus for the UDA, but most of this planet\'s still a blank on the map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Briefing-Text-2", "The Unit wants new dropzones, which means gettin\' terrain scans, and they\'ll pay for the privilege.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Briefing-Text-3", "Just set up a radar at three locations, and come back alive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Briefing-Text-4", "You up for it?")

Rows.Name: Scanning1Landing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Landing-Text-0", "Icarus ain\'t always gonna be so empty.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Landing-Text-1", "The UDA wants exotics, and the Lagos Unit\'s under pressure to scale operations up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Landing-Text-2", "Which means they need terrain data, and a heap of it, fast.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Landing-Text-3", "So grab the radar from the supply crate.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Landing-Text-4", "The Unit wants scans from three locations on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Landing-Text-5", "You\'ll be heading into uncharted territory, but that\'s exactly why we need the data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Landing-Text-6", "Think you can handle it? Well, either way it\'s too late now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Landing-Text-7", "Good luck.")

Rows.Name: Scanning1ScanComplete1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanComplete1-Text-0", "That\'s one scan done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanComplete1-Text-1", "Data\'s uploading, looking good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanComplete1-Text-2", "Pack it up, and head out.")

Rows.Name: Scanning1AnimalAttack
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1AnimalAttack-Text-0", "Sounds like you got company.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1AnimalAttack-Text-1", "There\'s been reports that wildlife don\'t like technology.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1AnimalAttack-Text-2", "Sure looks that way.")

Rows.Name: Scanning1ScanComplete2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanComplete2-Text-0", "Scan\'s complete, and data\'s uploading.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanComplete2-Text-1", "That\'s two down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanComplete2-Text-2", "Keep it rolling.")

Rows.Name: Scanning1ScanComplete3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanComplete3-Text-0", "Scan three, done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanComplete3-Text-1", "That\'s a wrap.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanComplete3-Text-2", "Nice work, time to head home.")

Rows.Name: Scanning1WeatherEvent
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1WeatherEvent-Text-0", "Heads up - you got some heavy weather coming in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1WeatherEvent-Text-1", "Get sheltered, and quick.")

Rows.Name: Scanning1ScanPaused
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanPaused-Text-0", "Something happened to the radar.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanPaused-Text-1", "We lost the signal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1ScanPaused-Text-2", "You gotta reactivate it.")

Rows.Name: Scanning1Finish
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Finish-Text-0", "Excellent work, friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Finish-Text-1", "Lagos Group\'s got their data, and Icarus, well, we know a little more about this place than we did.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Finish-Text-2", "Still a damn mystery, but you gotta start somewhere.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning1Finish-Text-3", "See ya in orbit.")

Rows.Name: FM1ResearchBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchBriefing-Text-0", "So.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchBriefing-Text-1", "You heard of Sinotai ... or you wouldn\'t be here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchBriefing-Text-2", "One of their bot satellites detected unusual bio-patterning, and their xeno-research arm\'s got curious.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchBriefing-Text-3", "They want samples.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchBriefing-Text-4", "This one ain\'t gonna be easy, though.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchBriefing-Text-5", "Some wild territory they\'re sending you to.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchBriefing-Text-6", "It\'s up to you.")

Rows.Name: FM1ResearchLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchLanding-Text-0", "Okay.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchLanding-Text-1", "Sinotai are good friends to have, and they got more money than God.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchLanding-Text-2", "They\'ve also got some of the only decent scanning tech in orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchLanding-Text-3", "Their bots have identified unusual growth patterns emerging in part of the terrazone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchLanding-Text-4", "The first area they want investigated is marked on the map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchLanding-Text-5", "So get to the zones, and track down the samples, and bring \'em back upstairs.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchLanding-Text-6", "The rest\'s on you - good luck, friend.")

Rows.Name: FM1ResearchFindItem1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem1-Text-0", "Good find.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem1-Text-1", "I never seen one of those before.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem1-Text-2", "Maybe terraforming didn\'t wipe out everything in this area after all.")

Rows.Name: FM1ResearchFindItem2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem2-Text-0", "What the hell happened here?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem2-Text-1", "There\'s rumors that exotics can affect living organisms, but this ... ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem2-Text-2", "I don\'t even know what to call this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem2-Text-3", "But you got what you came for.")

Rows.Name: FM1ResearchFindItem3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem3-Text-0", "This should not be here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem3-Text-1", "When the terraforming went south, the temperature up here crashed through the floor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem3-Text-2", "But life finds a way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem3-Text-3", "Interesting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFindItem3-Text-4", "Good work.")

Rows.Name: FM1ResearchFinish
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFinish-Text-0", "Well, you did it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFinish-Text-1", "Sinotai are gonna be happy with you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFinish-Text-2", "And they like working with people they trust.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFinish-Text-3", "And seeing how they pretty much run space, that\'s good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM1ResearchFinish-Text-4", "See ya in orbit, friend.")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryBriefing-Text-0", "Alrrright.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryBriefing-Text-1", "The ACS were performing some kind of equipment test in the desert.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryBriefing-Text-2", "They\'re keeping quiet about exactly what happened, but something went wrong with their set-up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryBriefing-Text-3", "Now they want their toy back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryBriefing-Text-4", "Whatta you say?")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryLanding-Text-0", "So, the ACS were testing something in the desert.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryLanding-Text-1", "New Larkwell gear - a tool, a weapon, they\'re not saying.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryLanding-Text-2", "But their delivery drone hit heavy weather, ended up scattered across half the landscape")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryLanding-Text-3", "ACS wants you to scout the wreckage, retrieve their tech, and bring it back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryLanding-Text-4", "The crash zones are marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryLanding-Text-5", "Some of \'em are pretty hard to reach, but that\'s where you come in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryLanding-Text-6", "Good luck out there.")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryFindItem1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem1-Text-0", "Okay, you found part of their device, whatever it is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem1-Text-1", "There\'s two more crash sites out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem1-Text-2", "Keep it up.")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryFindItem2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem2-Text-0", "That\'s part two.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem2-Text-1", "And we finally got the Larkwell specs.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem2-Text-2", "The thing you\'re collecting is serious kit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem2-Text-3", "It\'s a prototype, using exotics to reduce local gravity.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem2-Text-4", "I didn\'t even know that was a \'thing\'.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem2-Text-5", "No wonder they want it back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem2-Text-6", "According to the specs, there should be one more piece.")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryFindItem3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem3-Text-0", "Alright, piece number three.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFindItem3-Text-1", "That should do it.")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryCraftItem1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem1-Text-0", "You there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem1-Text-1", "There\'s one more thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem1-Text-2", "The ACS never got to test the device, so now ... they want you to.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem1-Text-3", "It\'ll either work, or blow a hole in the ground the size of Beijing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem1-Text-4", "Should be fun.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem1-Text-5", "All you gotta do is put it together.")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryCraftItem2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem2-Text-0", "Is it on?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem2-Text-1", "According to the specs, it should reduce local mass.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem2-Text-2", "Um, try jumping.")
INVTEXT("...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem2-Text-4", "You feeling anything?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem2-Text-5", "Ah well ... back to the drawing board, I guess.")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryCraftItem3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem3-Text-0", "Okay, that\'s wild.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem3-Text-1", "Just don\'t break the machine, okay?")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryCraftItem4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem4-Text-0", "Oh, you broke it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryCraftItem4-Text-1", "Don\'t tell anyone - we\'ll just say you found it like that.")

Rows.Name: FM2RecoveryFinish
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFinish-Text-0", "You got everything the ACS wanted.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFinish-Text-1", "Well done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFinish-Text-2", "I expect they\'ll be calling on you again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM2RecoveryFinish-Text-3", "See you in orbit, friend.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBriefing-Text-0", "The Assembly\'s reporting wildlife issues on the surface.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBriefing-Text-1", "An animal is causing problems for their forward team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBriefing-Text-2", "They want you to track the thing down, and eliminate it before it hurts anyone else.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBriefing-Text-3", "Wish I could tell you more, but data\'s light on the ground right now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBriefing-Text-4", "Guess that\'s why they need you.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationLanding-Text-0", "The Assembly weren\'t always a big presence on Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationLanding-Text-1", "Now they\'re looking to change that, but local wildlife\'s been making problems for their survey teams.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationLanding-Text-2", "The kind they didn\'t walk away from.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationLanding-Text-3", "The latest encounter\'s marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationLanding-Text-4", "You\'ll need to investigate it, see if you can track down whatever\'s been hunting their crews.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationLanding-Text-5", "Group 15\'s got a theory that exotics\'ve been making animals more aggressive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationLanding-Text-6", "I don\'t know about that, but either way, I\'d say it\'s time to tool up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationLanding-Text-7", "And I don\'t mean carpentry.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationMarker1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker1-Text-0", "Something big did that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker1-Text-1", "Good find, but we need more.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker1-Text-2", "We\'ve marked another attack site on your map.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationMarker2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker2-Text-0", "Looks like the work of the same animal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker2-Text-1", "Something riled it up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker2-Text-2", "If you can confirm another site, the Assembly\'s bots should be able to zero in on the general location of its den.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker2-Text-3", "We\'ve marked one more attack report on your map.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationMarker3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker3-Text-0", "There it is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker3-Text-1", "Nasty.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker3-Text-2", "But that\'s everything we need.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker3-Text-3", "Assembly\'s bots ain\'t the best, but they\'ve got a guess at where it\'s bedding down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationMarker3-Text-4", "See if you can find its den ... and end this.")

Rows.Name: FM3BossSpawn
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3BossSpawn-Text-0", "God, what is that?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3BossSpawn-Text-1", "It ain\'t happy, whatever it is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3BossSpawn-Text-2", "Over to you.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationBossDead
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBossDead-Text-0", "You almost made that look easy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBossDead-Text-1", "Almost.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBossDead-Text-2", "Good kill.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationFinish
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationFinish-Text-0", "The Assembly sends their thanks, and their cash.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationFinish-Text-1", "That\'s a few less exotic-crazed critters to worry about.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationFinish-Text-2", "But it won\'t be the last.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationFinish-Text-3", "See you in orbit, friend.")

Rows.Name: FM4SurveyBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyBriefing-Text-0", "Welcome back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyBriefing-Text-1", "Uniao\'s looking for detailed geo-data from the surface.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyBriefing-Text-2", "One area in particular\'s really got their attention, exotics most likely.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyBriefing-Text-3", "They want someone to drop down, set up a survey system, and beam the data back up here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyBriefing-Text-4", "You good for this?")

Rows.Name: FM4SurveyLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyLanding-Text-0", "We\'ve been on Icarus a few years now, but the place is still a black box.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyLanding-Text-1", "Uniao\'s planning to change that - they want geological data, and lots of it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyLanding-Text-2", "They need you to go set up three survey stations, something about tectonic movement, I don\'t know.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyLanding-Text-3", "I\'m no geologist, but it always comes down to exotics in the end.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyLanding-Text-4", "With that much data, you\'ll need a central uplink to beam it up here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyLanding-Text-5", "Locations are marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyLanding-Text-6", "You\'ll find supply crates dropped nearby each site with the tech you need.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyLanding-Text-7", "But be careful - wildlife seems to resent this kinda thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyLanding-Text-8", "Good luck, friend.")

Rows.Name: FM4SurveyScanComplete1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete1-Text-0", "Okay.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete1-Text-1", "We\'re reading station one activated.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete1-Text-2", "Keep it up.")

Rows.Name: FM4SurveyScanComplete2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete2-Text-0", "Station two is up and active.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete2-Text-1", "Station one\'s connected.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete2-Text-2", "You\'re five by five.")

Rows.Name: FM4SurveyScanComplete3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete3-Text-0", "Station 3 connected.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete3-Text-1", "System\'s holding.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete3-Text-2", "Nearly there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete3-Text-3", "Just need the uplink, and Uniao\'s gonna have all the data they need.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete3-Text-4", "Set it up by the lake.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete3-Text-5", "Something about it\'s got them real interested.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanComplete3-Text-6", "But nobody tells me anythin\'.")

Rows.Name: FM4SurveyScanPaused
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanPaused-Text-0", "Damn.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanPaused-Text-1", "Something\'s wrong with one of the units.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanPaused-Text-2", "We lost contact.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyScanPaused-Text-3", "You\'ll need to reactivate it.")

Rows.Name: FM4SurveyUplinkActivated
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyUplinkActivated-Text-0", "Uplink activated!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyUplinkActivated-Text-1", "Data\'s coming through clean and green.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyUplinkActivated-Text-2", "Shouldn\'t take long, friend.")

Rows.Name: FM4SurveyAnimalSpawn
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyAnimalSpawn-Text-0", "We\'re seeing bio-signatures.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyAnimalSpawn-Text-1", "Uplink must\'ve alerted the wildlife.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyAnimalSpawn-Text-2", "Keep \'em clear till the upload\'s done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyAnimalSpawn-Text-3", "Do what you gotta do!")

Rows.Name: FM4SurveyUplinkComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyUplinkComplete-Text-0", "That\'s it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyUplinkComplete-Text-1", "Scan\'s DONE.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4SurveyUplinkComplete-Text-2", "We got a whole lotta data outta that, and Uniao\'s gonna pay solid.")

Rows.Name: FM4Finish
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4Finish-Text-0", "Good work out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4Finish-Text-1", "Most of Icarus is a still a blank on the map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4Finish-Text-2", "But we\'re learnin\' more everyday, thanks to people like you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM4Finish-Text-3", "See you in orbit, friend.")

Rows.Name: BW3Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-0", "Alright. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-1", "Group 15\'s got a theory that exotics are affecting the Earthlife on Icarus.  ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-2", "Making some of \'em larger, more aggressive. Who knows what else.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-3", "The bigger the animal, the stronger the effect. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-4", "And they want a biological sample.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-5", "So they need you to head to the Arctic, bring down a mammoth.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-6", "Yeah, you heard me. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-7", "Get \'em something to study.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-8", "But the Arctic\'s tough. And the mammoth\'s\'re even tougher. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-9", "You\'ll need more than sharp sticks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Briefing-Text-10", "Think you can handle that?")

Rows.Name: BW3Objective01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective01-Text-0", "Okay, Group 15 wants that mammoth. But it\'s a long way to the mountains. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective01-Text-1", "Make sure you\'re well equipped. Gets cold up there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective01-Text-2", "And ain\'t nothing friendly on the ice, polar bears, mammoths.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective01-Text-3", "Better you than me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective01-Text-4", "You\'ll need iron knives at least, for skinning something that size.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective01-Text-5", "Never underestimate Icarus. Not if you wanna live.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective01-Text-6", "Good luck, friend.")

Rows.Name: BW3Objective02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective02-Text-0", "Well, you made it to the Arctic. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective02-Text-1", "Biologists brought a titan back to life up here. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective02-Text-2", "Now they need you to kill it, so they can find out what the hell exotics are doing to them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective02-Text-3", "Scientists. Gotta love \'em.")

Rows.Name: BW3MammothKilled
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3MammothKilled-Text-0", "Okay, you did it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3MammothKilled-Text-1", "Make sure to skin it quick, because you ain\'t gonna get another chance at this.")

Rows.Name: BW3Objective03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective03-Text-0", "You did it. I\'m impressed. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective03-Text-1", "Now get that thing back to the dropship.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Objective03-Text-2", "And don\'t stop for sight-seeing.")

Rows.Name: BW3Complete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Complete-Text-0", "It\'s done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Complete-Text-1", "Good work, friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Complete-Text-2", "Exotics are a mystery, but soon we\'re gonna know a little more about how this planet really works.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BW3Complete-Text-3", "See you in orbit.")

Rows.Name: Scanning2aBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2aBriefing-Text-0", "They\'re keen to open up new regions for prospecting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2aBriefing-Text-1", "So they\'re looking for terrain scans, before they start dropping folk out of the sky.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2aBriefing-Text-2", "Sound like you?")

Rows.Name: Scanning2bBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2bBriefing-Text-0", "They been noticing your work, and wanna take advantage of new territory.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2bBriefing-Text-1", "If they can get terrain data, they can plan new drop zones, open the place wide up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2bBriefing-Text-2", "You got this?")

Rows.Name: Scanning3Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning3Briefing-Text-0", "They want terrain scans from some of the new territory coming online, so they can chart new drop zones.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning3Briefing-Text-1", "It\'s a whole new world out there, but not till you get the data they need.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning3Briefing-Text-2", "If you\'re ready for it.")

Rows.Name: Scanning4aBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4aBriefing-Text-0", "They\'re pleased with your progress, but the work\'s never done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4aBriefing-Text-1", "They want data on drop zones, so they\'re looking for someone to take terrain scans in the area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4aBriefing-Text-2", "I reckon they come to the right crew.")

Rows.Name: Scanning4bBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4bBriefing-Text-0", "You\'ve helped open Icarus up, but there\'s still some major blanks on the map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4bBriefing-Text-1", "They want terrain data, if you can get scans of the area. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4bBriefing-Text-2", "It ain\'t Disneyland down there, but I figure you know what you\'re doin\' by now.")

Rows.Name: Scanning2aLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2aLanding-Text-0", "But they can\'t do it alone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2aLanding-Text-1", "They need detailed terrain data from this region, if they\'re gonna open it up to prospecting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2aLanding-Text-2", "They wanna fill the place with dropships, if you know what I mean.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2aLanding-Text-3", "So grab a radar, check your map for locations, and head out.")

Rows.Name: Scanning2bLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2bLanding-Text-0", "But they need help, even out here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2bLanding-Text-1", "They want scans of the region, terrain data so they can open up new drop zones and get prospectors into the area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2bLanding-Text-2", "Sites are on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning2bLanding-Text-3", "So grab a radar and get goin\'.")

Rows.Name: Scanning3Landing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning3Landing-Text-0", "Still, even they need assistance sometimes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning3Landing-Text-1", "Before they can open up this place up to prospectors, they need drop zones, and before that, they need terrain data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning3Landing-Text-2", "They want radar scans of certain areas - first one\'s marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning3Landing-Text-3", "Grab a radar and let\'s get goin\'.")

Rows.Name: Scanning4aLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4aLanding-Text-0", "It\'s all about exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4aLanding-Text-1", "Which means prospectors, who need drop zones, which requires terrain data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4aLanding-Text-2", "Which is where you come in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4aLanding-Text-3", "First site\'s marked on your map, so grab a radar and let\'s do this.")

Rows.Name: Scanning4bLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4bLanding-Text-0", "And you know how this goes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4bLanding-Text-1", "They want scans of the area, so they can start bringing in prospector crews.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4bLanding-Text-2", "First site\'s marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4bLanding-Text-3", "Grab a radar and let\'s go.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Scanning4bLanding-Text-4", "Just remember, it\'s wild out there, it\'s wild country. ")

Rows.Name: ScanComplete1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanComplete1-Text-0", "That\'s it, scan\'s good, data\'s clean.")

Rows.Name: ScanComplete2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanComplete2-Text-0", "Scan complete, data received, looking good.")

Rows.Name: ScanComplete3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanComplete3-Text-0", "Okay, that\'s it - scan\'s finished, we\'re clear.")

Rows.Name: ScanComplete4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanComplete4-Text-0", "Alright, scan\'s done, data\'s cooked.")

Rows.Name: ScanComplete5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanComplete5-Text-0", "There we go, scan\'s good, data\'s up.")

Rows.Name: ScanComplete6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanComplete6-Text-0", "The scan\'s finished, and the data\'s come through.")

Rows.Name: ScanComplete7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanComplete7-Text-0", "Scan\'s all done, friend, and the data\'s uploaded.")

Rows.Name: ScanWeatherComplete1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanWeatherComplete1-Text-0", "Okay, storm\'s passing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanWeatherComplete1-Text-1", "We got a LOT of data outta that.")

Rows.Name: ScanWeatherComplete2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanWeatherComplete2-Text-0", "Well, that\'s the worst of it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanWeatherComplete2-Text-1", "Getting a lotta good data out that already.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ScanWeatherComplete2-Text-2", "Nice work.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationBriefing1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing1-Text-0", "According to the UDA, you qualify for open access to this region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing1-Text-1", "How \'bout that.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationBriefing2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing2a-Text-0", "UDA says you meet criteria for unrestricted access to this area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing2a-Text-1", "Congratulations, and be careful.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationBriefing2b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing2b-Text-0", "UDA regulations say you\'ve now got full access to this entire zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing2b-Text-1", "Guess the work\'s paying off.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationBriefing3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing3-Text-0", "UDA just granted you full access to this area. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing3-Text-1", "It\'s yours to do what you like in.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationBriefing4a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing4a-Text-0", "UDA just approved you for full access to this area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing4a-Text-1", "Door\'s wide open, so do what you wanna do down there.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationBriefing4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing4b-Text-0", "According to the UDA, you just qualified for full access to this area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing4b-Text-1", "So it\'s yours for the taking.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationBriefing5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing5-Text-0", "Okay...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing5-Text-1", "According to the UDA, you just graduated.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing5-Text-2", "This whole terrazone\'s open to you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing5-Text-3", "Congratulations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing5-Text-4", "Not a lot of folk have survived this far.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationBriefing5-Text-5", "Where\'d you wanna go?")

Rows.Name: ExplorationLanding1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding1-Text-0", "Welcome back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding1-Text-1", "You helped open this region up for the UDA.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding1-Text-2", "It\'s yours to do whatever you want.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding1-Text-3", "Enjoy it while it lasts.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationLanding2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding2-Text-0", "UDA says this entire area is open to you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding2-Text-1", "Whatever you wanna do, it\'s fine with them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding2-Text-2", "I\'d say that\'s progress.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationLanding3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding3-Text-0", "You\'re helping to open this place up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding3-Text-1", "It won\'t be this empty forever, but until then, UDA\'s given you access to this whole zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding3-Text-2", "Nice work, and stay safe.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationLanding4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding4-Text-0", "The UDA seems to trust you. They\'ve given you open access to this whole area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding4-Text-1", "I\'d say use it while it lasts.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding4-Text-2", "And keep your eyes open.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationLanding5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding5-Text-0", "The UDA ain\'t exactly known for a relaxed attitude to regulations, but they can\'t keep you outta here forever.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding5-Text-1", "You\'ve got full access to this area, until they change their mind.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding5-Text-2", "So, make it count.")

Rows.Name: ExplorationLanding6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding6-Text-0", "UDA reckons you\'re safe to work this whole region unguided.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding6-Text-1", "I\'d say they\'re probably right.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding6-Text-2", "But don\'t let it go to your head - it\'s still Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExplorationLanding6-Text-3", "Stay safe.")

Rows.Name: SurveyBriefing2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing2a-Text-0", "They need geo-data from this region, and fast.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing2a-Text-1", "They\'re not saying why, but something under the surface has got them excited.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing2a-Text-2", "You interested?")

Rows.Name: SurveyBriefing3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing3-Text-0", "Geomagnetic readings in the region have got them freaking out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing3-Text-1", "They want more data ... a lot more, before they make some big decisions.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing3-Text-2", "If you\'re ready, they\'re payin\'.")

Rows.Name: SurveyBriefing4a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing4a-Text-0", "Geomorphic activity in this area\'s got \'em scratching their heads.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing4a-Text-1", "They want someone to take readings, before they risk any more resources.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing4a-Text-2", "It all comes down to cash in the end, but they\'re offering plenty of it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing4a-Text-3", "Whatta you say?")

Rows.Name: SurveyBriefingStorm
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefingStorm-Text-0", "The storms down here have put a major spanner in their works.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefingStorm-Text-1", "They want better prediction data, but first they need someone to get it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefingStorm-Text-2", "You ready for some storm chasin\'?")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aBriefing-Text-0", "So.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aBriefing-Text-1", "Seems the UDA\'s noticed you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aBriefing-Text-2", "Told Lagos Unit to offer you this one direct.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aBriefing-Text-3", "They want Arctic territory opened up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aBriefing-Text-4", "Whole new zone - untouched, uncharted, and seriously unsafe.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aBriefing-Text-5", "Some wild weather patterns happening in there, which has got Group 15 interested, too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aBriefing-Text-6", "Upside is, it pays real good, but it ain\'t a walk in the park.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aBriefing-Text-7", "Whatta ya think?")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aLanding-Text-0", "Welcome down, friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aLanding-Text-1", "Lagos Unit want access to new territory, but it ain\'t gonna be simple.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aLanding-Text-2", "There\'s heavy weather, freezing temperatures, and god knows what else over there on the ice.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aLanding-Text-3", "And there\'s more.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aLanding-Text-4", "Group 15\'s got meteorological tech they want tested up there, but the last storm scattered the drop drones to hell.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aLanding-Text-5", "You need to find \'em, fix \'em, set it up somewhere safe, and run a test fire - during a storm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aLanding-Text-6", "Good news is, looks like terraforming threw the region into some kinda storm loop.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aLanding-Text-7", "I told ya this one was wild.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aLanding-Text-8", "Check your map for markers, then do what ya gotta do.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aEnterArctic
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aEnterArctic-Text-0", "When terraforming went south, the temperature up here didn\'t just drop, it went into freefall.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aEnterArctic-Text-1", "It\'s a completely different world now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aEnterArctic-Text-2", "Weather never recovered - its just one big, rollin\' storm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aEnterArctic-Text-3", "Lagos and Group 15 think their new tech can do something about that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aEnterArctic-Text-4", "But expect the unexpected, \'cause no-one\'s sure what the hell\'s happening in the Arctic yet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aEnterArctic-Text-5", "And that\'s why you\'re here.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aDeviceExplanation
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceExplanation-Text-0", "The thing you\'re looking for, apparently it\'s some kind of sonic device.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceExplanation-Text-1", "Releases a burst of infrasonic sound, supposed to disrupt the storm cell, break it up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceExplanation-Text-2", "Settle the weather patterns up here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceExplanation-Text-3", "I\'ll believe it when I see it.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aDeviceAssembled
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceAssembled-Text-0", "Okay it\'s ready, but something like that needs shelter to function, or the storm\'s gonna tear it apart.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceAssembled-Text-1", "Geniuses at the Group reckon walls won\'t stop it working.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceAssembled-Text-2", "So you better build some.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aDeviceDeployed
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceDeployed-Text-0", "All you gotta do now is turn it on when the storm\'s hot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceDeployed-Text-1", "Let it charge up, and wait.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aActivateItem
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aActivateItem-Text-0", "We\'re getting readings.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aActivateItem-Text-1", "What is that thing doing?")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aStormGone
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aStormGone-Text-0", "I can\'t believe it, that thing actually worked.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aStormGone-Text-1", "Gotta hand it to Group 15, they think BIG.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aStormGone-Text-2", "Shame about your house.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aStormGone-Text-3", "Looks like it triggered an avalanche or two, as well.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aStormGone-Text-4", "I guess it\'s still got a few bugs to work out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aStormGone-Text-5", "Still, you did it - Lagos Unit\'s already thinking about sending scan teams up here.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bBriefing-Text-0", "This is major.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bBriefing-Text-1", "UDA\'s given Lagos the go-ahead to expand operations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bBriefing-Text-2", "They\'re looking for data on the deserts.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bBriefing-Text-3", "If you can get in there, it\'ll open the place up for scanning, prospecting, and a whole lot else")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bBriefing-Text-4", "There\'s a lot of questions here, and they\'re payin\' top dollar for answers.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bBriefing-Text-5", "Choice is yours.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bLanding-Text-0", "Between satellites falling outta the sky, exotics screwing with imaging, and their last exploration team just ... not coming back, the desert\'s a blank on the map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bLanding-Text-1", "It\'s time to change all that, but first you gotta find a way in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bLanding-Text-2", "Exploration teams reported a cave system. Could be a path down there. But that was the last anyone heard from them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bLanding-Text-3", "Lagos has dropped components for a heavy drilling rig - could be useful underground, but you\'ll need to collect \'em before you head down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bLanding-Text-4", "Drop zones and the cave area are marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bLanding-Text-5", "It ain\'t your first rodeo, but this is Icarus - so don\'t let your guard down.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bDeviceExplanation
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDeviceExplanation-Text-0", "Lagos Unit figures the cave system\'s the key to getting through to the desert")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDeviceExplanation-Text-1", "But tidal forces from Minos mean subterranean networks are anything BUT stable.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDeviceExplanation-Text-2", "They figured you\'ll need drilling equipment.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bFetchFuelUnit1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bFetchFuelUnit1-Text-0", "You\'re gonna need to make fuel for the rig, too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bFetchFuelUnit1-Text-1", "Lagos dropped a production unit near here, and marked it on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bFetchFuelUnit1-Text-2", "Just to make things easy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bFetchFuelUnit1-Text-3", "Typical UDA.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bFetchFuel
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bFetchFuel-Text-0", "You\'re gonna need fuel for the rig, too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bFetchFuel-Text-1", "Lagos dropped a pod near here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bFetchFuel-Text-2", "Should have everything you need.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bFetchFuel-Text-3", "Check your map.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bDeviceAssembled
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDeviceAssembled-Text-0", "This thing should be able to clear any debris you find in that cave.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDeviceAssembled-Text-1", "You got fuel for it?")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bDrillFuelled
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDrillFuelled-Text-0", "Okay, looks like that sucker\'s ready to go.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bReachCaveBlocker
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bReachCaveBlocker-Text-0", "Damn, cave roof\'s collapsed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bReachCaveBlocker-Text-1", "Looks recent, but it\'s the only way through.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bReachCaveBlocker-Text-2", "So you\'re gonna need to drill it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bReachCaveBlocker-Text-3", "Better get your equipment sorted.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bWormSpawn
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bWormSpawn-Text-0", "What the HELL are those?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bWormSpawn-Text-1", "Sort this ... FAST!")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bWormsDead
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bWormsDead-Text-0", "Whatever those were, Group 15\'s gonna be interested as hell.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bDestroyedBlocker1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDestroyedBlocker1-Text-0", "Okay, you cleared it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDestroyedBlocker1-Text-1", "Nice work.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bReachBlocker2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bReachBlocker2-Text-0", "Another one?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bReachBlocker2-Text-1", "This planet\'s a pain the ass.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bReachBlocker2-Text-2", "But I guess you know what to do.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bDestroyedBlocker2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDestroyedBlocker2-Text-0", "Another one bites the dust.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDestroyedBlocker2-Text-1", "Let\'s get outta here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bDestroyedBlocker2-Text-2", "For real this time.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bEnterDesert1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bEnterDesert1-Text-0", "There it is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bEnterDesert1-Text-1", "The aftermath of our attempt to cool this planet down to something liveable.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bEnterDesert1-Text-2", "Guess the joke\'s on us.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2bEnterDesert2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bEnterDesert2-Text-0", "You\'re opening up Icarus for them ... and everyone else.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bEnterDesert2-Text-1", "Yep, the future\'s comin\'.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bEnterDesert2-Text-2", "But where it\'s all going, who can say.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2bEnterDesert2-Text-3", "I guess that\'s up to you.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Briefing-Text-0", "There\'s been a development.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Briefing-Text-1", "UDA are pushing Lagos hard to develop new parts of the terrazone for prospecting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Briefing-Text-2", "But almost no-one\'s come back from up there, so on-the-ground data\'s non-existent, and no dropzones yet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Briefing-Text-3", "That\'s where you come in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Briefing-Text-4", "They need someone experienced to find a way into the region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Briefing-Text-5", "Should be plenty of resources, but who knows what else is roamin\' round up there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Briefing-Text-6", "You up for this one?")

Rows.Name: Expedition3Landing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-0", "Normally, Lagos\'d get their own people to open up new areas.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-1", "They like to get in first.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-2", "But they\'ve been losing folk left, right, and center.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-3", "So here we are.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-4", "At least the goal\'s simple.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-5", "Just get there and plant a beacon for supply pods.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-6", "Destination\'s on the map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-7", "Tricky part is, doesn\'t look like there\'s any natural pathways.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-8", "So maybe you\'re gonna have to make one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-9", "But first, you gotta get there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-10", "Don\'t let me hold you up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Landing-Text-11", "Grab a beacon and get goin\'.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3EnterRegion1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3EnterRegion1-Text-0", "Welcome to the Riverlands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3EnterRegion1-Text-1", "It\'s what happens when you wipe out a chunk of a world, and replace it with your own genetically adjusted flora and fauna.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3EnterRegion1-Text-2", "An ecologist\'s nightmare and wet dream all rolled into one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3EnterRegion1-Text-3", "Problem is, no-one knows exactly how exotics are affecting this place, or how any of it\'s gonna develop long term.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3EnterRegion1-Text-4", "Question is, is Icarus gone ... or just restin\'?")

Rows.Name: Expedition3LocationReached1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3LocationReached1-Text-0", "I don\'t wanna tell you your job ...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3LocationReached1-Text-1", "But if you build a way up that face, sat images look like you\'d have a clean run to the Riverlands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3LocationReached1-Text-2", "Easy for me to say - you\'re the one\'s gotta do it.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3LocationReached2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3LocationReached2-Text-0", "How\'s the view up there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3LocationReached2-Text-1", "Nice piece a work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3LocationReached2-Text-2", "Certainly does the job.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3LocationReached3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3LocationReached3-Text-0", "This is the spot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3LocationReached3-Text-1", "And the beacons nearby.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3LocationReached3-Text-2", "But it\'ll need a platform.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3FindBeacons
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3FindBeacons-Text-0", "You should find beacons in supply crates near the build zone.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3BeaconCollected
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3BeaconCollected-Text-0", "These beacons register and report baseline geographic data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3BeaconCollected-Text-1", "Without them, navigation systems are almost useless.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3BeaconCollected-Text-2", "But they\'re tricky little things - can\'t set up them up just anywhere.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3BeaconCollected-Text-3", "They need line of sight, so you gotta raise \'em up.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3DeployedWrong
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3DeployedWrong-Text-0", "You\'re not high enough yet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3DeployedWrong-Text-1", "You need to build up more.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3DeployedCorrect1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3DeployedCorrect1-Text-0", "Looking good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3DeployedCorrect1-Text-1", "Beacon\'s in place.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3DeployedCorrect2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3DeployedCorrect2-Text-0", "That\'s it, beacon\'s up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3DeployedCorrect2-Text-1", "You\'re doin\' good.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3DeployedCorrect3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3DeployedCorrect3-Text-0", "That one\'s done, beacon\'s ready.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3DeployedCorrect3-Text-1", "Excellent.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3ActivateBeacon1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3ActivateBeacon1-Text-0", "Time to turn it on.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3ActivateBeacon2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3ActivateBeacon2-Text-0", "Fire it up when you\'re ready.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3ActivateBeacon3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3ActivateBeacon3-Text-0", "Activate that thing, would ya?")

Rows.Name: Expedition3BeaconActivated1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3BeaconActivated1-Text-0", "Beacon activated, signal looks solid.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3BeaconActivated2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3BeaconActivated2-Text-0", "Beacon activated.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3BeaconActivated2-Text-1", "Signal looks solid.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3BeaconActivated3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3BeaconActivated3-Text-0", "That\'s it - we got a signal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3BeaconActivated3-Text-1", "Beacon\'s connected.")

Rows.Name: ExpeditionProtectBeacon1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExpeditionProtectBeacon1-Text-0", "It\'ll need a little time to sync - make sure it\'s safe.")

Rows.Name: ExpeditionProtectBeacon2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExpeditionProtectBeacon2-Text-0", "Syncing\' now.")

Rows.Name: ExpeditionProtectBeacon3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExpeditionProtectBeacon3-Text-0", "When it\'s done sync\'ing, you\'re good.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3Complete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Complete-Text-0", "Beacon\'s on.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3Complete-Text-1", "Connection\'s good.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBriefing-Text-0", "UDA\'s under serious pressure to up their exotics shipments.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBriefing-Text-1", "They want Lagos pushing into new zones, like yesterday.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBriefing-Text-2", "Places no-one\'s been. Cold places.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBriefing-Text-3", "I ain\'t gonna lie to ya - this one\'s about as risky as it comes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBriefing-Text-4", "They\'ll be droppin\' some ice-cuttin\' gear down to ya, but exotics screw with signals up there, so expect a mess and zero intel.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBriefing-Text-5", "But hey, at least you\'ll be the first.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBriefing-Text-6", "Maybe name something after yourself.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aLanding-Text-0", "You\'re headed deep into the arctic on this one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aLanding-Text-1", "Luckily Lagos dropped you some fancy ice cutting gear, \'cause Group 15\'s last weapons test brought down half a mountain in your path.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aLanding-Text-2", "The bad news is the delivery drone got pasted by a storm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aLanding-Text-3", "Crash zone\'s marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aLanding-Text-4", "Still ... you came to Icarus for adventure, right?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aLanding-Text-5", "How\'s that goin for ya?")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aEnterRegion
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aEnterRegion-Text-0", "Once, this was meadows ...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aEnterRegion-Text-1", "Weird ass alien meadows that\'d probably eat your face off, but whatever.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aEnterRegion-Text-2", "Now it\'s ice, rock, chasms and caves.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aEnterRegion-Text-3", "Regardless, UDA wants this place for prospecting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aEnterRegion-Text-4", "Which means you need to find a path to the interior.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aEnterRegion-Text-5", "About the only thing Lagos is sure of is there\'s an avalanche in your way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aEnterRegion-Text-6", "So you\'re gonna need the tools they dropped.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aEnterRegion-Text-7", "Good huntin\'.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aDeviceExplanation
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceExplanation-Text-0", "This thing\'s a kind of heat ray.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceExplanation-Text-1", "Hyper-accellerated gas produces a resonant cascade blah blah somethin\' lasers.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceExplanation-Text-2", "Larkwell cooked it up for Group 15.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceExplanation-Text-3", "Oughta cut right through any amount of ice and snow in your way, though.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceExplanation-Text-4", "And sure come in handy when you reach that avalanche.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aRecoveredAllItems
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aRecoveredAllItems-Text-0", "You got all the pieces of that rig.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aRecoveredAllItems-Text-1", "Looks like serious kit.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aCombineItems
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aCombineItems-Text-0", "Before you can use that device, you\'ll need to put it back together.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aCombineItems-Text-1", "Message from Group 15 says, and I quote, \'A drunk 4 year old could do it\'")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aCombineItems-Text-2", "Something\'s definitely not right with these people.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aDeviceAssembled
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceAssembled-Text-0", "Okay, so that thing\'s ready.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceAssembled-Text-1", "Looks solid.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aDeviceNeedsPower
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceNeedsPower-Text-0", "Gear like this eats power.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceNeedsPower-Text-1", "So you\'re gonna have to find a way to juice it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceNeedsPower-Text-2", "But I figure you didn\'t make it this far without a few tricks up your sleeve.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aRecoverPower
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aRecoverPower-Text-0", "Gear like this eats power.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aRecoverPower-Text-1", "So Lagos dropped in some support equipment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aRecoverPower-Text-2", "Should have everything you need, if you can get to it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aRecoverPower-Text-3", "Check your map.")
