Rows.Name: Expedition4aReachAvalanche
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aReachAvalanche-Text-0", "There it is - a million tons of ice and snow.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aReachAvalanche-Text-1", "Get that heat gun sorted and set up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aReachAvalanche-Text-2", "Should slice right through that thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aReachAvalanche-Text-3", "Once you power it up.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aDeviceActivated
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceActivated-Text-0", "Sometimes you just gotta LOVE Group 15.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aDrillingComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDrillingComplete-Text-0", "Looks like you got a way through ...")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aBossSpawn
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBossSpawn-Text-0", "What the!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBossSpawn-Text-1", "Where\'d THEY come from?")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aBossDead
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBossDead-Text-0", "I did NOT see that coming.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBossDead-Text-1", "Is it dead?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBossDead-Text-2", "Looks like it wrecked your toy, too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBossDead-Text-3", "Ah well, it did the job.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aBossDead-Text-4", "May as well head on through.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aExitTunnel
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aExitTunnel-Text-0", "Well here we are.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aExitTunnel-Text-1", "A whole, new, frozen world.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aExitTunnel-Text-2", "It\'s kinda beautiful.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aExitTunnel-Text-3", "But you ain\'t here to admire the view.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aExitTunnel-Text-4", "Lagos Group got a theory that tectonic activity means there\'s more exotics in the mountains.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aExitTunnel-Text-5", "It\'s about to get busy up here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aExitTunnel-Text-6", "So I guess we\'ll find out.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBriefing-Text-0", "Sooo.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBriefing-Text-1", "Lagos Unit got desperate, approved an urgent Group 15 drop into unsurveyed territory.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBriefing-Text-2", "But the Dropship never made it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBriefing-Text-3", "Well, not in one piece.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBriefing-Text-4", "They want you to track it down and find out what happened, because they had enough scandals lately.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBriefing-Text-5", "Means heading into some pretty fresh territory, with no back up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBriefing-Text-6", "They asked specifically for you.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLanding-Text-0", "Whatever happened to that dropship, Lagos needs to know fast.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLanding-Text-1", "They\'ve marked a possible crash site on the map - if you can find a fragment, should be able to track the trajectory to the rest.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLanding-Text-2", "They\'re not expecting survivors.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLanding-Text-3", "But stuff like this tends to attract the wildlife, so tool up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLanding-Text-4", "Good luck on this one.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bLocationReached1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLocationReached1-Text-0", "Data suggest there could be fragments round here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLocationReached1-Text-1", "See what you can turn up.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bFoundFragment1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment1-Text-0", "That looks like it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment1-Text-1", "But what happened to it?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment1-Text-2", "Looks like it was ... hit by somethin\'.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bNextLocation1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bNextLocation1-Text-0", "Bots have made a guess at another possible impact zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bNextLocation1-Text-1", "Area\'s marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bLocationReached2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLocationReached2-Text-0", "This is the zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLocationReached2-Text-1", "Lagos\' thinks debris coulda hit dirt around here.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bFoundFragment2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment2-Text-0", "Okay ... this is weird.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment2-Text-1", "The debris has impact markings that\'ve got nothin\' to do with that crash.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment2-Text-2", "Somethin\' hit that bird on its way down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment2-Text-3", "Somethin\' big ... and fast.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment2-Text-4", "That\'s ... concerning.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bNextLocation2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bNextLocation2-Text-0", "Whatever happened to the dropship, they\'ve got another possible crash site.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bNextLocation2-Text-1", "Check your map.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bLocationReached3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLocationReached3-Text-0", "Trajectory of the fragments suggest more of the pod came down near here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bLocationReached3-Text-1", "Search it out if you can.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bFoundFragment3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment3-Text-0", "Would you look at that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment3-Text-1", "It was torn to crap before it even hit dirt.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment3-Text-2", "What the hell did this?")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bBossSpawn
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBossSpawn-Text-0", "What in SEVEN FLAVORS OF F**K is THAT?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBossSpawn-Text-1", "And how do you KILL it?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bBossSpawn-Text-2", "Aim for the head! or whatever that is!")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bCombat1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bCombat1-Text-0", "You\'re doin\' it!")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bCombat2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bCombat2-Text-0", "Take it DOWN!")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bCombat3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bCombat3-Text-0", "It\'s just a WORM!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bCombat3-Text-1", "A really big WORM!")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bWormEscape
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bWormEscape-Text-0", "It\'s gone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bWormEscape-Text-1", "Holy crap.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bWormEscape-Text-2", "Icarus ain\'t done with surprises.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bWormEscape-Text-3", "Not by a long shot")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bWormEscape-Text-4", "Man oh man.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bMoveOn
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bMoveOn-Text-0", "Looks like the worm made you a way through.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bMoveOn-Text-1", "That\'s convenient.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bMoveOn-Text-2", "Bots reckon last piece of the dropship\'s on the other side.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bFoundFragment4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment4-Text-0", "Well, mystery solved.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment4-Text-1", "Dropship came overhead, got spat at by one of those worm fellas, and fell outta the sky.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment4-Text-2", "Moral of the story: don\'t drop into unmapped territory.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFoundFragment4-Text-3", "Cause Icarus will ruin your day.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4bFactionDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFactionDonut1-Text-0", "Lagos Group\'s gonna be real interested in this one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFactionDonut1-Text-1", "Goddamn sandworm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFactionDonut1-Text-2", "Who knew?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFactionDonut1-Text-3", "Wait.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFactionDonut1-Text-4", "Unless ... that\'s what Group 15 ... was looking for?")
INVTEXT("...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4bFactionDonut1-Text-6", "I\'m gonna leave that one with you.")

Rows.Name: SurveyLanding2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding2a-Text-0", "Like everyone out here, they\'re after exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding2a-Text-1", "Their research teams think they can predict where it forms, but they need more geologic data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding2a-Text-2", "So they want you to set up GPR stations to take readings.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding2a-Text-3", "They need line of sight - so if terrain\'s too low, you\'ll need to build them platforms so they can connect.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding2a-Text-4", "Cause ... technology.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding2a-Text-5", "Sites are on your map, and you\'ll find drop pods with the gear nearby.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding2a-Text-6", "But it gets better.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding2a-Text-7", "Animal life doesn\'t exactly love our tech, so keep your eyes open.")

Rows.Name: SurveyLanding3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3-Text-0", "They\'re interested in geomagnetic readings round here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3-Text-1", "No prizes for guessing it relates to exotics somehow.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3-Text-2", "I\'m no geologist, and neither are you, but all you gotta do is set up some sensor stations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3-Text-3", "They\'ve dropped units at points marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3-Text-4", "Should be easy enough, if this weren\'t Icarus.")

Rows.Name: SurveyLanding4a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding4a-Text-0", "They\'re pouring cash into figuring out Icarus\'s geology and tectonic processes, anything that could help them locate exotics deposits.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding4a-Text-1", "Apaprently they think the stuff speeds up geomorphology, but hey whatta I know?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding4a-Text-2", "They want data, and dropped a bunch of geodetic equipment at points marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding4a-Text-3", "Locate \'em, set \'em up, and we\'re good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding4a-Text-4", "So let\'s go.")

Rows.Name: SurveyLandingStorm
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLandingStorm-Text-0", "Like everyone else down here, Icarus\'s weather\'s been causing problems for \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLandingStorm-Text-1", "They figure if they can predict it better, they\'ll have an advantage over everyone else.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLandingStorm-Text-2", "I got no idea, but what I do know is, they want storm readings - from INSIDE storms.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLandingStorm-Text-3", "Yep, you heard me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLandingStorm-Text-4", "Sensor equipment\'s been dropped at points marked on the map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLandingStorm-Text-5", "Too late to back out now.")

Rows.Name: SurveyRadarReady1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyRadarReady1-Text-0", "There you go, station\'s online.")

Rows.Name: SurveyRadarReady2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyRadarReady2-Text-0", "Looks like the unit\'s ready.")

Rows.Name: SurveyRadarReady3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyRadarReady3-Text-0", "Okay, station activated.")

Rows.Name: SurveyRadarReady4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyRadarReady4-Text-0", "Good, we\'re reading the station - it\'s active.")

Rows.Name: SurveyRadarReady5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyRadarReady5-Text-0", "That\'s it, system\'s online.")

Rows.Name: SurveyRadarReady6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyRadarReady6-Text-0", "We\'re reading the station, ready to go.")

Rows.Name: SurveyWeatherStationReady
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyWeatherStationReady-Text-0", "It\'s up and ready to go")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyWeatherStationReady-Text-1", "Now all we need\'s some weather.")

Rows.Name: SurveyUplink1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink1-Text-0", "For this much data, you\'re gonna need an uplink to connect you to orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink1-Text-1", "Should be a marker on your map where they dropped a unit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink1-Text-2", "Grab it, deploy it and you\'re ready to roll.")

Rows.Name: SurveyUplink2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink2-Text-0", "It\'s a lot of data, so you\'ll need an orbital uplink.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink2-Text-1", "They\'ve dropped a unit down for ya.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink2-Text-2", "Should be marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink2-Text-3", "Just point and shoot.")

Rows.Name: SurveyUplink3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink3-Text-0", "You\'ll need a dedicated uplink, or we\'ll be here all week.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink3-Text-1", "Check your map for the drop point.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplink3-Text-2", "Find the unit, and deploy it nearby.")

Rows.Name: SurveyUplinkActivated1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplinkActivated1-Text-0", "Uplink\'s on - coming through clear.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplinkActivated1-Text-1", "Looking good.")

Rows.Name: SurveyUplinkActivated2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplinkActivated2-Text-0", "Uplink active - we\'re reading the stream nice and bright.")

Rows.Name: SurveyUplinkActivated3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplinkActivated3-Text-0", "Uplink\'s hot - keep it rolling.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyUplinkActivated3-Text-1", "So far, so good.")

Rows.Name: ResearchBriefing2b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing2b-Text-0", "One of their forward teams reported unusual bio-material in the region, whatever that means.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing2b-Text-1", "They need someone to go in and bring samples back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing2b-Text-2", "Help \'em figure out what\'s happening down there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing2b-Text-3", "Could be a good paycheck in it.")

Rows.Name: ResearchBriefing3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing3-Text-0", "There\'s reports of unusual phenomena in the area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing3-Text-1", "Things that just shouldn\'t be there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing3-Text-2", "They wanna be the first to know what\'s actually going on, because ... money.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing3-Text-3", "But first they need samples.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing3-Text-4", "You feel like a walk?")

Rows.Name: ResearchBriefing4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing4b-Text-0", "The ecology of Icarus is changing, and not just lifeforms.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing4b-Text-1", "Orbital image analysis shows unusual geoforms in the region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing4b-Text-2", "They think it\'s exotic related, and want samples before anyone else gets them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefing4b-Text-3", "Think you can handle it?")

Rows.Name: ResearchLanding2b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding2b-Text-0", "There\'s reports of new plantlife down here, bioforms no-one\'s seen before.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding2b-Text-1", "They want a headstart over everyone else, figuring out what the hell\'s going on, and where it\'s going.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding2b-Text-2", "Whatever it is, they need samples.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding2b-Text-3", "First stop\'s marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding2b-Text-4", "Good luck, and remember, they ain\'t opening their wallet unless you bring something back.")

Rows.Name: ResearchLanding3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding3-Text-0", "They got intel of unusual biota in the region, and even weirder stuff.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding3-Text-1", "Nocturnal plants, mineral oddities - you name it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding3-Text-2", "No-one\'s quite sure what\'s happening down here, but there\'s top dollar on data right now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding3-Text-3", "They\'ve marked areas on your map, and the rest\'s on you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding3-Text-4", "Check your HUD and head out when you\'re ready.")

Rows.Name: ResearchLanding4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding4b-Text-0", "Everyone knows the terrazone\'s changing - but no-one\'s sure where it\'s goin\'.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding4b-Text-1", "Even the geology\'s shifting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding4b-Text-2", "They got their hands on satellite data showing new geoforms emerging.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding4b-Text-3", "Smart money\'s on exotics being involved, but until you bring back  some samples, they\'re just guessing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLanding4b-Text-4", "Let\'s end the suspense, shall we.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindItem1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem1-Text-0", "I guess that\'s what they\'re looking for.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindItem2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem2-Text-0", "I\'d say THAT\'S unusual biomatter, wouldn\'t you?")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindItem3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem3-Text-0", "Sure looks like what they sent you to get, and if it ain\'t, well, I\'d say they\'re gonna be interested regardless.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindItem4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem4-Text-0", "If they wanted unusual samples, I think that qualifies.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindItem5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem5-Text-0", "You don\'t see that every day ... Icarus never ceases to surprise.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindItem6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem6-Text-0", "I got no idea what that\'s doing there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem6-Text-1", "Good find.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindItem7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem7-Text-0", "I\'ve never seen that before. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem7-Text-1", "And I guess that\'s why you\'re here.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindItem8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem8-Text-0", "If weird\'s what they want, they\'re gonna love that.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindItem9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindItem9-Text-0", "The contract said \'unusual biosamples\', but I think we can be pretty sure this is what they meant.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindSameItem1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindSameItem1-Text-0", "It\'s another one of them")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindSameItem1-Text-1", "These things are popping up all over the place.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindSameItem2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindSameItem2-Text-0", "There it is again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindSameItem2-Text-1", "Something\'s happening here, but we\'re not gonna know what until these samples are back in orbit.")

Rows.Name: ResearchFindSameItem3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindSameItem3-Text-0", "It\'s just like the other one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchFindSameItem3-Text-1", "Where the hell are these coming from?")

Rows.Name: RecoveryBriefing2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefing2a-Text-0", "It\'s an open secret, the terrazone\'s full of failed terraforming warheads, if you can find them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefing2a-Text-1", "And let\'s just say they\'re \'invested\' in that particular technology.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefing2a-Text-2", "Discretely, if possible.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefing2a-Text-3", "Think you can take care of that?")

Rows.Name: RecoveryBriefing4a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefing4a-Text-0", "But one of their research teams ... kinda vanished.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefing4a-Text-1", "Never made it to their supply drops.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefing4a-Text-2", "Which happens, but this, this is a problem.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefing4a-Text-3", "cause whatever\'s in those crates, they want it back REAL bad.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefing4a-Text-4", "They need ya to play fetch.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryBriefingExtra
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingExtra-Text-0", "But they\'ve been careless.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingExtra-Text-1", "Lost one of their toys on the surface.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingExtra-Text-2", "You get it back, there\'s a decent payout.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingExtra-Text-3", "If you\'re up for it.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryLanding2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding2a-Text-0", "They\'re interested in terraforming tech, and what it can do for them in the future.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding2a-Text-1", "Because there\'s a lot of Icarus out there, beyond the terrazone, and a lot of bio-warheads that never went off.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding2a-Text-2", "That tech was beyond top secret, now it\'s just waiting out there for people to find \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding2a-Text-3", "Someone musta sent them some intel, \'cause they want you to investigate a few locations, see what you can turn up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding2a-Text-4", "Check your map, stay safe, and ... wash your hands afterwards.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryLanding4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding4b-Text-0", "They\'re in deep on Icarus, but the last team they sent down never came back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding4b-Text-1", "Didn\'t make it to their supply drops.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding4b-Text-2", "And apparently, what\'s in those crates is valuable enough to send someone in after it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding4b-Text-3", "They\'re being real quiet about what it is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLanding4b-Text-4", "So check your map, get started ... and stay sharp.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryLandingExtra
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingExtra-Text-0", "Icarus screws with everyone\'s plans.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingExtra-Text-1", "They lost something important, and now they want it back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingExtra-Text-2", "Same old story.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingExtra-Text-3", "Check your map, then head out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingExtra-Text-4", "That shit ain\'t gonna rescue itself.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryFindItem1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem1-Text-0", "I\'d say that\'s what they\'re looking for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem1-Text-1", "Try not to handle it too much.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem1-Text-2", "And definitely don\'t sniff it.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryFindItem2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem2-Text-0", "You know what that is, right?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem2-Text-1", "That\'s life and death in jar.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryFindItem3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem3-Text-0", "Just your average canister of genetically supercharged, planet-altering enzymes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem3-Text-1", "Nothing to see here.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryFindItem4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4-Text-0", "It ain\'t the jade monkey, but it\'s what you came for.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryFindItem4b1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b1-Text-0", "They didn\'t say exactly what to look for, but they didn\'t have to.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b1-Text-1", "Whatever that is, that\'s it.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryFindItem4b2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b2-Text-0", "Oh, it\'s one of those ... whatever it is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b2-Text-1", "And they sure as hell want it back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b2-Text-2", "Something\'s weird here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b2-Text-3", "So long as they pay, I guess.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryFindItem4b3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b3-Text-0", "Good find.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b3-Text-1", "It\'s what they\'re looking for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b3-Text-2", "But what the hell IS it?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b3-Text-3", "You feel like there\'s something they\'re not telling us?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b3-Text-4", "I don\'t know.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFindItem4b3-Text-5", "I been around, and I never seen anything like that.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryCraftItem4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryCraftItem4b-Text-0", "But there\'s one more thing ...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryCraftItem4b-Text-1", "They want you to assemble it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryCraftItem4b-Text-2", "Put it together.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryCraftItem4b-Text-3", "Can you figure it out?")

Rows.Name: RecoveryActivateItem4b_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_1-Text-0", "Aaand now ... they want you to turn it on.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_1-Text-1", "Yeah.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_1-Text-2", "They say it\'s zero risk.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_1-Text-3", "Or ... very low risk.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_1-Text-4", "Probably.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_1-Text-5", "What it does, I got no idea.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryActivateItem4b_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_2-Text-0", "Okay")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_2-Text-1", "That\'s scary.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_2-Text-2", "I just -")

Rows.Name: RecoveryActivateItem4b_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_3-Text-0", "Whatever the hell that was, it killed our comms.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_3-Text-1", "Don\'t turn it on again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryActivateItem4b_3-Text-2", "Ever.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationBriefing3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefing3-Text-0", "Wildlife\'s been causing problems for their people down there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefing3-Text-1", "It\'s been, ah, makin\' a helluva mess, and not leavin\' a lotta witnesses.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefing3-Text-2", "So they\'re not exactly sure what kinda predator you\'re hunting, or how many there could be, but you can handle that ... right?")

Rows.Name: ExterminationBriefing4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefing4b-Text-0", "They\'ve got a special kinda trouble.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefing4b-Text-1", "Maybe you heard rumours, but a sandworm\'s no joke.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefing4b-Text-2", "You\'ll need to track it down, and get rid of the thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefing4b-Text-3", "....... Somehow.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationBriefingSpare1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare1-Text-0", "They need help with a wildlife problem.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare1-Text-1", "Before they lose any more of their people.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare1-Text-2", "You got the numbers for this?")

Rows.Name: ExterminationBriefingSpare2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare2-Text-0", "They got a four-legged problem, and need someone with experience to sort it out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare2-Text-1", "You up for a hunt?")

Rows.Name: ExterminationBriefingSpare3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare3-Text-0", "If you\'re up for a hunt, they got an issue with the local fauna: It keeps ending their people.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare3-Text-1", "Think you can help out?")

Rows.Name: ExterminationInfestationBriefing1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationInfestationBriefing1-Text-0", "So.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationInfestationBriefing1-Text-1", "Animal numbers are getting out of control in some areas down there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationInfestationBriefing1-Text-2", "Guess that\'s what happens when you wipe out the local species, then release a whole new ecosystem to run wild.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationInfestationBriefing1-Text-3", "People are never gonna learn.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationInfestationBriefing1-Text-4", "Can you give \'em a hand?")

Rows.Name: ExterminationLanding3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding3-Text-0", "Something\'s been stalking their teams.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding3-Text-1", "But no-one\'s totally sure what you\'re tracking.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding3-Text-2", "Hasn\'t exactly left a lot of survivors.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding3-Text-3", "The most recent site\'s marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding3-Text-4", "Start there, see if you can run this one to the ground.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding3-Text-5", "And watch your back.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationLanding4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding4b-Text-0", "Right now, you\'re on your own.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding4b-Text-1", "Not a lot of folk raising their hand to tangle with a sandworm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding4b-Text-2", "We\'ve got intel on the last place anyone saw it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding4b-Text-3", "Check your map, then track it down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding4b-Text-4", "If you make it through, there\'ll be a payday waitin\'.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLanding4b-Text-5", "Good luck.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationLandingSpare1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare1-Text-0", "They need you to find this thing, and fast, before it does any more damage.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare1-Text-1", "So check your map, and get going.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationLandingSpare2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare2-Text-0", "Whatever\'s been hunting their people, it\'s still out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare2-Text-1", "Last sighting\'s on your map - stay safe.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationLandingSpare3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare3-Text-0", "They need you to find this thing and any of its friends, then put it in the ground, because they\'re stuck until you do.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare3-Text-1", "Recent site\'s on your map - good luck.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationInfestationLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationInfestationLanding-Text-0", "They\'re being overrun by critters near here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationInfestationLanding-Text-1", "Sites\'ll be marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationInfestationLanding-Text-2", "Head out there, and clear it out.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationScratchMarks1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationScratchMarks1-Text-0", "Don\'t see that every day.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationScratchMarks1-Text-1", "Thankfully.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationScratchMarks2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationScratchMarks2-Text-0", "Something tore this place up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationScratchMarks2-Text-1", "Better you down there than me.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationScratchMarks3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationScratchMarks3-Text-0", "Maybe it\'s just me, but I wouldn\'t get too close to anything that could do that.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationPrints1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationPrints1-Text-0", "Animal prints .........")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationPrints1-Text-1", "Big ones.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationPrints2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationPrints2-Text-0", "Good find.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationPrints2-Text-1", "Something\'s spent some time here.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationPrints3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationPrints3-Text-0", "That\'s what we\'re looking for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationPrints3-Text-1", "We can track these.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationCorpse1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationCorpse1-Text-0", "Okaaay.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationCorpse1-Text-1", "That\'s not scary ... at all.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationCorpse2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationCorpse2-Text-0", "Goddamn.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationCorpse2-Text-1", "Something was hungry.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationCorpse3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationCorpse3-Text-0", "You\'re on the right track.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationCorpse3-Text-1", "If you wanna tangle with whatever did that.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationSandwormMarker1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationSandwormMarker1-Text-0", "That\'s what you\'re looking for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationSandwormMarker1-Text-1", "Only one thing could\'ve made that.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationSandwormMarker2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationSandwormMarker2-Text-0", "You\'re getting closer.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationSandwormMarker2-Text-1", "I hope you\'re ready.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationSandwormMarker3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationSandwormMarker3-Text-0", "The kinda thing that does that ... you better know exactly what you\'re doing, chasin\' it down.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationFindClueGeneric1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationFindClueGeneric1-Text-0", "Something big did that.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationFindClueGeneric2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationFindClueGeneric2-Text-0", "That\'s recent, look at that.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationFindClueGeneric3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationFindClueGeneric3-Text-0", "If you\'re wondering whether you\'re on the right track, there\'s your answer.")

Rows.Name: InfestationPoint1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "InfestationPoint1-Text-0", "You\'re gonna have your work cut out for you round here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "InfestationPoint1-Text-1", "Heads up.")

Rows.Name: InfestationPoint2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "InfestationPoint2-Text-0", "You got friends incoming - so make it count.")

Rows.Name: InfestationPoint3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "InfestationPoint3-Text-0", "This zone\'s hot - so a little advice: if it moves, kill it.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationDenLocationRevealed1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed1-Text-0", "Okay, that should do it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed1-Text-1", "We\'ve got enough data to find this thing\'s lair.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed1-Text-2", "Zone\'s marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationDenLocationRevealed2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed2-Text-0", "Alright, we\'re closing in on it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed2-Text-1", "We can triangulate the general zone of its den or lair or whatever you wanna call it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed2-Text-2", "Time to end this.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationDenLocationRevealed3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed3-Text-0", "This is good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed3-Text-1", "We should be able to track it back to its home area now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed3-Text-2", "A sandworm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationDenLocationRevealed3-Text-3", "Because that\'s a really smart thing to do.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationReachLair1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationReachLair1-Text-0", "You found its lair.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationReachLair1-Text-1", "Good hunting, friend.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationReachLair2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationReachLair2-Text-0", "Looks like its den.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationReachLair2-Text-1", "Good tracking.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationReachLair3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationReachLair3-Text-0", "Well, something sure lives in there.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationReachLair4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationReachLair4-Text-0", "It\'s like a nest or a burrow ... or something.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationBossSpawn1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBossSpawn1-Text-0", "Looks like someone\'s come to say hello.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBossSpawn1-Text-1", "Take it to \'em.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationBossSpawn2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBossSpawn2-Text-0", "You ready down there, \'cause they are!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBossSpawn2-Text-1", "Time to dance.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationBossSpawn3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBossSpawn3-Text-0", "You\'re on, partner.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBossSpawn3-Text-1", "Get ready!")

Rows.Name: ExterminationSandwormSpawn
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationSandwormSpawn-Text-0", "Alright!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationSandwormSpawn-Text-1", "THIS IS WHAT YOU CAME FOR!")

Rows.Name: ExterminationNocturnalWait1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationNocturnalWait1-Text-0", "If it\'s nocturnal, you\'re gonna need to wait till nightfall.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationNocturnalWait1-Text-1", "Gives you some time to get prepared.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationNocturnalWait2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationNocturnalWait2-Text-0", "Everything you found suggests a nocturnal hunter")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationNocturnalWait2-Text-1", "You\'re gonna need to wait till nightfall.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationStormWait
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationStormWait-Text-0", "There\'s reports some animals only hunt during storms.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationStormWait-Text-1", "I guess they use \'em for cover.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationStormWait-Text-2", "Could be, you gotta wait for heavy weather.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationPlaceCorpseWait
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationPlaceCorpseWait-Text-0", "Try laying some bait to lure it out.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationBossDead1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBossDead1-Text-0", "You did it, they\'re all down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBossDead1-Text-1", "That was a close call.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationBossDead2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBossDead2-Text-0", "Okay, that\'s it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBossDead2-Text-1", "You\'re getting pretty lethal, aren\'t ya?")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationBossDead3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBossDead3-Text-0", "It\'s down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationBossDead3-Text-1", "Good kill.")

Rows.Name: FM3ExterminationSandwormDead4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationSandwormDead4-Text-0", "Hoooo, man.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationSandwormDead4-Text-1", "That thing did NOT go down easy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationSandwormDead4-Text-2", "Wow.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FM3ExterminationSandwormDead4-Text-3", "I mean ... seriously ...")

Rows.Name: ConstructionBriefing2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing2a-Text-0", "They got plans for this planet, and that means boots on the ground.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing2a-Text-1", "But those boots\'ll need places to stay, or Icarus\'ll eat them alive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing2a-Text-2", "So they want some barracks made, asap, and they\'ll pay ya to do it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing2a-Text-3", "You up for some building, friend?")

Rows.Name: ConstructionBriefing2b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing2b-Text-0", "They\'re getting ready to send advance teams down, but they need places to stay or it\'s gonna be a real short trip.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing2b-Text-1", "They gotta have the basics, before they can drop their people in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing2b-Text-2", "You interested?")

Rows.Name: ConstructionBriefing4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing4b-Text-0", "They\'re getting ambitious, but need some equipment set up by someone who knows what they\'re doing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing4b-Text-1", "They\'ll let you know the setup, you just gotta build it for \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefing4b-Text-2", "Sounds easy, right?")

Rows.Name: ConstructionBriefingMultiLocation1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefingMultiLocation1-Text-0", "They\'ve got plans for this region, but no experience.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefingMultiLocation1-Text-1", "They need someone to set up forward bases in the area, before they send their people in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefingMultiLocation1-Text-2", "Should be a walk in the park ... if the park was trying to kill you.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionBriefingMultiLocation2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefingMultiLocation2-Text-0", "They want to up their presence in the region, but don\'t have the infrastructure.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefingMultiLocation2-Text-1", "So they\'re looking for a crew to build some basic outposts for their advance teams.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionBriefingMultiLocation2-Text-2", "Should be pretty straightforward ... if this wasn\'t Icarus.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionLanding2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2a-Text-0", "And they\'re smart enough to realise they need a roof over their head down here, or bad things happen.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2a-Text-1", "Their people\'ll need beds, at a minimum.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2a-Text-2", "Check your map, and head out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2a-Text-3", "Good luck, friend.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionLanding2b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2b-Text-0", "They\'re preparing for some major moves, and need places for their people.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2b-Text-1", "Hunters, to start with.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2b-Text-2", "Food\'s gotta come from somewhere.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2b-Text-3", "You know how this goes - build it and they\'ll come.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2b-Text-4", "So get \'em set up with the basics, and we\'re good to go.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding2b-Text-5", "Check your map, and let\'s get this circus on the road.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionLanding4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding4b-Text-0", "They\'re moving deeper into Icarus every day, and need to grow their base network fast.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding4b-Text-1", "They\'re asking for fully functional forward outposts, so get your tech sorted.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLanding4b-Text-2", "Check your map, then head out.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionLandingMultiLocation1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLandingMultiLocation1-Text-0", "They got major stakes in this region, and need places for their people.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLandingMultiLocation1-Text-1", "So check your map, and get going.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLandingMultiLocation1-Text-2", "There\'s bases need buildin\'.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionLandingMultiLocation2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLandingMultiLocation2-Text-0", "They\'re expanding their presence down here, and they wanna do it fast.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLandingMultiLocation2-Text-1", "So they\'re taking a few shortcuts.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLandingMultiLocation2-Text-2", "Cause until their people have places, they can\'t do much.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionLandingMultiLocation2-Text-3", "Check your map for the build locations, and let\'s do this.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionArrive2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArrive2a-Text-0", "This is the place.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArrive2a-Text-1", "Time to build.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionArrive2b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArrive2b-Text-0", "This is where they want it")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArrive2b-Text-1", "You ready to build?")

Rows.Name: ConstructionArrive4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArrive4b-Text-0", "So this is the spot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArrive4b-Text-1", "They\'ve got their reasons")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArrive4b-Text-2", "Let\'s get started.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionArriveGeneric1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArriveGeneric1-Text-0", "This is where they want it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArriveGeneric1-Text-1", "Good a spot as any, I guess.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArriveGeneric1-Text-2", "Make \'em some shelter.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionArriveGeneric2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArriveGeneric2-Text-0", "This is the place.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArriveGeneric2-Text-1", "Get building, friend.")

Rows.Name: ConstructionArriveGeneric3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArriveGeneric3-Text-0", "This is where they want it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArriveGeneric3-Text-1", "You good to build?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConstructionArriveGeneric3-Text-2", "Okay.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionBriefing2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing2a-Text-0", "They think they\'ve got a lead on some exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing2a-Text-1", "And the Lagos Unit\'s cleared you to start hunting ... congratulations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing2a-Text-2", "Time to see what you can dig up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing2a-Text-3", "Whatta ya say?")

Rows.Name: ExtractionBriefing4a_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing4a_2-Text-0", "And right now, they want exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing4a_2-Text-1", "Think you\'re ready to go hunting for real?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing4a_2-Text-2", "You\'ll need equipment for this one - so check your mission briefing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing4a_2-Text-3", "It\'s your call.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionBriefing4b_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing4b_2-Text-0", "And right now, they want exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing4b_2-Text-1", "Think you\'re ready to go hunting for real?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionBriefing4b_2-Text-2", "They\'re fronting the gear, but the decision\'s all yours.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionLanding2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding2a-Text-0", "They\'ve marked a zone on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding2a-Text-1", "Supposed to be an exotics vein thereabouts.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding2a-Text-2", "But it won\'t be there long, so I\'d get a move on, if I were you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding2a-Text-3", "And try not to come back empty handed.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionLanding4a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding4a-Text-0", "Especially where exotics\'re involved.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding4a-Text-1", "Don\'t know if it\'s researchers or some damn bot telling \'em there\'s exotics in the region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding4a-Text-2", "But either way, you\'re the one\'s that\'s gotta track \'em down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding4a-Text-3", "So find a spot, set a radar up, and go from there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding4a-Text-4", "Extractor\'ll come in handy too, if you manage to find something.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionLanding4a-Text-5", "Good luck out there.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionReachCaveZone2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionReachCaveZone2a-Text-0", "Well, it\'s supposed to be round here somewhere.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionReachCaveZone2a-Text-1", "Just gotta find a way in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionReachCaveZone2a-Text-2", "Keep searchin\' till you find it.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionExoticsAcquired2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionExoticsAcquired2a-Text-0", "That, my friend, is exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionExoticsAcquired2a-Text-1", "They\'ll want a little more than that though.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionRadarShowsExotics1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsExotics1-Text-0", "Bingo. Exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsExotics1-Text-1", "Position\'s marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsExotics1-Text-2", "Get an extractor on \'em.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionRadarShowsExotics2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsExotics2-Text-0", "Nice WORK - exotics nearby.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsExotics2-Text-1", "Time to get to work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsExotics2-Text-2", "Check your map, and fire up that extractor.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionRadarShowsExotics3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsExotics3-Text-0", "YOU just found exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsExotics3-Text-1", "Check your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsExotics3-Text-2", "All you gotta do now is extract \'em and get \'em to orbit.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionRadarShowsArc1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsArc1-Text-0", "Radar\'s sayin\' there\'s something in that direction.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsArc1-Text-1", "Set it up closer.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionRadarShowsArc2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsArc2-Text-0", "Looks like there could be deposits over there, but you\'ll need to shift the radar closer.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionRadarShowsArc3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarShowsArc3-Text-0", "You\'re onto something, but the radar\'s still too far away.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionRadarNoExotics1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarNoExotics1-Text-0", "Nope, nothing round here.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionRadarNoExotics2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarNoExotics2-Text-0", "Looks like there\'s no exotics in range.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionRadarNoExotics3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarNoExotics3-Text-0", "Try another location.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionRadarNoExotics3-Text-1", "Ain\'t no exotics here.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionExtractorActivated
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionExtractorActivated-Text-0", "That\'s it")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionExtractorActivated-Text-1", "You\'re in business")

Rows.Name: ExtractionDepositFinished1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionDepositFinished1-Text-0", "Looks like that deposit\'s done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionDepositFinished1-Text-1", "You mined it out.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionDepositFinished2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionDepositFinished2-Text-0", "That vein\'s cooked.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionDepositFinished2-Text-1", "You\'ll need to find another.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionComplete2a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionComplete2a-Text-0", "Okay hombre, you did it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionComplete2a-Text-1", "They asked for exotics, and you got \'em.")

Rows.Name: ExtractionComplete4b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionComplete4b-Text-0", "Alriiiight.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExtractionComplete4b-Text-1", "I think they\'ll be happy with that.")

Rows.Name: SinotaiBriefingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiBriefingDonut1-Text-0", "Sinotai pays for solutions, and it shows.")

Rows.Name: SinotaiBriefingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiBriefingDonut2-Text-0", "This one\'s for Sinotai - they want it done quick and clean.")

Rows.Name: SinotaiBriefingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiBriefingDonut3-Text-0", "Sinotai never screw around, and it\'s worth your while to impress them.")

Rows.Name: UniaoBriefingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoBriefingDonut1-Text-0", "Uniao might be a pack of wolves, but they\'re wolves with cash.")

Rows.Name: UniaoBriefingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoBriefingDonut2-Text-0", "Uniao\'ve got a job for ya, if you don\'t mind who you\'re working for.")

Rows.Name: UniaoBriefingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoBriefingDonut3-Text-0", "Uniao act like they\'re invincible, but they need a hand on the surface.")

Rows.Name: ACSBriefingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSBriefingDonut1-Text-0", "The ACS have big plans for Icarus, and you\'re part of them.")

Rows.Name: ACSBriefingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSBriefingDonut2-Text-0", "ACS just put a contract up.")

Rows.Name: ACSBriefingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSBriefingDonut3-Text-0", "ACS might have all the tech in the world, but they need someone who knows Icarus.")

Rows.Name: AssemblyBriefingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyBriefingDonut1-Text-0", "The Assembly are new to Icarus, but if their track record\'s anything to go by, they\'ll be running the place soon enough.")

Rows.Name: AssemblyBriefingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyBriefingDonut2-Text-0", "The Assembly don\'t trust anyone, but they need help.")

Rows.Name: AssemblyBriefingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyBriefingDonut3-Text-0", "The Assembly are expanding their footprint on Icarus, and looking for experienced people.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitBriefingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitBriefingDonut1-Text-0", "The Lagos Unit runs Icarus for the UDA, but they don\'t like getting their hands dirty.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitBriefingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitBriefingDonut2-Text-0", "The Lagos Unit have a problem, which ain\'t surprising when you\'re tryna run a planet.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitBriefingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitBriefingDonut3-Text-0", "The Lagos Unit needs all the help they can get, holding this place together.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitBriefingDonut4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitBriefingDonut4-Text-0", "The Lagos Unit\'s put up a contract, if you\'re looking for a payday.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitBriefingDonut5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitBriefingDonut5-Text-0", "The Lagos Unit runs this show, but they\'re always lookin\' out for good crews.")

Rows.Name: Group15BriefingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15BriefingDonut1-Text-0", "Group 15 don\'t ask for help unless they have to.")

Rows.Name: Group15BriefingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15BriefingDonut2-Text-0", "Group 15 stay pretty quiet about what they\'re up to, but apparently they\'ve got a problem.")

Rows.Name: Group15BriefingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15BriefingDonut3-Text-0", "I wouldn\'t trust Group 15, but the work\'s always ... interesting.")

Rows.Name: SinotaiLandingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiLandingDonut1-Text-0", "Sinotai pretty much run space, so you\'re smart to do them a favour.")

Rows.Name: SinotaiLandingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiLandingDonut2-Text-0", "You\'re here for Sinotai, and if you get it right, they\'ll be there for you.")

Rows.Name: SinotaiLandingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiLandingDonut3-Text-0", "Sinotai have the best sats in the sky, so they\'ll be watching you.")

Rows.Name: UniaoLandingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoLandingDonut1-Text-0", "Uniao only care about one thing, power - but at least they\'re consistent.")

Rows.Name: UniaoLandingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoLandingDonut2-Text-0", "Uniao don\'t care who you are, so long as you deliver.")

Rows.Name: UniaoLandingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoLandingDonut3-Text-0", "As long as you\'re getting them what they want, Uniao have got your back - just don\'t disappoint them.")

Rows.Name: ACSLandingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSLandingDonut1-Text-0", "I don\'t get the ACS, but out here, they need you as much as you need them.")

Rows.Name: ACSLandingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSLandingDonut2-Text-0", "When you\'re working for the ACS you always know where you stand - you\'re a tool.")

Rows.Name: ACSLandingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSLandingDonut3-Text-0", "The ACS might be loud, weird and paranoid, but they got the tech and the cash to do whatever they want.")

Rows.Name: AssemblyLandingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyLandingDonut1-Text-0", "The Assembly came up fast, and they\'re doing the same on Icarus, but they don\'t trust anyone.")

Rows.Name: AssemblyLandingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyLandingDonut2-Text-0", "Once the Assembly got Africa working together, nothing could stop \'em - and now, here we are.")

Rows.Name: AssemblyLandingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyLandingDonut3-Text-0", "Working with the Assembly\'s a smart bet - and they\'re moving faster than anyone out here.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitLandingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitLandingDonut1-Text-0", "The UDA may officially run Icarus, but out here, the Lagos Unit\'s the real power.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitLandingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitLandingDonut2-Text-0", "This far from Earth, the Lagos Unit can more or less do what it likes.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitLandingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitLandingDonut3-Text-0", "The Lagos Unit may be UDA, but four lightyears from Earth, they decide what flies, and what dies out here.")

Rows.Name: Group15LandingDonut1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15LandingDonut1-Text-0", "If you figure out what Group 15 are up to, maybe you could tell me.")

Rows.Name: Group15LandingDonut2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15LandingDonut2-Text-0", "Group 15 say they\'re a \'research body\', but that\'s like calling Sinotai a \'travel agency\'.")

Rows.Name: Group15LandingDonut3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15LandingDonut3-Text-0", "Group 15 want one thing - knowledge - and they don\'t care how they get it.")

Rows.Name: SinotaiMissionEnd1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiMissionEnd1-Text-0", "Sinotai are gonna be happy with you, which is good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiMissionEnd1-Text-1", "Trust goes a long way with them.")

Rows.Name: SinotaiMissionEnd2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiMissionEnd2-Text-0", "If you\'re aiming to impress Sinotai, I\'d say you succeeded,")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiMissionEnd2-Text-1", "They\'ll notice this.")

Rows.Name: SinotaiMissionEnd3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiMissionEnd3-Text-0", "Sinotai more or less own space, so it\'s smart to stay on their good side.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SinotaiMissionEnd3-Text-1", "Keep it up.")

Rows.Name: UniaoMissionEnd1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoMissionEnd1-Text-0", "Uniao can be useful allies.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoMissionEnd1-Text-1", "And you\'re keepin\' \'em happy here.")

Rows.Name: UniaoMissionEnd2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoMissionEnd2-Text-0", "Uniao\'s got ambitions, so you\'ll be looking real good to them right now")

Rows.Name: UniaoMissionEnd3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoMissionEnd3-Text-0", "Uniao\'s gonna like this, a lot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UniaoMissionEnd3-Text-1", "There are worse friends to have, I guess.")

Rows.Name: ACSMissionEnd1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSMissionEnd1-Text-0", "The ACS tend to value results.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSMissionEnd1-Text-1", "And you\'re deliverin\' \'em - they\'ll like that.")

Rows.Name: ACSMissionEnd2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSMissionEnd2-Text-0", "The ACS may be crazy, but they know talent when they see it.")

Rows.Name: ACSMissionEnd3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSMissionEnd3-Text-0", "The ACS are paranoid, but when you tick their boxes, good things happen.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ACSMissionEnd3-Text-1", "I\'d say you\'re on the right track.")

Rows.Name: AssemblyMissionEnd1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyMissionEnd1-Text-0", "The Assembly are gonna appreciate this and pay well.")

Rows.Name: AssemblyMissionEnd2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyMissionEnd2-Text-0", "If you\'re looking to earn the Assembly\'s trust, you\'re doin it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyMissionEnd2-Text-1", "And that\'s not easy.")

Rows.Name: AssemblyMissionEnd3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AssemblyMissionEnd3-Text-0", "The Assembly can be slow to trust people, but if you keep this up, you\'ll do well with them.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitMissionEnd1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitMissionEnd1-Text-0", "You don\'t get far round here without the Lagos Unit\'s help.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitMissionEnd1-Text-1", "And they\'re gonna like this.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitMissionEnd2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitMissionEnd2-Text-0", "When you help the Lagos Unit, you\'re helping the people who own this planet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitMissionEnd2-Text-1", "Can\'t go far wrong.")

Rows.Name: LagosUnitMissionEnd3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitMissionEnd3-Text-0", "The Lagos Unit may be cowboys, but they\'re cowboys who run Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LagosUnitMissionEnd3-Text-1", "And you\'re gonna be popular with them.")

Rows.Name: Group15MissionEnd1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15MissionEnd1-Text-0", "No-one knows exactly what Group 15 do, but they\'re gonna be pleased with you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15MissionEnd1-Text-1", "That\'s good, I think.")

Rows.Name: Group15MissionEnd2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15MissionEnd2-Text-0", "Group 15\'ll be glad to hear from you again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15MissionEnd2-Text-1", "When you\'re back in orbit.")

Rows.Name: Group15MissionEnd3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Group15MissionEnd3-Text-0", "You\'ll be making friends at Group 15 with this.")

Rows.Name: WeatherEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent1-Text-0", "You got heavy weather incoming.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent1-Text-1", "Get to shelter or you\'re in trouble.")

Rows.Name: WeatherEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent2-Text-0", "Storm\'s coming in ... Fast!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent2-Text-1", "You know what to do.")

Rows.Name: WeatherEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent3-Text-0", "Storm system\'s building.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent3-Text-1", "It\'s about to get wild down there.")

Rows.Name: WeatherEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent4-Text-0", "Storm cell just curled up outta nowhere.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent4-Text-1", "Damn this planet\'s a mess.")

Rows.Name: WeatherEvent5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent5-Text-0", "Weather\'s about to get pretty crazy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WeatherEvent5-Text-1", "You got some shelter down there?!")

Rows.Name: AnimalAttack1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalAttack1-Text-0", "Looks like the party\'s started!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalAttack1-Text-1", "Stay sharp!")

Rows.Name: AnimalAttack2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalAttack2-Text-0", "Headsup!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalAttack2-Text-1", "Wildlife INCOMING!")

Rows.Name: AnimalAttack3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalAttack3-Text-0", "Those things are NOT happy!")

Rows.Name: AnimalAttack4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalAttack4-Text-0", "Oh man, that\'s some ANGRY wildlife.")

Rows.Name: AnimalAttack5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalAttack5-Text-0", "If you\'re wondering whether that thing\'s friendly, it AIN\'T.")

Rows.Name: AnimalAttack6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalAttack6-Text-0", "Those things AIN\'T friendly.")

Rows.Name: AnimalDead1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalDead1-Text-0", "I think that\'s it, what a fight.")

Rows.Name: AnimalDead2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalDead2-Text-0", "Any more of \'em? ... Good, you did it.")

Rows.Name: AnimalDead3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalDead3-Text-0", "I think ... they\'re all dead.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalDead3-Text-1", "Or at least gone.")

Rows.Name: AnimalDead4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalDead4-Text-0", "That\'s the last one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalDead4-Text-1", "Good kill.")

Rows.Name: AnimalDead5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalDead5-Text-0", "Whew, that was brutal.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric1-Text-0", "Okay, that\'s what we\'re looking for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric1-Text-1", "Good find.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric2-Text-0", "I\'d say you found it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric2-Text-1", "You\'re getting good at this.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric3-Text-0", "That\'s what you\'re looking for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric3-Text-1", "No question.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric4-Text-0", "If that ain\'t what you\'re hunting for, there\'s even more wrong with this planet than I thought.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric5-Text-0", "That\'s it, gotta be what we\'re looking for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric5-Text-1", "Nice work.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric6-Text-0", "Here we go, you got this.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric7-Text-0", "There you are, done.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric8-Text-0", "Found it, cool.")

Rows.Name: AllItemsFound1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AllItemsFound1-Text-0", "Alright.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AllItemsFound1-Text-1", "That was the last one.")

Rows.Name: AllItemsFound2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AllItemsFound2-Text-0", "For my money, that\'s all of them")

Rows.Name: AllItemsFound3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AllItemsFound3-Text-0", "Right.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AllItemsFound3-Text-1", "I think you\'re good.")

Rows.Name: AllItemsFound4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AllItemsFound4-Text-0", "That\'s it, you got everything.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AllItemsFound4-Text-1", "That wasn\'t so hard, was it?")

Rows.Name: AllItemsFound5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AllItemsFound5-Text-0", "Okay, that\'s everything.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AllItemsFound5-Text-1", "You\'re good to go.")

Rows.Name: CombineGeneric1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CombineGeneric1-Text-0", "They want you to assemble those pieces.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CombineGeneric1-Text-1", "Put the thing together.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CombineGeneric1-Text-2", "I\'m sure you can figure it out.")

Rows.Name: CombineGeneric2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CombineGeneric2-Text-0", "Now you gotta put it together.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CombineGeneric2-Text-1", "Guess they forgot to include the manual.")

Rows.Name: CombineGeneric3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CombineGeneric3-Text-0", "Time to build it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CombineGeneric3-Text-1", "I figure you got this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CombineGeneric3-Text-2", "Cause ... you got no choice.")

Rows.Name: MoveToNextLocation1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation1-Text-0", "We ain\'t done here, though.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation1-Text-1", "Check your map for the next location.")

Rows.Name: MoveToNextLocation2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation2-Text-0", "But there\'s more to do.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation2-Text-1", "Check your map for the next zone.")

Rows.Name: MoveToNextLocation3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation3-Text-0", "Keep it up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation3-Text-1", "There\'s another marker on your map.")

Rows.Name: MoveToNextLocation4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation4-Text-0", "You\'re doing good, time to move on.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation4-Text-1", "Next marker should be on your map.")

Rows.Name: MoveToNextLocation5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation5-Text-0", "Keep movin.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation5-Text-1", "Next step\'s marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: MoveToNextLocation6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation6-Text-0", "Okay, time to move out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation6-Text-1", "There\'s another zone marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: MoveToNextLocation7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation7-Text-0", "But don\'t stop now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MoveToNextLocation7-Text-1", "There\'s another marker on your map.")

Rows.Name: LocationReached1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached1-Text-0", "This is the zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached1-Text-1", "It\'s around here somewhere.")

Rows.Name: LocationReached2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached2-Text-0", "Data says this is the area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached2-Text-1", "Now it\'s up to you.")

Rows.Name: LocationReached3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached3-Text-0", "You made it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached3-Text-1", "Now you\'re gonna need to search the area.")

Rows.Name: LocationReached4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached4-Text-0", "This is as precise as the data gets.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached4-Text-1", "See what you can find.")

Rows.Name: LocationReached5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached5-Text-0", "You made it to the area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached5-Text-1", "Get searchin\'.")

Rows.Name: LocationReached6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached6-Text-0", "This is the place.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached6-Text-1", "You know what to do.")

Rows.Name: LocationReached7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached7-Text-0", "Well, here we are.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LocationReached7-Text-1", "You know what to do?")

Rows.Name: DevicePaused1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused1-Text-0", "Something happened")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused1-Text-1", "You\'re gonna need to reactivate that thing.")

Rows.Name: DevicePaused2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused2-Text-0", "There\'s a problem.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused2-Text-1", "Start the unit back up or this is goin\' nowhere.")

Rows.Name: DevicePaused3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused3-Text-0", "You lost power.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused3-Text-1", "You\'ll need to turn it on again.")

Rows.Name: DevicePaused4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused4-Text-0", "Looks like the unit stopped.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused4-Text-1", "Get it back online, or you\'re gonna be here for a while.")

Rows.Name: DevicePaused5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused5-Text-0", "There\'s a problem with the machine.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DevicePaused5-Text-1", "Can you fire it back up?")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete1-Text-0", "Well, you\'re done here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete1-Text-1", "You did a lot more than just survive.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete2-Text-0", "Okay, that\'s it - you did it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete2-Text-1", "Icarus is a wild place, but it ain\'t got nothin\' on you.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete3-Text-0", "Alright, that\'s everything.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete3-Text-1", "You did it, and lived to tell the tale.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete3-Text-2", "Which is more than a lot of folk can say.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete3-Text-3", "Cause they\'re dead.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete4-Text-0", "Good work down there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete4-Text-1", "I\'d say you\'re done.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete5-Text-0", "Well friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete5-Text-1", "You done down there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete5-Text-2", "Sure looks like it from here.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete6-Text-0", "It\'s over - you did what you came to do.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete7-Text-0", "Time to wind up, you done everything they asked.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete8-Text-0", "Very good - I\'d say were finished here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete8-Text-1", "And you\'re still breathin\'.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete8-Text-2", "That\'s a win.")

Rows.Name: ReturnItemsToDropship1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnItemsToDropship1-Text-0", "Now get that stuff back to the Dropship.")

Rows.Name: ReturnItemsToDropship2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnItemsToDropship2-Text-0", "All you gotta do now, is get that stuff back to orbit.")

Rows.Name: ReturnItemsToDropship3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnItemsToDropship3-Text-0", "Just get it all back to the dropship, and don\'t talk to strangers.")

Rows.Name: ReturnItemsToDropship4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnItemsToDropship4-Text-0", "As long as nothing happens to that stuff between here and the dropship, I\'d say you\'re good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnItemsToDropship4-Text-1", "So I won\'t.")

Rows.Name: ReturnItemsToDropship5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnItemsToDropship5-Text-0", "If you can return that stuff to the dropship, you\'re golden.")

Rows.Name: ReturnToDropship1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnToDropship1-Text-0", "So head back to dropship whenever you\'re ready.")

Rows.Name: ReturnToDropship2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnToDropship2-Text-0", "Dropship\'s waiting, and ready when you are.")

Rows.Name: ReturnToDropship3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnToDropship3-Text-0", "You\'re good to head back to orbit.")

Rows.Name: ReturnToDropship4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnToDropship4-Text-0", "You got a little time left, so head back to the dropship when you\'re ready.")

Rows.Name: ReturnToDropship5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ReturnToDropship5-Text-0", "Time to head back to the dropship.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation1-Text-0", "Okay, that should do it.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation2-Text-0", "You did it!")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation3-Text-0", "I gotta admit, I\'m impressed.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation4-Text-0", "You\'re really getting the hang of this.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation5-Text-0", "I think we\'re good.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation6-Text-0", "Nice work, friend.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation7-Text-0", "That\'s what I\'m talking about.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation8-Text-0", "Love your work.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation9-Text-0", "Ha! Like a pro.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation10-Text-0", "That\'s the one.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation11-Text-0", "Yep, no question.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation12-Text-0", "Helllll yeah.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation13-Text-0", "Yeaaah!")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation14-Text-0", "HAHaaa.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation15-Text-0", "You got this.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation16-Text-0", "Bring it ON.")

Rows.Name: PositiveAffirmation17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PositiveAffirmation17-Text-0", "You\'re all over this.")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation1-Text-0", "Uh-oh.")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation2-Text-0", "Well, that\'s not good.")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation3-Text-0", "Trouble\'s comin\'")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation4-Text-0", "That\'s not a good thing.")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation5-Text-0", "I don\'t see this workin\' out well.")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation6-Text-0", "Oh god.")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation7-Text-0", "Here we go.")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation8-Text-0", "Oh deaaar.")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation9-Text-0", "I don\'t like this.")

Rows.Name: NegativeExclamation10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation10-Text-0", "You okay with this?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NegativeExclamation10-Text-1", "Cause I got questions.")

Rows.Name: ExoticsAddOn1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExoticsAddOn1-Text-0", "Could be exotics in the area, too, just sayin.")

Rows.Name: ExoticsAddOn2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExoticsAddOn2-Text-0", "Looks like exotics country to me, if you were wonderin\'.")

Rows.Name: ExoticsAddOn3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExoticsAddOn3-Text-0", "Bringin\' back some exotics couldn\'t hurt.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExoticsAddOn3-Text-1", "Somethin\' to keep in mind.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aSkyClearing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aSkyClearing-Text-0", "It\'s clearing!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aSkyClearing-Text-1", "How about that.")

Rows.Name: Expedition2aDeviceOff
