Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceOff-Text-0", "It\'s finished doin ... whatever it did.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceOff-Text-1", "Did it work?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceOff-Text-2", "They said it could be a few minutes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition2aDeviceOff-Text-3", "I guess we\'ll wait and see ...")

Rows.Name: FTUE_Bandages
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FTUE_Bandages-Text-0", "You get hurt, bandages should help out some.")

Rows.Name: FTUE_Weather
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FTUE_Weather-Text-0", "Comes a lot worse than showers on Icarus")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FTUE_Weather-Text-1", "Real storm\'s are bad news if ya ain\'t got a roof over ya head.")

Rows.Name: ExpeditionFetchBattery
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExpeditionFetchBattery-Text-0", "You\'re gonna need power for the rig, too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExpeditionFetchBattery-Text-1", "Lagos dropped a battery unit near here, and marked it on your map.")

Rows.Name: Research2aPoisoned
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Research2aPoisoned-Text-0", "Uh-oh.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Research2aPoisoned-Text-1", "Looks like those are ... poisonous.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Research2aPoisoned-Text-2", "You wanna be careful there.")

Rows.Name: Expedition3CompleteFaction
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3CompleteFaction-Text-0", "It\'s a big first step out here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3CompleteFaction-Text-1", "And Lagos is gonna love ya for it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition3CompleteFaction-Text-2", "You\'re opening up the map, and if you weren\'t already, you\'re sure as hell on theirs now.")

Rows.Name: Expedition4aDeviceNeedsPower2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Expedition4aDeviceNeedsPower2-Text-0", "You\'re gonna need power for that thing.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aLocationReached1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aLocationReached1-Text-0", "Well, this is where they want the GPR.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aLocationReached1-Text-1", "But ... up there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aLocationReached1-Text-2", "So you need to get ... high.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aLocationReached1-Text-3", "Grab the station from the supply crate. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aLocationReached1-Text-4", "And build stong.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aLocationReached2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aLocationReached2-Text-0", "This is the zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aLocationReached2-Text-1", "Grab a GPR and get buildin\'")

Rows.Name: Survey2aLocationReached3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aLocationReached3-Text-0", "This is the spot, and the GPR\'s nearby.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aLocationReached3-Text-1", "But it\'ll need a platform.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aRadarCollected
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarCollected-Text-0", "These GPR stations link up to record subterranean geographic data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarCollected-Text-1", "Without them, we\'re searchin\' for exotics blind.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarCollected-Text-2", "But they\'re tricky little things - can\'t set up them up just anywhere.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarCollected-Text-3", "They need line of sight to connect, so you gotta raise \'em up.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aDeployedWrong
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aDeployedWrong-Text-0", "You\'re not high enough yet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aDeployedWrong-Text-1", "You\'ll need to build up more.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aDeployedCorrect1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aDeployedCorrect1-Text-0", "Looking good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aDeployedCorrect1-Text-1", "Station\'s in place.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aDeployedCorrect2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aDeployedCorrect2-Text-0", "That\'s it, station\'s up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aDeployedCorrect2-Text-1", "You\'re doin\' good.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aDeployedCorrect3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aDeployedCorrect3-Text-0", "That one\'s done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aDeployedCorrect3-Text-1", "GPR ready, excellent.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aRadarActivated1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarActivated1-Text-0", "GPR activated.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarActivated1-Text-1", "Signal looks solid.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aRadarActivated2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarActivated2-Text-0", "Station\'s on.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarActivated2-Text-1", "Connection\'s good.")

Rows.Name: Survey2aRadarActivated3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarActivated3-Text-0", "That\'s it - we got a signal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Survey2aRadarActivated3-Text-1", "GPR connected.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete9-Text-0", "You cooked it, friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete9-Text-1", "All in a day\'s work.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete10-Text-0", "That\'s it, partner.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete10-Text-1", "You\'re finished here - for now, at least.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete11-Text-0", "Anything else?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete11-Text-1", "Nope, I reckon this one\'s just about over.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete12-Text-0", "Mission accomplished.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete12-Text-1", "Hehe - anyone still say that?")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete13-Text-0", "All done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete13-Text-1", "You sorted this, and it wasn\'t simple.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete14-Text-0", "This wasn\'t an easy one, but you did it.")

Rows.Name: MissionComplete15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete15-Text-0", "Well, put a bow on it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionComplete15-Text-1", "Cause you\'re done here.")

Rows.Name: ResearchWaitTillNight1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchWaitTillNight1-Text-0", "If it\'s a nightbloom, could be you gotta wait till nightfall.")

Rows.Name: ResearchWaitTillNight2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchWaitTillNight2-Text-0", "They\'re lookin\' for a plant and they want flowering samples.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchWaitTillNight2-Text-1", "But some Icarus natives, I mean REAL native plants, only flower at night.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchWaitTillNight2-Text-2", "So you\'re gonna have to wait for nightfall.")

Rows.Name: Extraction2aOptionalObjective
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Extraction2aOptionalObjective-Text-0", "One last thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Extraction2aOptionalObjective-Text-1", "Could be worth searching the area for more exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Extraction2aOptionalObjective-Text-2", "Theory is, they tend to cluster.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Extraction2aOptionalObjective-Text-3", "It\'s up to you.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryLostTeamItemBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLostTeamItemBriefing-Text-0", "They lost a team recently, and need someone to find out what happened to \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLostTeamItemBriefing-Text-1", "Want you to track \'em down and recover what you can.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLostTeamItemBriefing-Text-2", "Think you can do better than they did?")

Rows.Name: RecoveryLostTeamBodiesBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLostTeamBodiesBriefing-Text-0", "They lost a team recently, including some Sao Paolo rich kid.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLostTeamBodiesBriefing-Text-1", "We\'re talkin\' stupid money.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLostTeamBodiesBriefing-Text-2", "Parents are big players, and they\'ll pay anything to get her body back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLostTeamBodiesBriefing-Text-3", "You down for a corpse run?")

Rows.Name: RecoveryBodiesLandingItems
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingItems-Text-0", "Apparently, their team hit an exotics load, but something happened.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingItems-Text-1", "They want you to find them, figure out what went wrong, and of course, get the exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingItems-Text-2", "See what you can do.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingItems-Text-3", "Last position\'s marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryBodiesLandingBodies
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingBodies-Text-0", "The missing woman\'s one of the leadership\'s kids.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingBodies-Text-1", "Didn\'t get on too well, I gather.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingBodies-Text-2", "They wanna make amends, give her a proper funeral.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingBodies-Text-3", "Don\'t even ask me how much that\'s gonna cost.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingBodies-Text-4", "Sometimes, it doesn\'t matter, I guess.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodiesLandingBodies-Text-5", "Last known\'s marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryExoticsFound
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryExoticsFound-Text-0", "That\'s it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryExoticsFound-Text-1", "They sure hit a good vein.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryBodyFound
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodyFound-Text-0", "Well, you found her.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodyFound-Text-1", "Now, you gotta carry her back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodyFound-Text-2", "God.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodyFound-Text-3", "You couldn\'t make this up.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryBodyComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodyComplete-Text-0", "Well, you did it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodyComplete-Text-1", "Pretty morbid, frankly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodyComplete-Text-2", "But her parents are gonna be relieved.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBodyComplete-Text-3", "And that\'s somethin\'")

Rows.Name: RecoverySEBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEBriefing-Text-0", "They\'re getting ambitious, but they\'re making mistakes, too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEBriefing-Text-1", "Dropped gear for some kinda experiment and the weather tossed \'em halfway to Minos.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEBriefing-Text-2", "They want you to head down, find the drops, then bring \'em to the zone they were supposed to be testing in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEBriefing-Text-3", "You\'ll need scanning gear to find the crash sites, and who knows what else.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEBriefing-Text-4", "But hey, you\'re adaptable, ain\'t ya.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySELanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySELanding-Text-0", "But they made a mess this time.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySELanding-Text-1", "You needa scan to find the crash sites.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySELanding-Text-2", "Get the gear from each of \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySELanding-Text-3", "Then bring it to the test location, and fire it up.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryFailScan
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryFailScan-Text-0", "Nothing there, hombre.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryScanArc
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryScanArc-Text-0", "Looks like a signal, but you need to get closer.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySESuccessfulScan1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySESuccessfulScan1-Text-0", "Looks like you found one.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySESuccessfulScan2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySESuccessfulScan2-Text-0", "Okay, that\'s a site.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySEInteractPod1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEInteractPod1-Text-0", "That thing ain\'t gonna open up without power, hombre.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySEInteractPod2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEInteractPod2-Text-0", "Same story - it\'ll need juice if you want to open it up.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySEConfession
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEConfession-Text-0", "Look, I haven\'t been totally straight with you on this one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEConfession-Text-1", "They wanted to be sure the gear was intact.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEConfession-Text-2", "It\'s a key of sorts - crypto intrusion gear designed to break into heavily protected systems.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEConfession-Text-3", "That site marked on your map, it\'s an ACS drop point.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEConfession-Text-4", "They want you to use the device to open up the ACS drop pod, retrieve the contents, and bring it back for them.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySEDeviceReady1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEDeviceReady1-Text-0", "All you gotta do is turn it on, wait, and let the magic happen.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySEDeviceReady2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEDeviceReady2-Text-0", "Apparently you gotta run the device a few times to undo the security on the pod.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySEUseDeviceAgain
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEUseDeviceAgain-Text-0", "Run it again, this thing\'s got full ACS encryption.")

Rows.Name: RecoverySEGotItem
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEGotItem-Text-0", "There it is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEGotItem-Text-1", "Experimental ACS exotics tech, by the look of it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoverySEGotItem-Text-2", "See why they wanted it.")

Rows.Name: UpdatedContract
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UpdatedContract-Text-0", "So.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UpdatedContract-Text-1", "They\'ve updated the contract.")

Rows.Name: AfterCombiningCollectedItems
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AfterCombiningCollectedItems-Text-0", "Okay, let\'s put that thing to some use.")

Rows.Name: AfterRetrievingItem
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AfterRetrievingItem-Text-0", "Now you got it, how about finishing the job?")

Rows.Name: StockPileLanding1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileLanding1-Text-0", "All you gotta do now, is get that stuff back to orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileLanding1-Text-1", "They\'ve dropped units at points marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileLanding1-Text-2", "Should be easy enough, if this weren\'t Icarus.")

Rows.Name: DeliveryItemTemperatureDependent
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryItemTemperatureDependent-Text-0", "Ground team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryItemTemperatureDependent-Text-1", "This is Group 15.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryItemTemperatureDependent-Text-2", "Generally, we do not intercede with Contractors, but this mission is of extreme importance.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryItemTemperatureDependent-Text-3", "New enzyme terraforming technology could change the face of Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryItemTemperatureDependent-Text-4", "But the substance is highly unstable.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryItemTemperatureDependent-Text-5", "If the item does deteriorate, retrieve another.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryItemTemperatureDependent-Text-6", "Success is imperative.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryItemTemperatureDependent-Text-7", "Group 15, out.")

Rows.Name: DeliveryFail
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryFail-Text-0", "Ground team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryFail-Text-1", "If the item has degraded completely, return to the crash site for another.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryFail-Text-2", "Group 15, out.")

Rows.Name: DeliveryMissionSuccessful
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryMissionSuccessful-Text-0", "Ground team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryMissionSuccessful-Text-1", "Excellent work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryMissionSuccessful-Text-2", "The results of this mission have far-reaching implications.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryMissionSuccessful-Text-3", "The future of this planet - and possibly our species - lies in the balance.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryMissionSuccessful-Text-4", "That is all we can tell you at this moment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryMissionSuccessful-Text-5", "We trust your discretion, and that Group 15 will be able to call on you again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeliveryMissionSuccessful-Text-6", "Group 15, out.")

Rows.Name: OutOfBounds
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OutOfBounds-Text-0", "Looks like you\'re straying outta the mission zone there, friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OutOfBounds-Text-1", "Lagos Group didn\'t okay that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OutOfBounds-Text-2", "You\'ll need to head back.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefing1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing1-Text-0", "They need an assist on the surface.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing1-Text-1", "Someone who knows what they\'re doing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing1-Text-2", "Sound like you?")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefing2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing2-Text-0", "Things are moving fast, and they\'re low on experienced personnel.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing2-Text-1", "So they\'re looking for a hand, and paying good ren.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing2-Text-2", "If you\'re available.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefing3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing3-Text-0", "If you\'re looking for some quick cash, this could be the one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing3-Text-1", "Looks simple enough, but then again, it always does.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing3-Text-2", "You should know how to pick \'em by now.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefing4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing4-Text-0", "Things haven\'t been running smoothly down there for \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing4-Text-1", "They been losing teams, equipment and resources.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing4-Text-2", "So they\'re looking to outsource.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing4-Text-3", "Someone with a proven record.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing4-Text-4", "Cause this one\'s gonna get wild.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefing5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing5-Text-0", "They been losing people on the surface.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing5-Text-1", "So they wanna bring in some heavy hitters.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing5-Text-2", "Folk they know can deliver.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing5-Text-3", "You down for this one?")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefing6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing6-Text-0", "Whatever you heard, there\'s more to the story.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing6-Text-1", "They\'re pushing hard down there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing6-Text-2", "But Icarus\'s been pushing back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing6-Text-3", "They\'re looking for a force multiplier.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefing6-Text-4", "Think you can do that?")

Rows.Name: GenericLanding0
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding0-Text-0", "It ain\'t gonna be the easiest mission.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding0-Text-1", "But then again, this ain\'t your first day on the job.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding0-Text-2", "I told \'em you got this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding0-Text-3", "So ... check your objectives ... and try and make me look good, okay.")

Rows.Name: GenericLanding2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding2-Text-0", "And right now, they got one thing on their mind.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding2-Text-1", "Cause without this, their plans are screwed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding2-Text-2", "Mission data\'s on your HUD.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding2-Text-3", "Let\'s get it done.")

Rows.Name: GenericLanding3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding3-Text-0", "Icarus ain\'t gonna make this one easy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding3-Text-1", "But until this get sorted, they got a problem.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding3-Text-2", "So check your objectives, sort your gear, and get started, cause you\'re on the clock.")

Rows.Name: GenericLanding4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding4-Text-0", "They\'re payin\' the contract, but the clock - that belongs to Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding4-Text-1", "So check your objectives, and get going, \'cause they\'ll be spinning their wheels till you do.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding4-Text-2", "Stay safe, friend.")

Rows.Name: GenericLanding5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding5-Text-0", "There\'s a lot ridin\' on this one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding5-Text-1", "And they know it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding5-Text-2", "They sent the objectives through already.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding5-Text-3", "So get to the zone as soon as you can.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding5-Text-4", "And hope you got better luck than their last crew.")

Rows.Name: GenericLanding6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding6-Text-0", "Last crew they sent down didn\'t fare so well.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding6-Text-1", "But they didn\'t have your track record.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding6-Text-2", "So check your hud for objectives, and get into it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding6-Text-3", "Odds are on you, but this is still Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLanding6-Text-4", "If you know what I\'m sayin\'.")

Rows.Name: StockPileBriefing1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing1-Text-0", "They wanna bring in a heap of new people.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing1-Text-1", "But till they got the facilities in orbit to hold \'em, it\'s just a dream.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing1-Text-2", "So they need a pile \'a resources from the surface, and think you\'re the one to help.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing1-Text-3", "Are they wrong?")

Rows.Name: StockPileBriefing2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing2-Text-0", "They\'re buildin\' a new station up here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing2-Text-1", "And need raw materials asap.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing2-Text-2", "You able to oblige?")

Rows.Name: StockPileBriefing3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing3-Text-0", "They\'re planning to expand one of the old terraforming stations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing3-Text-1", "If they can get the raw material up from the surface.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing3-Text-2", "That\'s where you come in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockPileBriefing3-Text-3", "Easy money for someone who knows what they\'re doin\'")

Rows.Name: StockpileLanding0
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding0-Text-0", "They\'re boosting their orbital infrastructure in a big way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding0-Text-1", "But that\'s the easy part.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding0-Text-2", "Getting the raw materials off this planet, that\'s the killer.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding0-Text-3", "Luckily, they got you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding0-Text-4", "So check your HUD, and get started, cause till you do, these guys ... well ... they\'re searchin\' for a paddle, if you get my drift.")

Rows.Name: StockpileLanding2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding2-Text-0", "They\'re buildin\' new facilities in orbit, and need help on the ground.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding2-Text-1", "Someone who can source raw materials, process \'em, and get em up to space in one piece.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding2-Text-2", "Without getting dead.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding2-Text-3", "Sure sounds like you - so check your HUD and roll out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding2-Text-4", "Good luck.")

Rows.Name: StockpileLanding3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding3-Text-0", "Icarus is one big treasure chest, if you can stay alive long enough to get your hands on it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding3-Text-1", "These guys want a new space station - but their crews have been getting eaten by bears, and pasted by storms and who knows what else.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding3-Text-2", "I\'m sure you can do better ... Probably")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StockpileLanding3-Text-3", "Check your objectives, and head out.")

Rows.Name: SurveyGenericBriefing1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericBriefing1-Text-0", "They got some big decisions to make, and need data from the surface.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericBriefing1-Text-1", "They\'re paying good ren for it, too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericBriefing1-Text-2", "Knowledge is power and all that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericBriefing1-Text-3", "Even out here.")

Rows.Name: SurveyGenericBriefing2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericBriefing2-Text-0", "They\'re looking for data, survey info on a specific area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericBriefing2-Text-1", "I guess they think there\'s exotics down there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericBriefing2-Text-2", "Which gives you at least two good reasons to take this one.")

Rows.Name: SurveyGenericLanding1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericLanding1-Text-0", "They want data, and you can be sure exotics are involed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericLanding1-Text-1", "So check your HUD, and get going.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericLanding1-Text-2", "But keep in mind - they think it\'s exotics country, but all they\'re asking for is data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericLanding1-Text-3", "Just sayin\'.")

Rows.Name: SurveyGenericLanding2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericLanding2-Text-0", "They need data - doesn\'t weigh a thing, but getting it can be ... killer.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyGenericLanding2-Text-1", "So check your HUD and move out, cause time ain\'t your friend down here.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationBriefingSpare4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare4-Text-0", "They got an animal control issue down there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare4-Text-1", "And you got a reputation for solving that kinda problem.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationBriefingSpare4-Text-2", "It\'s your call.")

Rows.Name: ExterminationLandingSpare4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare4-Text-0", "Icarus\'s wildlife has been frustrating their plans.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare4-Text-1", "\'Til someone can take out the creature in question, their people are refusing to set foot in the region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare4-Text-2", "So find whatever\'s been causing problems, and put a few holes in it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ExterminationLandingSpare4-Text-3", "If you wouldn\'t mind.")

Rows.Name: ResearchBriefingGeneric1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefingGeneric1-Text-0", "They got an interest in the region - reports of unusual specimens emerging, hmm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefingGeneric1-Text-1", "Basically, Icarus is doin\' something weird, and they wanna know more.")

Rows.Name: ResearchBriefingGeneric2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefingGeneric2-Text-0", "Their sats have spotted somethin\' strange on the surface.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefingGeneric2-Text-1", "They got no idea what it is and need someone to find out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefingGeneric2-Text-2", "Ideally, bring a sample back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchBriefingGeneric2-Text-3", "If you\'re up for it.")

Rows.Name: ResearchLandingGeneric1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLandingGeneric1-Text-0", "They\'re pretty sure Icarus ain\'t given up all its secrets yet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLandingGeneric1-Text-1", "Not by a long shot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLandingGeneric1-Text-2", "Whatever\'s growing in the target zone, it\'s got \'em excited.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLandingGeneric1-Text-3", "So check your HUD, and get movin.")

Rows.Name: ResearchLandingGeneric2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLandingGeneric2-Text-0", "They\'ve got intel pointing to something unusual emerging in the region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLandingGeneric2-Text-1", "There\'s a lot we don\'t know about Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLandingGeneric2-Text-2", "But there\'s a premium on anything that could shed light on exotics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchLandingGeneric2-Text-3", "So check your HUD and see if you can find this thing.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryBriefingGeneric1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingGeneric1-Text-0", "They\'re playing it quiet, but their sats have shown up a crashed Sinotai unit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingGeneric1-Text-1", "Whatever\'s inside\'s got \'em excited.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingGeneric1-Text-2", "It\'s a prize for whoever gets there first.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingGeneric1-Text-3", "Think it\'s you?")

Rows.Name: RecoveryBriefingGeneric2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingGeneric2-Text-0", "Weather down there\'s crashed another supply pod,")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingGeneric2-Text-1", "And no-one\'s claimed it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryBriefingGeneric2-Text-2", "Salvage law\'s good, even out here.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryLandingGeneric1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric1-Text-0", "They spotted a downed Sinotai transport.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric1-Text-1", "They\'re gambling on there being top shelf tech inside.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric1-Text-2", "So the contract\'s simple.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric1-Text-3", "Get it before anyone else does, then bring it back to orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric1-Text-4", "Whatever they do when Sinotai finds out, well, that\'s their problem.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric1-Text-5", "So check your HUD, and head out.")

Rows.Name: RecoveryLandingGeneric2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric2-Text-0", "No-one\'s claimed the crash, which can only mean one thing ...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric2-Text-1", "Whatever went down wasn\'t supposed to be there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric2-Text-2", "Which makes it valuable to almost everyone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric2-Text-3", "Check your HUD, and get started.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RecoveryLandingGeneric2-Text-4", "Cause it ain\'t gonna be there long.")

Rows.Name: SpecialGenericBriefing1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericBriefing1-Text-0", "This is a big one, but it ain\'t gonna be easy.")

Rows.Name: SpecialGenericBriefing2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericBriefing2-Text-0", "I dunno if you\'re ready for this one, but they sure as hell need someone to give it a shot.")

Rows.Name: SpecialGenericBriefing3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericBriefing3-Text-0", "This mission\'s ... a little different, but if you\'re up for it, the money\'s good.")

Rows.Name: SpecialGenericLanding1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericLanding1-Text-0", "They\'re asking a lot of ya.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericLanding1-Text-1", "So stay sharp - cause it could get wild.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericLanding1-Text-2", "Your HUD should have all the info you need.")

Rows.Name: SpecialGenericLanding2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericLanding2-Text-0", "Ain\'t no-one said it\'s gonna be easy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericLanding2-Text-1", "But if anyone can handle this, it\'s you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericLanding2-Text-2", "Check your HUD, and stay safe.")

Rows.Name: SpecialGenericLanding3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericLanding3-Text-0", "Even by Icarus standards, this one\'s a challenge.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericLanding3-Text-1", "So make sure you\'re prepared, and don\'t do anything crazy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SpecialGenericLanding3-Text-2", "Check your HUD, and good luck.")

Rows.Name: UnlockNewRecipe
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UnlockNewRecipe-Text-0", "Could be that stuff\'s useful later.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UnlockNewRecipe-Text-1", "Basically, might be able to make some stuff with it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "UnlockNewRecipe-Text-2", "With new discoveries come new designs, recipes and ideas.")

Rows.Name: ResearchWaitTillNight3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchWaitTillNight3-Text-0", "They\'re looking for a plant, and they want flowering samples.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchWaitTillNight3-Text-1", "But some Icarus natives - I mean REAL native plants - only flower at night.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchWaitTillNight3-Text-2", "So you\'re gonna have to wait for nightfall.")

Rows.Name: ResearchMineVoxel
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchMineVoxel-Text-0", "According to intel, folk have been finding strange formations inside ore from Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchMineVoxel-Text-1", "People upstairs want samples, fast.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchMineVoxel-Text-2", "But first you gotta find \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchMineVoxel-Text-3", "Shouldn\'t be too hard.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchMineVoxel-Text-4", "Look for ... weird rocks.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric9-Text-0", "That\'s it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric9-Text-1", "Hmm, amazing.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric10-Text-0", "There we go.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric10-Text-1", "They\'re gonna love that.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric11-Text-0", "One thing Icarus does better than anywhere else.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric11-Text-1", "Weird shit.")

Rows.Name: ItemFoundGeneric12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric12-Text-0", "That\'s what they\'re after.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ItemFoundGeneric12-Text-1", "No question.")

Rows.Name: ResearchAllItemsFound
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchAllItemsFound-Text-0", "That\'s it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchAllItemsFound-Text-1", "You got everything.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchAllItemsFound-Text-2", "Now just get it to the cargo pod, and you\'re good.")

Rows.Name: ResearchEndMission
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchEndMission-Text-0", "This planet never ceases to amaze me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchEndMission-Text-1", "We\'re only just beginning to understand it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchEndMission-Text-2", "But one thing\'s real clear.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ResearchEndMission-Text-3", "We\'ve got a long way to go.")

Rows.Name: SurveyBriefing3b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing3b-Text-0", "They\'re interested in Icarus\' waterways.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing3b-Text-1", "New lifeforms finding their way into the terrazone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyBriefing3b-Text-2", "Time to go fishing, friend.")

Rows.Name: SurveyLanding3b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3b-Text-0", "One of their advance teams reported new marine organisms in the region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3b-Text-1", "Something we definitely didn\'t bring here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3b-Text-2", "They want you to get water samples, for starters, and see what else you can find.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3b-Text-3", "Because Icarus is changing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3b-Text-4", "They\'ve landed bio-sampling equipment nearby.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyLanding3b-Text-5", "Check your map, grab the gear, then head out to the survey zones.")

Rows.Name: SurveyReachLocation1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyReachLocation1-Text-0", "This is the zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyReachLocation1-Text-1", "Set up the scanner in the water.")

Rows.Name: SurveyReachLocation2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyReachLocation2-Text-0", "Okay, you made it to the sample zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyReachLocation2-Text-1", "Get that station into the water.")

Rows.Name: SurveyReachLocation3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyReachLocation3-Text-0", "This is the zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyReachLocation3-Text-1", "You know what to do.")

Rows.Name: SurveyCraftSampleCollector
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyCraftSampleCollector-Text-0", "You\'ll have make your own sample collector, and add it to the unit.")

Rows.Name: SurveyDeviceActivatedNoSample
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyDeviceActivatedNoSample-Text-0", "Gotta add a collector, before you turn it on.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyDeviceActivatedNoSample-Text-1", "If you ain\'t got one, you\'re gonna have to make it.")

Rows.Name: SurveyDeviceDeployedWater1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyDeviceDeployedWater1-Text-0", "Station\'s active, good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyDeviceDeployedWater1-Text-1", "Stay close.")

Rows.Name: SurveyDeviceDeployedWater2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyDeviceDeployedWater2-Text-0", "Okay, station\'s running.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyDeviceDeployedWater2-Text-1", "Let it do its thing.")

Rows.Name: SurveyDeviceDeployedWater3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyDeviceDeployedWater3-Text-0", "Station\'s up and sampling.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyDeviceDeployedWater3-Text-1", "But you\'ll need to keep an eye on it.")

Rows.Name: AnimalWarning1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalWarning1-Text-0", "Watch out for wildlife.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalWarning1-Text-1", "Our tech tends to aggravate those little guys.")

Rows.Name: AnimalWarning2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalWarning2-Text-0", "You\'ll need to stay on your toes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalWarning2-Text-1", "Wildlife doesn\'t like this kinda thing.")

Rows.Name: AnimalWarning3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AnimalWarning3-Text-0", "Watch out for angry wildlife, friend.")

Rows.Name: SurveyWaterScanDone1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyWaterScanDone1-Text-0", "Scan\'s done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyWaterScanDone1-Text-1", "Grab the sample and pack up the bio-sampler.")

Rows.Name: SurveyWaterScanDone2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyWaterScanDone2-Text-0", "Scan\'s done")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyWaterScanDone2-Text-1", "Should be a sample ready.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyWaterScanDone2-Text-2", "Grab the sampler too.")

Rows.Name: SurveyWaterScanDone3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyWaterScanDone3-Text-0", "Scan\'s good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyWaterScanDone3-Text-1", "Grab the sample.")

Rows.Name: SurveyFindFish
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFindFish-Text-0", "This is where the advance team reported new marine life.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFindFish-Text-1", "Be worth taking a look around, see if you can find one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFindFish-Text-2", "Something like that\'d bring in serious Ren.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFindFish-Text-3", "Maybe answer a few questions, too.")

Rows.Name: SurveyFishKilled
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFishKilled-Text-0", "You got it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFishKilled-Text-1", "Whatever it is.")

Rows.Name: SurveyFishHarvest
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFishHarvest-Text-0", "Weird fish thing, check.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFishHarvest-Text-1", "You don\'t have much time before that things rots.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFishHarvest-Text-2", "Won\'t be much use if it does.")

Rows.Name: GenericGetItemsToCargoPod1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericGetItemsToCargoPod1-Text-0", "Now you just gotta deliver it to the cargo pod.")

Rows.Name: GenericGetItemsToCargoPod2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericGetItemsToCargoPod2-Text-0", "Get the stuff to the cargo pod.")

Rows.Name: SurveyFishMissionComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFishMissionComplete-Text-0", "There\'s answers there, if they can find \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFishMissionComplete-Text-1", "I\'d say you\'re doin\' your part.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFishMissionComplete-Text-2", "Plenty of mysteries still waiting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SurveyFishMissionComplete-Text-3", "This planet\'s only gettin\' started.")

Rows.Name: DesertExtermination2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DesertExtermination2-Text-0", "It\'s down! Phew, that was brutal!")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroBriefing-Text-0", "Word has it that the Largos Chair has declared this area safe for prospecting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroBriefing-Text-1", "Seems... kinda odd, seeing as it\'s been tagged a red site since that incident with the ACS")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroBriefing-Text-2", "Just between us, I get the feeling that Largos is itching to expand the entire Icarus operation. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroBriefing-Text-3", "Can\'t think of anything else that would have them open this place back up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroBriefing-Text-4", "Anyway, the UDA need someone to survey new landing zones. Think you\'re up for it?")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLanding-Text-0", "Allllllright, your survey equipment was loaded onto your dropship, make sure to grab it. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLanding-Text-1", "Consider\'n you\'re first on site they\'ve tried to keep you away from the more risky areas. Allegedly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLanding-Text-2", "I\'d still be cautious if I were you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLanding-Text-3", "Never know what\'s lurking out there.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroCollectEquipmentA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroCollectEquipmentA-Text-0", "Don\'t forget your beacons, can\'t transmit the data without \'em.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroCollectEquipmentB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroCollectEquipmentB-Text-0", "Unless you have a real eye for geo-data... You\'re really gonna need those beacons. ")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroCollectEquipmentC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroCollectEquipmentC-Text-0", "Is this thing on? Beacons, find\'em In your pod.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroScoutLandingZones
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroScoutLandingZones-Text-0", "Okay, time to find some lovely spots for landin\' a dropship.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroScoutLandingZones-Text-1", "Oh. The UDA also requires you to clear the immediate area, did I... forget to mention that?")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLocation1KillCreature
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation1KillCreature-Text-0", "Looks like you\'re gettin\' a typical local welcome.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation1KillCreature-Text-1", "Take care of that would ya")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLocation1PlaceBeacon
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation1PlaceBeacon-Text-0", "Saw a prospector try to pet one of those once. Didn\'t take kindly to the attention.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation1PlaceBeacon-Text-1", "Now that that\'s outta the way, time to mark the spot.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLocation1Complete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation1Complete-Text-0", "Nicely done, not even a scratch. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation1Complete-Text-1", "On the beacon that is, can\'t say the same for you.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLocation2KillCreature
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation2KillCreature-Text-0", "They weren\'t kiddin\' when they said this place is dangerous.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation2KillCreature-Text-1", "I\'d keep clear of that jaw if I were you.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLocation2PlaceBeacon
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation2PlaceBeacon-Text-0", "Those things certainly weren\'t here last time")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation2PlaceBeacon-Text-1", "Huh, that\'s... interesting... It looks like someone\'s been through here recently.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLocation2Complete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation2Complete-Text-0", "Good work, let\'s move on before more crocs show up.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLocation3KillCreature
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation3KillCreature-Text-0", "You know, I can see why this place got shut down after all.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation3KillCreature-Text-1", "Get rid of that thing.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLocation3PlaceBeacon
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation3PlaceBeacon-Text-0", "Nice job, you\'re a natural at this stuff.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroLocation3Complete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroLocation3Complete-Text-0", "Excellent work Prospector, that\'s all we need from this spot.")

Rows.Name: StyxIntroMissionComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroMissionComplete-Text-0", "Great work, let\'s head back to the ship and get to safety")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroMissionComplete-Text-1", "You know, something about this place just gives me the creeps")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroMissionComplete-Text-2", "I know, I know.. it\'s safe now. but, still..")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxIntroMissionComplete-Text-3", "I\'ll be happier when you\'re back on your ship")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionBriefing-Text-0", "I\'ve got a big one for ya.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionBriefing-Text-1", "UDA needs a trail blazed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionBriefing-Text-2", "Preliminary data gives us only a rough idea where.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionBriefing-Text-3", "Interference means you\'ll need to triangulate the location from the ground. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionBriefing-Text-4", "Can thank the ACS mischief for that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionBriefing-Text-5", "There\'s nothing here that mentions the interference is dangerous to prospectors.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionBriefing-Text-6", "um... Still interested?")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLanding-Text-0", "As usual Lagos sent their own teams in. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLanding-Text-1", "And, as usual, we\'ve not heard back from \'em. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLanding-Text-2", "Not even a single blip from an active radar.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLanding-Text-3", "Our best guess is they never made it to the scanning sites. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLanding-Text-4", "Radar is in your dropship. Make sure to bring it along.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionCollectEquipmentA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCollectEquipmentA-Text-0", "Don\'t forget, Radar is in your dropship.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionCollectEquipmentB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCollectEquipmentB-Text-0", "Come on prospector. You\'ll need your radar. It\'s in your drop pod. ")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionCollectEquipmentC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCollectEquipmentC-Text-0", "It\'s free equipment prospector. You don\'t have to make it OR buy it. Radar in your dropship.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionLocation2IceStorm
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLocation2IceStorm-Text-0", "Aw hell. Storm\'s coming in and It\'s BAD.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLocation2IceStorm-Text-1", "Find somewhere to hole up.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionLocatedCave
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLocatedCave-Text-0", "Well, that\'s done it. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLocatedCave-Text-1", "Cave is marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLocatedCave-Text-2", "Too many caves on Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLocatedCave-Text-3", "Makes you wonder what made \'em")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionCaveBlocked
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCaveBlocked-Text-0", "This is the spot. Lagos wants this cleared.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCaveBlocked-Text-1", "Luckily the UDA had the foresight to provide a solution.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCaveBlocked-Text-2", "Explosives.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCaveBlocked-Text-3", "I\'m marking a supply drop on your map now.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionCollectExplosives
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCollectExplosives-Text-0", "Oh. Experimental Explosives.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCollectExplosives-Text-1", "Be careful.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCollectExplosives-Text-2", "Last batch from G15 were....   energetic")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionCollectExplosives-Text-3", "Um.. Recovery team found prospector 496 in three separate biomes. ")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionLongWay
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLongWay-Text-0", "Bad news from the UDA . As powerful as these explosives are...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLongWay-Text-1", "We need one on the other side to clear the blockage.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLongWay-Text-2", "Up for a scenic hike? a dangerous one?")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionStandBack
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionStandBack-Text-0", "Time to run prospector.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionComplete-Text-0", "Great work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionComplete-Text-1", "UDA will be running crews through here in no time. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionComplete-Text-2", "I\'m supposed to tell you ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionComplete-Text-3", "Report immediately to medical if showing these symptoms - ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionComplete-Text-4", "Loss of appetite, fatigue, fever, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionComplete-Text-5", "You\'re feeling okay, right?")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaA-Text-0", "We need you close to the scanner, prospector.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaB-Text-0", "Radar needs supervision, get closer.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaC-Text-0", "You\'re being paid to babysit that radar. You\'ll need to get in range.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaD
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaD-Text-0", "Get back in range of the scanner.")

Rows.Name: StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxBExpeditionLeavingScanningAreaE-Text-0", "Prospector, need you to get back to the radar.")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionBreifing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionBreifing-Text-0", "Just came down from on high. We\'re pushing through to... uh.. Redacted?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionBreifing-Text-1", "Well....  data on my personal map marks it as \"Dusty Barrens\"")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionBreifing-Text-2", "Sounds delightful. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionBreifing-Text-3", "Lagos wants someone to trek through to the site and scan the surrounding area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionBreifing-Text-4", "This is new terrain, buuut you\'re not the first someone to attempt this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionBreifing-Text-5", "You may be the first someone to survive it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionBreifing-Text-6", "Think that someone might be you?")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionLanding-Text-0", "UDA wants this done fast. It\'s on the work order and everything.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionLanding-Text-1", "I\'m guessing...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionLanding-Text-2", "Someone within the UDA doesn\'t want you poking around the oasis too much.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionLanding-Text-3", "Enjoy your search for redacted")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionLanding-Text-4", "Don\'t forget to grab your radar from the dropship.")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionCollectEquipmentA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionCollectEquipmentA-Text-0", "Prospector, are you forgetting something?")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionCollectEquipmentB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionCollectEquipmentB-Text-0", "Grab your radar. Or are you giving up?")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionCollectEquipmentC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionCollectEquipmentC-Text-0", "Radar\'s still back at your ship. ")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionFindOasis
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionFindOasis-Text-0", "We\'re looking for something nice for once! Kind of.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionFindOasis-Text-1", "An Oasis.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionFindOasis-Text-2", "Lagos wants a scan that covers this desert terrazone.")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionArriveLocation2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionArriveLocation2-Text-0", "Um... Up there. You\'ll need to build something for that.")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionScanOasis
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionScanOasis-Text-0", "Wow. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionScanOasis-Text-1", "This place would be beautiful. If it wasn\'t so deadly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionScanOasis-Text-2", "We were so damn close.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionScanOasis-Text-3", "Suppose this is more fun though.")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionFindCave
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionFindCave-Text-0", "This is the place.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionFindCave-Text-1", "Should take you through to the target zone.")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionFindBlockage
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionFindBlockage-Text-0", "Okay I\'m being told UDA has you sorted.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionFindBlockage-Text-1", "Target co-ordinates for gear pickup were added to your map.")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionCollectDrill
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionCollectDrill-Text-0", "Nice, a Drill like this will get through almost anything.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionCollectDrill-Text-1", "You\'re going to need to fuel it though")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionActivateDrill
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionActivateDrill-Text-0", "Good. Uh. Bad.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionActivateDrill-Text-1", "You\'ve got worms.")

Rows.Name: StyxCExpeditionMissionComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-0", "Well, would you look at that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-1", "My data feed no longer says redacted")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-2", "Actually, The work order just... vanished.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxCExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-3", "Don\'t worry, I\'ll make sure you get paid.")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionBriefing-Text-0", "Received a new work order. A big one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionBriefing-Text-1", "Some kinda geological formation has been spied from orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionBriefing-Text-2", "Powers that be want more information and to open up that slice of terrazone for development.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionBriefing-Text-3", "Something about it not being formed naturally... Not sure If I like the implications of that statement.....")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionBriefing-Text-4", "On top of that we\'ve had reports. Uh I\'m not sanctioned to share until you\'re on planet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionBriefing-Text-5", "Good pay, some risk.... Considerable risk.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionBriefing-Text-6", "You in?")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionLanding-Text-0", "Well, somethings screwing with the orbital scan. Again. We\'ll need to do this the hard way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionLanding-Text-1", "Did have an exploration team get\'n info for you.... Ah... This was their last communication:")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionLanding-Text-2", "[Screaming]")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionLanding-Text-3", "Sooooo You\'re going to need to grab the radar from your dropship. And get the heading yourself.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionLanding-Text-4", "You\'re not exactly wet behind the ears... But there\'s something out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionLanding-Text-5", "Try not to die. ")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionCollectEquipmentA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionCollectEquipmentA-Text-0", "Remember, there\'s a Scanner in your dropship.")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionCollectEquipmentB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionCollectEquipmentB-Text-0", "You\'re not going to get anywhere without a radar. In ya dropship.")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionCollectEquipmentC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionCollectEquipmentC-Text-0", "I shouldn\'t have to remind you. Prospector, you\'ll need a radar. ")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionLocation1ScanComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionLocation1ScanComplete-Text-0", "You know....")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionLocation1ScanComplete-Text-1", "Terraforming flash froze a chunk of the terrazone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionLocation1ScanComplete-Text-2", "Hmmm Wonder what\'s buried under the ice.")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionFindLake
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionFindLake-Text-0", "Okay... got a general heading. Bots are confirming...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionFindLake-Text-1", "Marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionFoundWall
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionFoundWall-Text-0", "Of course it\'s blocked. Think this would be easy?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionFoundWall-Text-1", "After what the ACS did around here, I\'m surprised there are caves at all.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionFoundWall-Text-2", "Surprised there are mountains. ")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionCollectEquipment
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionCollectEquipment-Text-0", "UDA has your back. Sometimes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionCollectEquipment-Text-1", "Supply drop marked on your map")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionPlaceEquipment
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionPlaceEquipment-Text-0", "This thing needs power.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionPlaceEquipment-Text-1", "The UDA giveth")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionPlaceEquipment-Text-2", "And the UDA taketh... well.  forgot to give you an adequate power source.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionPlaceEquipment-Text-3", "I\'m sure you can figure it out.")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionActivateEquipment
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionActivateEquipment-Text-0", "Best to stay away from the laser.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionActivateEquipment-Text-1", "Thing would bisect a mammoth.....")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionTeenageWorms
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionTeenageWorms-Text-0", "Oh hell, no, that\'s not okay.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionTeenageWorms-Text-1", "They\'re bigger right?")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionArriveLake
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionArriveLake-Text-0", "I\'ve got movement. Clear the area before scanning.")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionPlaceBeacon
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionPlaceBeacon-Text-0", "Get that beacon down.")

Rows.Name: StyxDExpeditionMissionComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-0", "Alright. Getting a good signal. Lagos is giving the all clear.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-1", "Well damn. Icarus keeps throwing surprises.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-2", "There\'s probably more to come.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxDExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-3", "Hike back and sling home prospector.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionBreifing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionBreifing-Text-0", "Lagos and Group 15 want you in on this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionBreifing-Text-1", "Making a name for yourself prospector. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionBreifing-Text-2", "So. Two goals. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionBreifing-Text-3", "Lagos wants to open up a new area for exploration and exploitation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionBreifing-Text-4", "and 15 lost prototype equipment on a downed shuttle in the same area. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionBreifing-Text-5", "You get to play lab rat for the new mk-200 prototype laser. Something hush hush about its coolant system.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionBreifing-Text-6", "Thoughts?")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionLanding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionLanding-Text-0", "Group 15 seems to misplace equipment often.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionLanding-Text-1", "More often than you\'d expect.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionLanding-Text-2", "So often in fact, you\'d think it\'s intentional... ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionLanding-Text-3", "Orchestrated... ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionLanding-Text-4", "Or some people would think that. *nervous laugh* not me of course.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionLanding-Text-5", "Ahhhh. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionLanding-Text-6", "Radar can be found in your dropship.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionCollectEquipmentA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionCollectEquipmentA-Text-0", "Hey, radar is in ya dropship.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionCollectEquipmentB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionCollectEquipmentB-Text-0", "Radar is in your dropship. Go grab it.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionCollectEquipmentC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionCollectEquipmentC-Text-0", "Are you ignoring me prospector? C\'mon, grab your scanner.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionArriveLocation3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionArriveLocation3-Text-0", "You\'re gonna have to build up there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionArriveLocation3-Text-1", "I\'d say it\'s time for some construction.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionRecoverEquipment
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionRecoverEquipment-Text-0", "Okay, lets see what Group 15 has in store for us.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionArriveEquipment
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionArriveEquipment-Text-0", "Guess it\'s not the only the scan sites. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionArriveEquipment-Text-1", "You\'re going to have to build up there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionArriveEquipment-Text-2", "....That\'s SOME aim.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionArriveEquipment-Text-3", "You\'d think they would do better, with all the tech they have.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionCollectedEquipment
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionCollectedEquipment-Text-0", "Looks a little worse for wear. hmm. Fixable.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionCollectedEquipment-Text-1", "Up for repairing bleeding edge tech, with nothing but ya wits and what you can forage?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionCollectedEquipment-Text-2", "You better be, it\'s the only way we move foward.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionCollectedEquipment-Text-3", "I figure you\'ll need a crafting bench.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionRepairedEquipment
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionRepairedEquipment-Text-0", "Huh, clever. Seems to have an internal power source.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionRepairedEquipment-Text-1", "Now get that laser on site.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionDrillCompleteA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionDrillCompleteA-Text-0", "Great! The thing worked like a charm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionDrillCompleteA-Text-1", "Guess the Group is onto something. ")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionDrillRestartA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionDrillRestartA-Text-0", "Huh it stopped, try a manual restart?")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionDrillRestartB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionDrillRestartB-Text-0", "Prospector, laser stopped again.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionDrillRestartC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionDrillRestartC-Text-0", "You sure about your repair job? Needs a restart.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionTemperature
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionTemperature-Text-0", "Are my readings on your suit temp correct?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionTemperature-Text-1", "Is that the laser?!?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionTemperature-Text-2", "You\'d better stand back!")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionDrillExplodes
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionDrillExplodes-Text-0", "DAMN.")

Rows.Name: StyxEExpeditionMissionComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-0", "I thought you were done for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-1", "Still - it did the job")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-2", "We can tell Group 15 it wasn\'t hard to turn their prototype into a bomb.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-3", "Ah unless you did repair it right.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-4", "and.... it was supposed to do that?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-5", "Never know with the Group.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StyxEExpeditionMissionComplete-Text-6", "Best get back to your dropship before they ask for somethin\' else.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingPool1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingPool1-Text-0", "Uniao have some prototype tech they need you to test out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingPool1-Text-1", "It\'s fairly simple: drop down, deploy it, survive, and report back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingPool1-Text-2", "Think you\'re up for it?")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingACS1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingACS1-Text-0", "The ACS have some prototype tech they need you to test out.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingSinotai1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingSinotai1-Text-0", "Sinotai have some prototype tech they need you to test out.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingAssembly1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingAssembly1-Text-0", "The African Assembly have some prototype tech they need you to test out.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingAssembly2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingAssembly2-Text-0", "When it comes to exotics, the Assembly have a one track mind. ")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingLagos1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingLagos1-Text-0", "The Lagos Group has some bio-research they need you to help with.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingLagos1-Text-1", "Not much of a brief here, seems a bit shady but hey, that\'s Lagos for ya.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingGroupFifteen1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingGroupFifteen1-Text-0", "Group 15 is getting antsy due to wildlife disrupting their research efforts planetside.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingGroupFifteen1-Text-1", "They call it research, I\'d say it\'s more like surveillance. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingGroupFifteen1-Text-2", "Either way, so long as you don\'t ask any questions they are happy to hand us a nice little payment for taking it down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingGroupFifteen1-Text-3", "Can you keep your mouth shut?")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingAny1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingAny1-Text-0", "They need you to head down there and activate some kind of newfangled device they\'ve cooked up")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingAny2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingAny2-Text-0", "They\'ve got a new bit of prototype tech to test out, and they want you to do it.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingAny3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingAny3-Text-0", "They\'ve got some unconfirmed reports coming in from the surface, and they want you to check them out.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingAny4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingAny4-Text-0", "They need boots on the ground to do the work that no-one else will.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingAny5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingAny5-Text-0", "No-one else will take this job.. that\'s why they\'re askin\' you.")

Rows.Name: GenericBriefingAny6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericBriefingAny6-Text-0", "They heard you\'ll take any job that pays well. ")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingSuspicious1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingSuspicious1-Text-0", "Now, before you say it, I know, bio-research.. what the hell does that even mean?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingSuspicious1-Text-1", "It means it\'s research that may or may not be exactly ethical..")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingSuspicious1-Text-2", "So let\'s just get through this one quickly, okay?")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingGetSupplies1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingGetSupplies1-Text-0", "Before they can start using this tech they need you to test it out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingGetSupplies1-Text-1", "Better grab yer supplies and get going.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingGetSupplies2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingGetSupplies2-Text-0", "You\'ll find the device in your supply crate nearby.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingGetSupplies3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingGetSupplies3-Text-0", "You\'ll find the device stowed in your dropship.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingGetSupplies4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingGetSupplies4-Text-0", "Everything you\'ll need is in that crate.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingGetSupplies5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingGetSupplies5-Text-0", "Everything you\'ll need is stowed in your ship.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingGetSupplies6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingGetSupplies6-Text-0", "Don\'t forget your supplies.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingExploring1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingExploring1-Text-0", "Alright, it\'s finally time to explore. Stay sharp out there.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingExploring2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingExploring2-Text-0", "Okay, let\'s get this show on the road.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingExploring3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingExploring3-Text-0", "Check your map to figure out which way you should be headin\'.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingHunting1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingHunting1-Text-0", "Let\'s track some wildlife.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingHunting2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingHunting2-Text-0", "Let\'s get huntin\'.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingSearching1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingSearching1-Text-0", "Let\'s get searchin\'.")

Rows.Name: GenericLandingFriendly1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingFriendly1-Text-0", "You\'ve been on a fair few drops now, friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericLandingFriendly1-Text-1", "Soon you\'ll be guiding me around the place.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionRemark1-Text-0", "Uh.. have you done this before?")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionRemark2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionRemark2-Text-0", "Uh.. you have used one of these before, right? ")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionSetUp1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionSetUp1-Text-0", "Okay just get that thing set up quickly.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionSetUp2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionSetUp2-Text-0", "You need to set that thing up, now.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionSetUp3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionSetUp3-Text-0", "Are you gonna set that thing up or are we gonna sit around all day?")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionRepair1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionRepair1-Text-0", "Uh, prospector? I think you\'ll need to repair the equipment.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionRepair2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionRepair2-Text-0", "Looks like it\'s busted, repair it, and quick.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionRepair3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionRepair3-Text-0", "Looks like your tech is busted, better get onto it.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionProtect1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionProtect1-Text-0", "Defend the tech, it won\'t work if they get to it.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionProtect2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionProtect2-Text-0", "Make sure they don\'t take a chunk out of it, or you\'ll have some major repairs to do.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionProtect3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionProtect3-Text-0", "You may want to head back to the device.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionBroken1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionBroken1-Text-0", "Watch out, your tech seems to be malfunctioning. ")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionBroken2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionBroken2-Text-0", "Ah damn, looks like they\'ve killed it. ")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionBroken3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionBroken3-Text-0", "You\'re gonna need a replacement.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionBroken4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionBroken4-Text-0", "Man, they really did not like that thing.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionWarning1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionWarning1-Text-0", "You may not be able to hear it, but that frequency is going to attract some big trouble.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionWarning2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionWarning2-Text-0", "That frequency is going to drive the local wildlife mad.")

Rows.Name: DeviceInteractionWarning3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeviceInteractionWarning3-Text-0", "These things have a way of attracting the local wildlife, stay alert.")

Rows.Name: ConfusedReaction1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConfusedReaction1-Text-0", "What the devil is that thing?")

Rows.Name: ConfusedReaction2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConfusedReaction2-Text-0", "What the hell did you do?")

Rows.Name: ConfusedReaction3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConfusedReaction3-Text-0", "Are you seeing this too? ")

Rows.Name: ConfusedReaction4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConfusedReaction4-Text-0", "I can\'t say I\'ve ever seen one of those before.")

Rows.Name: ConfusedReaction5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConfusedReaction5-Text-0", "What on Icarus are you doing?")

Rows.Name: ConfusedReaction6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConfusedReaction6-Text-0", "What the hell is that?")

Rows.Name: ConfusedReaction7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConfusedReaction7-Text-0", "Did you really think that was a good idea?")

Rows.Name: ConfusedReaction8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ConfusedReaction8-Text-0", "I thought you knew what you were doing.")

Rows.Name: GenericReaction1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericReaction1-Text-0", "Not to be rude but, that doesn\'t seem like the best idea.")

Rows.Name: GenericReaction2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericReaction2-Text-0", "Why the hell- uh, never mind.")

Rows.Name: GenericReaction3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericReaction3-Text-0", "What the hell have they been messing with down here?")

Rows.Name: GenericReaction4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericReaction4-Text-0", "I\'d back up if I were you.")

Rows.Name: GenericReaction5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericReaction5-Text-0", "Uh, I\'m not sure if that\'s exactly working as intended..")

Rows.Name: GenericReaction6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericReaction6-Text-0", "Might be a good idea to lay low for a little while.")

Rows.Name: GenericReaction7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenericReaction7-Text-0", "In all my years, I ain\'t never seen anything like that before.")

Rows.Name: DirectionValley1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionValley1-Text-0", "Cutting through that valley seems like your best option.")

Rows.Name: DirectionNextStop1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionNextStop1-Text-0", "Your next stop is marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: DirectionNextStop2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionNextStop2-Text-0", "Check your map for the next one.")

Rows.Name: DirectionNextStop3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionNextStop3-Text-0", "Let\'s go to the next spot.")

Rows.Name: DirectionNextStop4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionNextStop4-Text-0", "Get out your map for your next location.")

Rows.Name: DirectionNorth1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionNorth1-Text-0", "It\'s up North.")

Rows.Name: DirectionNorth2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionNorth2-Text-0", "Looks like you\'re headin\' North.")

Rows.Name: DirectionWest1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionWest1-Text-0", "Looks like you\'re headin\' West.")

Rows.Name: DirectionWest2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionWest2-Text-0", "It\'s in the West.")

Rows.Name: DirectionEast1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionEast1-Text-0", "Let\'s head East.")

Rows.Name: DirectionEast2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionEast2-Text-0", "Looks like we\'re headin\' East.")

Rows.Name: DirectionSouth1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionSouth1-Text-0", "It\'s down South.")

Rows.Name: DirectionSouth2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DirectionSouth2-Text-0", "Looks like we\'re headin\' South.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionAverage1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionAverage1-Text-0", "It looks like this storm is moving right on top of ya.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionAverage2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionAverage2-Text-0", "That nasty looking storm is heading right this way, stay sharp.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionAverage3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionAverage3-Text-0", "Watch out, these things are known for lightning strikes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionAverage3-Text-1", "Once saw a prospector cooked in their suit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionAverage3-Text-2", "That thing sorta stays with ya.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionModerate1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionModerate1-Text-0", "Looks like this thing is taking a turn for the worse")

Rows.Name: StormReactionModerate2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionModerate2-Text-0", "This thing is predicted to get even worse.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionModerate3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionModerate3-Text-0", "I\'d get out of here if I were you.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionModerate4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionModerate4-Text-0", "Avoid that storm at all costs.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionModerate5
