Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionModerate5-Text-0", "You do not wanna get caught in that.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionModerate6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionModerate6-Text-0", "Better get back to safety")

Rows.Name: StormReactionModerate7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionModerate7-Text-0", "Watch out, these storms can get pretty nasty.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere1-Text-0", "Shelter. Have you heard of it?")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere2-Text-0", "Okay, now is not the time to go exploring.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere3-Text-0", "You need to get to shelter, immediately.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere4-Text-0", "I\'d really hate to see you fried to a crisp. ")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere6-Text-0", "I\'d rather not lose another friend out here.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere7-Text-0", "This storm was not on the radar.. ")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere8-Text-0", "This storm was not on the forecast..")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere9-Text-0", "Drop everything and run.")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere10-Text-0", "This thing is outta control!")

Rows.Name: StormReactionSevere11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "StormReactionSevere11-Text-0", "Gettin\' hit by lightning is a shit way to die.")

Rows.Name: ArcticRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ArcticRemark1-Text-0", "Ah, the Arctic. Or at least, that\'s what we call it in the Terrazone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ArcticRemark1-Text-1", "I often wonder what used to be here before we messed it all up.")

Rows.Name: ArcticRemark2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ArcticRemark2-Text-0", "The cold here can kill ya without you even noticing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ArcticRemark2-Text-1", "Better rug up.")

Rows.Name: DesertRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DesertRemark1-Text-0", "The desert areas of the Terrazone are pretty unforgiving.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DesertRemark1-Text-1", "Make sure you keep an eye on yer vitals.")

Rows.Name: DesertRemark2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DesertRemark2-Text-0", "Is that an oasis? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DesertRemark2-Text-1", "Ah, just my eyes playing tricks on me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DesertRemark2-Text-2", "The desert can be cruel like that.")

Rows.Name: RiverlandsRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RiverlandsRemark1-Text-0", "This section here is called the Riverlands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RiverlandsRemark1-Text-1", "The UDA weren\'t exactly creative with the naming in the Terrazone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RiverlandsRemark1-Text-2", "Still, they had a lot going on.")

Rows.Name: ColdRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ColdRemark1-Text-0", "Time to rug up.")

Rows.Name: ColdRemark2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ColdRemark2-Text-0", "It\'s freezing out here, make sure you don\'t.")

Rows.Name: ColdRemark3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ColdRemark3-Text-0", "You\'re gonna lose some fingers if you don\'t warm up soon.")

Rows.Name: ColdRemark4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ColdRemark4-Text-0", "Hey, you must be freezing. ")

Rows.Name: ColdRemark5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ColdRemark5-Text-0", "Try to find somewhere to warm up a bit.")

Rows.Name: TempRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TempRemark1-Text-0", "Keep an eye on yer vitals.")

Rows.Name: TempRemark2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TempRemark2-Text-0", "This place is known for ruthless weather. Keep an eye out.")

Rows.Name: TempRemark3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TempRemark3-Text-0", "Uh, prospector? Looks like you\'re overheating.")

Rows.Name: CreatureMarkings1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureMarkings1-Text-0", "Hmm.. those markings are pretty different to the official records.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureMarkings1-Text-1", "I wonder what the UDA have been messing around with this time.")

Rows.Name: WolfRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WolfRemark1-Text-0", "Wolves, you\'ll never outrun them.")

Rows.Name: WolfRemark2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "WolfRemark2-Text-0", "Watch out for that pack.")

Rows.Name: BearRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BearRemark1-Text-0", "Bears. The bane of every prospector on Icarus.")

Rows.Name: DeerRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeerRemark1-Text-0", "Deer and smaller prey\'ll get spooked if you make too much noise.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DeerRemark1-Text-1", "Pays to be extra cautious around them.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemark1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemark1-Text-0", "They don\'t usually hang around here, must be something about you. ")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemark2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemark2-Text-0", "Woah, what the hell is that doing here?")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkLarge1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkLarge1-Text-0", "Damn, that\'s a big one.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkLarge2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkLarge2-Text-0", "Did you see the size of that thing?")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkAngry1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkAngry1-Text-0", "Oh boy, that one looks angry.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkAngry2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkAngry2-Text-0", "That thing looks like it means business.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkWary1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkWary1-Text-0", "Keep an eye out, there may be more of them around here.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkWary2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkWary2-Text-0", "There\'s never just one of them, in my experience.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkWary3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkWary3-Text-0", "They like to lurk about in packs, keep your eyes peeled.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkWary4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkWary4-Text-0", "There\'s almost never just one of \'em. Stay sharp.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkMidfight1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkMidfight1-Text-0", "You\'re doing great, keep fighting!")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkMidfight2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkMidfight2-Text-0", "Aim for the head!")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkMidfight3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkMidfight3-Text-0", "Now might be a good time to run.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkPostFight1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkPostFight1-Text-0", "Now that was a fight!")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkPostFight2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkPostFight2-Text-0", "I thought we were gonna lose you for a second there.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkPostFight3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkPostFight3-Text-0", "I\'ve seen some good fights in my time, but that was outstanding.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkPostFight4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkPostFight4-Text-0", "Get out of there and find somewhere to recover.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkPostFight5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkPostFight5-Text-0", "That was close, let\'s keep moving.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkDen1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkDen1-Text-0", "Huh, looks like it\'s guarding something.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkDen2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkDen2-Text-0", "That\'s strange, what is it guarding?")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkDen3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkDen3-Text-0", "That might be its den behind it. ")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkDen4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkDen4-Text-0", "If we can get in there, we can wipe the whole pack out. ")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkDen5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkDen5-Text-0", "Watch out, there may be more hiding in there.")

Rows.Name: CreatureRemarkDen6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CreatureRemarkDen6-Text-0", "Stay alert, there could be more where that came from.")

Rows.Name: QuipFiller1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller1-Text-0", "Well, that\'s life on Icarus for ya. One step forward, one dropship back.")

Rows.Name: QuipFiller2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller2-Text-0", "Have you heard the one about the bear and the prospector? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller2-Text-1", "Everyone knows how that ends.")

Rows.Name: QuipFiller3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller3-Text-0", "You sure do make being on desk duty exciting.")

Rows.Name: QuipFiller4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller4-Text-0", "I do miss being out there planetside sometimes. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller4-Text-1", "But hey, I get to live vicariously through you now.")

Rows.Name: QuipFiller5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller5-Text-0", "We may actually have a chance of making it out of here alive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller5-Text-1", "Don\'t screw it up.")

Rows.Name: QuipFiller6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller6-Text-0", "Here\'s to another successful drop, let\'s keep it that way.")

Rows.Name: QuipFiller7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller7-Text-0", "All in a day\'s work. Good job.")

Rows.Name: QuipFiller8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller8-Text-0", "Icarus has a funny way of always ruining your day.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "QuipFiller8-Text-1", "Go figure.")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut20minsA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut20minsA-Text-0", "Hey friend, keep an eye on that timer.")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut20minsB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut20minsB-Text-0", "That dropship\'s leaving with or without you.")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut20minsC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut20minsC-Text-0", "Trust me, you don\'t wanna miss that dropship.")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut20minsD
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut20minsD-Text-0", "Uh, prospector? You might want to start heading back to your ship.")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut10minsA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut10minsA-Text-0", "Cutting it a bit close, aren\'t we?")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut10minsB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut10minsB-Text-0", "You do know there\'s a time limit to this drop, right?")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut10minsC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut10minsC-Text-0", "You do plan on making it back into orbit, right?")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut10minsD
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut10minsD-Text-0", "It\'ll be a miracle if you make it back in time.")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut5minsA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut5minsA-Text-0", "You need to run, NOW!")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut5minsB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut5minsB-Text-0", "RUN. Get the hell outta there!")

Rows.Name: TimerRunningOut5minsC
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRunningOut5minsC-Text-0", "Get back to the ship, NOW!")

Rows.Name: TimerRanOutCharacterLost1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRanOutCharacterLost1-Text-0", "Ah friend, I\'d hoped I wouldn\'t lose you.")

Rows.Name: TimerRanOutCharacterLost2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRanOutCharacterLost2-Text-0", "Not another one. Why couldn\'t you just-")

Rows.Name: TimerRanOutCharacterLost3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRanOutCharacterLost3-Text-0", "No! Dammit. You\'re on your own now prospector.")

Rows.Name: TimerRanOutCharacterLost4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TimerRanOutCharacterLost4-Text-0", "Good luck, it\'s been nice knowing you, friend.")

Rows.Name: MissionFailed1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionFailed1-Text-0", "Well, can\'t complete the mission without it, looks like we are headin\' back up.")

Rows.Name: MissionFailed2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionFailed2-Text-0", "Good try friend, but it\'s the end of the road for this one.")

Rows.Name: MissionFailed3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "MissionFailed3-Text-0", "Well, that didn\'t go well. Guess we gotta start over.")

Rows.Name: BrandRemarkLM1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkLM1-Text-0", "Ah, I see you\'ve got some Larkwell Martinez on ya.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkLM1-Text-1", "Used to be the best company in America, back when the US was a thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkLM1-Text-2", "Now I hear they\'ve been reduced to using Shengong\'s scraps. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkLM1-Text-3", "But hey, it\'s still pretty good stuff.")

Rows.Name: BrandRemarkLM2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkLM2-Text-0", "Larkwell huh, can\'t go wrong with that.")

Rows.Name: BrandRemarkShengong1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkShengong1-Text-0", "Shengong\'s pretty good. Great for a new prospector starting out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkShengong1-Text-1", "Sinotai\'s made some decent money with these pieces. ")

Rows.Name: BrandRemarkShengong2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkShengong2-Text-0", "A fine example of Shengong tech.")

Rows.Name: BrandRemarkGroupFifteen1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkGroupFifteen1-Text-0", "Must be Group 15 tech you\'ve got there.")

Rows.Name: BrandRemarkMXC1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkMXC1-Text-0", "MXC huh? Well, it\'ll do in a pinch.")

Rows.Name: BrandRemarkInaris1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkInaris1-Text-0", "Sinotai may have Shengong, but Uniao have Inaris.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkInaris1-Text-1", "Otherwise known as that company that built the space elevator.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkInaris1-Text-2", "Good, durable gear to rely on. ")

Rows.Name: BrandRemarkInaris2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BrandRemarkInaris2-Text-0", "Inaris, now that\'s a solid piece of equipment.")

Rows.Name: FactionRemarkUniao1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkUniao1-Text-0", "Everyone knows that Uniao doesn\'t give a damn about Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkUniao1-Text-1", "Well, the Terrazone that is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkUniao1-Text-2", "They\'ve set their sights a bit further out.")

Rows.Name: FactionRemarkShengong1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkShengong1-Text-0", "The UDA may present a united front but lemme tell ya...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkShengong1-Text-1", "Them four factions fight day in and day out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkShengong1-Text-2", "If I had to pick one, my money\'s on Sinotai taking over.")

Rows.Name: FactionRemarkAssembly1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkAssembly1-Text-0", "The African Assembly and ACS do not get along.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkAssembly1-Text-1", "I\'d refrain from mentioning them to each other if you end up on one of their drops.")

Rows.Name: FactionRemarkAssembly2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkAssembly2-Text-0", "Yeah.. the Assembly probably should\'a put this in the briefing.")

Rows.Name: FactionRemarkACS1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkACS1-Text-0", "You\'d think the ACS would\'a warned us about this ahead of time.")

Rows.Name: FactionRemarkSinotai1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkSinotai1-Text-0", "Classic Sinotai, always one step ahead.")

Rows.Name: FactionRemarkGroupFifteen1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkGroupFifteen1-Text-0", "This is standard Group 15 stuff.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkGroupFifteen1-Text-1", "Don\'t ask questions.")

Rows.Name: FactionRemarkGroupFifteen2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FactionRemarkGroupFifteen2-Text-0", "Would it really kill Group 15 to give us a heads up about this stuff?")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkSuspicion1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkSuspicion1-Text-0", "Looks like someone dropped something over there.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkSuspicion2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkSuspicion2-Text-0", "What\'s that over there?")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkSuspicion3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkSuspicion3-Text-0", "Someone has definitely been through here recently.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkSuspicion4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkSuspicion4-Text-0", "Considering it\'s been shut down for several years, this place doesn\'t look too bad.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkSuspicion5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkSuspicion5-Text-0", "Hmm, I get the feeling that this place was only shut down for those of us outside of the UDA..")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkSuspicion6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkSuspicion6-Text-0", "I thought this place was supposed to be abandoned..")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkSuspicion7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkSuspicion7-Text-0", "That\'s strange, looks like there\'s been other prospectors here..")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkSuspicion8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkSuspicion8-Text-0", "There may be more to this place than they\'ve been tellin us")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkSuspicion9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkSuspicion9-Text-0", "Between you and me, I don\'t think these briefings have been very forthcoming recently.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkDeadProspector1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkDeadProspector1-Text-0", "Looks like this prospector wasn\'t so lucky.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkDeadProspector2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkDeadProspector2-Text-0", "They must have been abandoned when this zone was shut down.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkDeadProspector3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkDeadProspector3-Text-0", "Must have been here for a while.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkDeadProspector4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkDeadProspector4-Text-0", "Must have been caught in a storm.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkDeadProspector5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkDeadProspector5-Text-0", "Must have misplaced their dropship.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkDeadProspector6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkDeadProspector6-Text-0", "Must have been out here alone.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkWalking1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkWalking1-Text-0", "Honestly, nothing can really prepare ya for all the damn walking in this job.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkWalking1-Text-1", "Imagine if we had a different way to get around this place..")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkWalking1-Text-2", "Oh well, dreams are free I guess.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkWarning1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkWarning1-Text-0", "Keep your wits about you.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkWarning2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkWarning2-Text-0", "Keep your eyes peeled.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkWarning3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkWarning3-Text-0", "Stay sharp.")

Rows.Name: FillerRemarkWarning4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FillerRemarkWarning4-Text-0", "Don\'t get too comfortable.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadBriefing-Text-0", "Get ready prospector. Thanks to Group 15, we just got access to a previously off-limits part of Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadBriefing-Text-1", "Right on the fringe, where the terraforming started falling apart.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadBriefing-Text-2", "This is all new for me too. But from the info in the briefing packet, I can see why they were only letting the brains in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadBriefing-Text-3", "This ain\'t for freshfoots.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadBriefing-Text-4", "But there\'s a lot of new planet out there to explore - you in?")

Rows.Name: PromNomadIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadIntro-Text-0", "Welcome to Prometheus, prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadIntro-Text-1", "This place has been only accessible to approved scientists and faction contractors ... till now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadIntro-Text-2", "Buuut it looks like the UDA are finally opening it up for the rest of us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadIntro-Text-3", "And they\'ve actually made our lives easier - especially yours.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadIntro-Text-4", "You see, you\'ll be able to get back to the station whenever you\'d like.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadIntro-Text-5", "Or move gear and resources from orbit to planet ... and vice versa")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadIntro-Text-6", "What a time to be alive!")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent1-Text-0", "Data on this section of Icarus is limited and.. mostly classified.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent1-Text-1", "What we do know is, the terraforming did. not. work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent1-Text-2", "I don\'t have specifics. I\'ve just been told to prepare you to expect um .... some pretty hostile environments.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent1-Text-3", "Anyway, the goal here is to establish a forward operating outpost and..")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent1-Text-4", "Test out some new UDA bullcrap.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent1-Text-5", "Think they can replace me with some 8 bit bag of bolts with attitude, hardly pay me anything anyway. Simple? Yeah, simply not needed. It\'s not like I\'m a damn luddite but hell I\'m more valuable than a talking toaster.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent1-Text-6", "Ah ahem .. Sorry.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent1-Text-7", "Objectives are on your HUD.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent2-Text-0", "Ah, looks like land wasn\'t the only thing adapted around here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent2-Text-1", "UDA hasn\'t been very forthcoming with information, but I\'ve heard rumors.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent2-Text-2", "Some of them are locals. Some seem to be... altered versions of earth wildlife.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent2-Text-3", "All of \'em weird... and probably dangerous.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent2-Text-4", "I wouldn\'t venture too far out unless you\'re equipped to defend yourself.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent3-Text-0", "You\'ll wanna start by building some basic shelter down here, you can upgrade it as you go, later on.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent4-Text-0", "So the UDA want you to test some new tech.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent4-Text-1", "Damn toaster is supposed to be a replacement prospector guide.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent4-Text-2", "Some kinda newfangled jukebox that spits out basic objectives.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent4-Text-3", "If you ask me, taking away the human element is going to end up getting people killed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent4-Text-4", "Well, more people anyway.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent4-Text-5", "But what do I know?")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent4-Text-6", "Not like I\'ve been here since pretty much the start of Icarus operations, but damn there\'s no way the Underwhelming Department of Assholery could feed that bot enough information. People are gonna die getting this chrome potato up to speed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent4-Text-7", "Ah.. sorry \'bout that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent4-Text-8", "The blueprint for it should be around here somewhere. Ah.. marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent5-Text-0", "Well, that must be one of our new friends.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent5-Text-1", "You can either take it out, or sneak past it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent5-Text-2", "Either way, we need that blueprint.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent6-Text-0", "Alright, you got the stupid thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent6-Text-1", "Go ahead and build it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent6-Text-2", "Let\'s see just how awful it really is.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent7-Text-0", "Nice work, though I wish you didn\'t have to use it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent7-Text-1", "This is the third version they\'ve worked on, and it seems it\'s only good for basic errands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent7-Text-2", "So you\'ll still have me around for a while.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-0", "Hello Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-1", "Now just a second-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-2", "Simplified Mission Prospector Liaison Version 3, Connection verified. Refer to me as SMPL3.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-3", "Bloody stupid robot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-4", "My function is to guide you through basic assignments for the UDA. Communication is one way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-5", "Not much of a replacement then? ...Bucket of bolts.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-6", "Your first mission is to cultivate and harvest one tomato.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-7", "Seriously?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-8", "This frequency will be reserved for exclusive Automated Prospector Guide use. Terminating redundant connections.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-9", "Hold on what did you call me? You stupid-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent8-Text-10", "Tomato quality and composition will be used to assess arable land potential. Please begin.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent9-Text-0", "Training mission complete.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent9-Text-1", "Going offline. Clearing frequency.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent9-Text-2", "Do they think I\'m just sitting on my ass circling a planet for fun? I do my damn job, kept more prospectors alive than most. But that\'s not good enough, noooo, I might see something they don\'t want eyes on. So it\'s-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent9-Text-3", "Oh... Hello Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent9-Text-4", "Boot up the connection again when you want to.. grow a tomato I guess.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent9-Text-5", "Ugh due to Corp HQ mandates I have to mention...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent9-Text-6", "SMPL3 will provide various missions, not just tomato-based activities.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent10-Text-0", "Now, Sinotai have come up with a fancy new way of shipping your exotic hauls off-world.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent10-Text-1", "They\'re calling it the Orbital Exchange System. O. E. S.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent10-Text-2", "Abandoning all your planetside tech is a thing of the past if you prefer.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent10-Text-3", "Chuck \'em in the pod, and it drops it all off at the station. Pretty cool huh?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent10-Text-4", "It\'s free for now, while they\'re still testing the pods. Who knows how much cash they\'ll rake in from this later.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent11-Text-0", "It works in reverse too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent11-Text-1", "Say you wanna order some shiny new gear from the workshop up there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent11-Text-2", "You can get it delivered just by pressing a few buttons. What a time to be alive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent11-Text-3", "Factions are starting to use \'em for payment deliveries too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent11-Text-4", "Speaking of, go get yours.")

Rows.Name: PromNomadEvent12End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent12End-Text-0", "Well, that about covers it. Your next few missions will be delivered from the disembodied robot voice until you get back to UDA level.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent12End-Text-1", "Everyone out here is starting from scratch, gotta prove your mettle.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromNomadEvent12End-Text-2", "I\'ll see you in a bit, try not to die out here?")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderBriefing-Text-0", "We\'ve had an urgent one come through for ya")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderBriefing-Text-1", "Seems like Group 15 have a thief on their hands")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderBriefing-Text-2", "Think you can catch \'em?")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderIntro1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-0", "Attention, prospector. A manhunt is underway.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-1", "Group 15 property has been stolen, the thief reported to be in your vicinity.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-2", "You are the nearest contractor to the site. Further instructions will be relayed to you shortly via precursory methodology.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-3", "Going offline. Clearing frequency.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-4", "Did... did that damn AI just call me old?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-5", "Well. You hear that? Some brave soul decided to make off with Group 15 tech.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-6", "Can\'t tell if that makes them crazy, brilliant.... or maybe just suicidal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-7", "Anyway, if you can find the missing gear, you\'ll probably get in the good books with the Group.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-8", "They seem to have a renewed interest in the area, for better or worse.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderIntro1-Text-9", "One of their satellites picked up a signal from the stolen tech. Location marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent1-Text-0", "Better head out, the Group\'s not known for their patience.")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent2-Text-0", "I have a hard time telling which of these creatures are native to Icarus, or earthies we messed up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent2-Text-1", "We always figured there\'d be a small impact on wildlife we introduced here, hell we resequenced their genes...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent2-Text-2", "Thank god there were no people down here when it happened.")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent3-Text-0", "How in the hell did we get a ping from in there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent3-Text-1", "Well, hey, it\'s time to figure that out for yourself.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent3-Text-2", "Get up there and see what you can find.")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent4-Text-0", "Man, this must\'ve been up here for a while. Just look at this place. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent4-Text-1", "This was supposed to be an urgent op? We\'re hot on the heels of nothin\'")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent4-Text-2", "I\'m surprised we even got a signal from this junk.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent4-Text-3", "Well, suppose it doesn\'t change the job. Better clean this place out.")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderAudiolog1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderAudiolog1-Text-0", "*garbled recording plays*")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderAudiolog1-Text-1", "What-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderAudiolog1-Text-2", "Uh, as you were.")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderEvent5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent5-Text-0", "Alright, uh, that looks like all of it. Time to blast it back up to Group 15.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent5-Text-1", "Start heading back to the site marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderEvent6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent6-Text-0", "O.E.S for delivery.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent6-Text-1", "Get the goods in, carefully.")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderEvent7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent7-Text-0", "Well I\'ll be, the Group doesn\'t disappoint.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent7-Text-1", "It\'ll give you access to the U.D.A mission requisition system while planetside.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent7-Text-2", "Go throw it in.")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderEvent8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent8-Text-0", "Nice work, this thing should help us stay in touch in the future.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent8-Text-1", "Goddamn bot, getting in the way, treating me like I\'m obsolete, cost-saving UD..A ...")

Rows.Name: PromOffenderEvent9End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromOffenderEvent9End-Text-0", "Alright, that seems like us done for now. Until next time friend.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedBriefing-Text-0", "Group 15 want you back on the case of that thief you were tailin\'")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedBriefing-Text-1", "Seems they\'ve found another set of tracks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedBriefing-Text-2", "Wanna check it out?")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedIntro1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-0", "Seeing as how you did so well last time, Group 15 want you back on the case, Sherlock.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-1", "I\'ve even been given a message for you, from some uptight Rep lady.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-2", "Got it around here somewhere...ah")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-3", "Hello prospector. My name is Clarke. I will be your handler for the Group on any future assignments.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-4", "Our analysis of your performance confirms your viability as a potential partner to the Group.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-5", "Very few meet our criteria.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-6", "Your guide should provide mission details. We look forward to working with you further.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-7", "Sounds like you\'re WELL on your way to being redacted out of UDA reports.... good for you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-8", "Lets just make sure you\'re not a little black box under the KIA section.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedIntro1-Text-9", "They need you to find the location of another base, must be nearby here somewhere.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent1-Text-0", "Time to get moving, don\'t forget your equipment.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent2-Text-0", "This looks about right, let\'s get set up.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent3-Text-0", "Just between us, I\'d advise you to watch your back when you\'re working with the Group.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent3-Text-1", "They don\'t exactly have the best track record when it comes to the safety of their contractors.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent3-Text-2", "I\'m not saying they\'re responsible.. but.. well.. just be careful out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent3-Text-3", "There\'s not much else I can do for you from here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent3-Text-4", "Stay sharp.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent4-Text-0", "Set her down here, this should do.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent5-Text-0", "The fringe of the terrazone.... Never thought I\'d ever see it open up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent5-Text-1", "I\'m not sure if anyone knows the full story.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent5-Text-2", "From memory, this was where we saw the first signs of terraforming washout.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent5-Text-3", "Enough for the predictive algorithms to prove out we failed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent5-Text-4", "I mean, would you want to live in a critter-infested swamp?")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent6-Text-0", "I reckon this is the last of \'em.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent7-Text-0", "I don\'t know much about terraforming. But I remember hearing about the first enzyme tests.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent7-Text-1", "Pretty volatile... By design.. trying to rework a planet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent7-Text-2", "That\'s before exotics were tossed into the mix...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent7-Text-3", "Hmm. What a mess.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent8-Text-0", "Huh, that must be it. See if you can get inside.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent8-Text-1", "Smart place to build.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-0", "*Recording plays* Okay. More to do.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-1", "I\'ll need more resin and reed flowers. More gold and Iron.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-2", "Need to find another source. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-3", "Foraging is slow, Doesn\'t feel defensible here. Scout for better HQ locations-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-4", "Sis? Are you there? Can you hear me?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-5", "We miss you, please come home. I need my big sister. It\'s not the same without you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-6", "They\'re taking the Ren you gave us. We need your help.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-7", "Why do they keep sending these to me? Don\'t they know being stuck alone here is torture enough?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-8", "You can do this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-9", "Holy shi-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent9-Text-10", "Uh, take what you want from here, looks like the owner\'s not coming back any time soon.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent10-Text-0", "All done? Let\'s get that beacon down and transmitting then.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent11-Text-0", "Sounds like your paycheck\'s just arrived.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent11-Text-1", "Le- let\'s check it out.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent12-Text-0", "Good work prospector, you may proceed to collect your reward, with our compliments.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent13-Text-0", "Damn. They really do want you in their ranks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent13-Text-1", "This here thing\'ll decrypt confidential faction communications. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent13-Text-2", "That means it\'ll get you into direct contact with Faction reps. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent13-Text-3", "These don\'t get sent out very often, go ahead and set it up.")

Rows.Name: PromShadowedEvent14End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent14End-Text-0", "You\'re playing with the big boys now...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent14End-Text-1", "Just remember these guys have more money than god, and tend to use it to get whatever they want.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromShadowedEvent14End-Text-2", "If I were you prospector, I\'d... tread lightly.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestBriefing-Text-0", "We\'ve got a pretty gnarly missing person\'s case here for ya.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestBriefing-Text-1", "Or in this case, people. A whole team has dropped off the radar.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestBriefing-Text-2", "And in the worst possible place too, you\'ll need to be careful.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestBriefing-Text-3", "Otherwise we\'ll be sending someone else to get you as well.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestIntro1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-0", "Looks like you\'re back on Group 15\'s radar.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-1", "They\'ve had a team go missing. Prometheus... seems like a bad place to get lost.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-2", "You\'ve got some hellish weather on the horizon.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-3", "You\'ll wanna gear up well for this one, I\'m not kidding about those storms. Walk in unprepared and you won\'t be walking back out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-4", "Ah and..one.. one more thing... That audiolog you found last time, well it sounded a lot like one of my old crew.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-5", "Someone I haven\'t been in contact with for a long time.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-6", "I have a rather uncomfortable feeling about what the Group wants here, so keep your wits about you, and your eyes open.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-7", "And when I say to be careful, I mean it. This is probably one of the most dan-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-8", "Prospector, you may start at any time. Final contact with our staff has given us multiple possible locations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-9", "Our forecast indicates that weather may be an obstacle.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-10", "I\'d like to remind you that all data and/or hardware that you recover during these assignments is the sole property of the Group.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-11", "Sharing said data with anyone outside of Group 15 will be considered an act of aggression and shall be dealt with accordingly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestIntro1-Text-12", "All Group 15 data is also encrypted, for your safety, of course.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent1-Text-0", "We have the last known location of one of the team members marked on your map, please proceed to this location immediately.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent2-Text-0", "That\'s... unfortunate. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent2-Text-1", "We have a signal from the next nearest team member for you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent2-Text-2", "Hopefully they will be more... intact.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent3-Text-0", "Distant Creature ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent3-Text-1", "What was that? Prospector... There may be a threat nearby.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent4-Text-0", "Another one. Fine. There is one more team member out there. The location from their last signal is on your map.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent5-Text-0", "I urge you to proceed with caution. There are signs that the creature may still be in the area.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent6-Text-0", "What on earth is that? Don\'t just stand there, get rid of it.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent7-Text-0", "Well, so much for rescuing the team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent7-Text-1", "We will send in a cleanup detachment for body disposal shortly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent7-Text-2", "Search the corpse for any valuables to be returned before you leave.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent8-Text-0", "Prospector, can you hear me? I\'m transmitting direct via encrypted short wave, got a neat trick to get it through the upper atmosphere.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent8-Text-1", "Ah, this may be asking too much. But please understand, it\'s important. For a... a friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent8-Text-2", "I need you to send me the data on that module.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent8-Text-3", "I\'ve marked a location on your map, an old supply cache.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent8-Text-4", "It\'s got a narrow beam communicator, so you can send the data to me, securely.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestSolBeg1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestSolBeg1-Text-0", "Please Prospector. I wouldn\'t ask you if it wasn\'t important.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestSolBeg2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestSolBeg2-Text-0", "This could be life or death. Please. I need to know.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestSolBeg3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestSolBeg3-Text-0", "Come on prospector. I\'ll... I\'ll owe you one.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestSolBeg4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestSolBeg4-Text-0", "Okay. I get it. I\'ll quit nagging. But I need you to do this.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent9-Text-0", "I... holy sh-. This is a lot. Okay. Uh. Look, I\'ll get back to you. I have a gal that can get this decrypted.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent9-Text-1", "Uh, obviously best not to mention this to anyone. Ever.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent9-Text-2", "Factions tend to hold a grudge, the Group worst of all.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent9-Text-3", "Just send the data like nothing happened. And hey, we\'ll be fine.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent9-Text-4", "Probably.")

Rows.Name: PromTempestEvent10End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent10End-Text-0", "Ah excellent, the Group thanks you for your efforts today. We will have more work for you soon.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromTempestEvent10End-Text-1", "Until that time, goodbye.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchBriefing-Text-0", "Prospector, the Group has every reason to believe that we have located the safehouse of our suspect.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchBriefing-Text-1", "We need to strike before they have a chance to escape. Prepare for an arduous pursuit.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchIntro-Text-0", "Attention Prospector. The Group has narrowed down the area where the suspect was recently residing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchIntro-Text-1", "You must make your way to this location.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchIntro-Text-2", "The thief has tried to undermine our work on Icarus, and is no longer due civilised treatment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchIntro-Text-3", "Use of force is approved.... expected even.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchIntro-Text-4", "All previous contractors have failed to apprehend this suspect. We expect better from you. Do not disappoint us.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent1-Text-0", "For this assignment you\'ll need a beacon. We don\'t want to give away your location, so you will need to make one from scratch.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent1-Text-1", "You seem resourceful enough? I\'ve marked the area you\'ll need to search on your map. I\'ll be in touch again once you locate the safehouse.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent2-Text-0", "Friend, friend! You need to be careful.. They\'re choking comms, I haven\'t got much time.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent2-Text-1", "That little stunt we pulled with the audiolog, they\'re watching us now. Both of us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent2-Text-2", "This is big... whatever we\'re messing with it\'s big. Beyond anything I\'ve ever seen.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent2-Text-3", "The Group could kill us over this, you gotta listen to the recording, here-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent2-Text-4", "*garbled recording plays*")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent2-Text-5", "Dammit! I can\'t keep the signal up! dammit! hey prospector! Wait sh-... Oh god they traced the signal watch out!")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent3-Text-0", "Ah, this is the location, Prospector. Now to get you inside...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent3-Text-1", "If you would take a quick look around the perimeter.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent3-Text-2", "A few of our previous contractors encountered... obstacles.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent3-Text-3", "Caution is advised.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent4-Text-0", "That would be the aforementioned obstacles. You will need to clear a path.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent4-Text-1", "They shouldn\'t be a problem for a prospector of your calibre.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent5-Text-0", "Good work. Please proceed to search the encampment for Group 15 equipment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent5-Text-1", "The thief stole a geological scanning device that you will need to utilize.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent5-Text-2", "It\'s likely she... took data from this location, information we would very much like access to.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent6-Text-0", "This is the scanner. It needs to be powered. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent6-Text-1", "Seems like our thief built a defensible encampment for a reason.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent6-Text-2", "Data shows that, when powered, this device will... disturb local wildlife.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent6-Text-3", "You may want to prepare, I\'m sure you can figure it out.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent7-Text-0", "There is a... moderate amount of movement. Headed your way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent7-Text-1", "We need time to collect and collate the scan data. You will need to protect the device.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent8-Text-0", "Well done, you may now place the beacon. It shouldn\'t take long to get an accurate location.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent9-Text-0", "Excellent work Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent9-Text-1", "We\'ve decided that destruction of this site and surrounding area is in the best interests of the Group.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent9-Text-2", "While we have no further use for this site. You may find useful items hidden around the criminal\'s encampment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent9-Text-3", "Warning. Orbital laser charging sequence has begun.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent9-Text-4", "You have 30 seconds to evacuate the area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent9-Text-5", "If you value your life then I\'d recommend leaving the site.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent9-Text-6", "Now.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchWarning
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchWarning-Text-0", "If you value your life then I\'d recommend leaving the site. Now.")

Rows.Name: PromDispatchEvent10End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent10End-Text-0", "Another stellar assignment, truly excellent work Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent10End-Text-1", "You may wish to consider joining the Group full-time. We operate outside the traditional bounds of the UDA, but...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent10End-Text-2", "The Group provides, especially for favoured contractors such as yourself.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent10End-Text-3", "We value loyalty and commitment above all else. The Group always comes first.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromDispatchEvent10End-Text-4", "We look forward to working with you again, soon.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureBriefing-Text-0", "Prospector, we believe the suspect is sheltering near your current location.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureBriefing-Text-1", "Prepare to drop everything and follow their trail immediately.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureIntro-Text-0", "Prospector. We have need of your services once again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureIntro-Text-1", "Our forward team has discovered a trail, the suspect is in this area. We believe they may be wounded.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureIntro-Text-2", "This is your chance to earn your place within the Group. Failure will not be rewarded.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureIntro-Text-3", "After your performance on our last assignment, we are confident you will rise to the challenge.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureIntro-Text-4", "It is time to close the book on this terrorist. Further instructions will follow shortly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureIntro-Text-5", "Good luck.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent1-Text-0", "You\'ll find supplies and plentiful ammunition in the nearby supply crate.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent2-Text-0", "Please proceed to the last known location of the criminal. You\'ll find it marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent3-Text-0", "Ugh. Well, he never was the brightest. At least it looks like he recorded their trail before... this happened. Follow it.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent4-Text-0", "Idiot! This is our agent\'s own camp. Let me look at that data again. How on earth did she tamper with it?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent4-Text-1", "And what are those things swarming all over the place?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent4-Text-2", "Get rid of them so we can search for information.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent5-Text-0", "Nothing. Well... it seems like we\'ll have to take matters into our own hands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent5-Text-1", "I\'ve had just about enough of this little pest. It\'s time she was removed from Icarus. Forcefully.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent5-Text-2", "How dare she come here, steal our property, compromise our intel! No one goes against the Group like this. No one.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-0", "I have scanned the area and ensured that no other contractors are in the vicinity.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-1", "Rest assured, this will not stain your public record with the UDA. Only you and I will know the particulars of this assignment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-2", "Once completed, you\'ll be-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-3", "Now hang on just a second, Prospectors aren\'t guns for hire. You think we\'d do anythi-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-4", "Mr Berlinksi, how did you connect to this frequency?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-5", "You lying no-good Group 15 bitc-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-6", "MR BERLINSKI, this is a Group protected frequency, and I will not be threatened-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-7", "Go to hell-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-8", "Supposed to be a secure line, honestly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent6-Text-9", "A moment prospector. I need to... request an operation.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent7-Text-0", "Hey friend. Ditch the suits and check this out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent7-Text-1", "That data you sent me was more than just a recording. Guided me to a totally new spot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent7-Text-2", "It\'s a bit of a trek, but by the sound of things... better than your current assignment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent7-Text-3", "Friend, we\'ve known each other a while. And I\'ve never done you wrong.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent7-Text-4", "I need you to trust me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent7-Text-5", "Let\'s go AWOL.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent8-Text-0", "I knew it! Can you check and see if there\'s more recordings?")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent9-Text-0", "Damn, looks like it\'s encrypted. I can get into it, but it\'s gonna take some time.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent9-Text-1", "Keep an eye out, I doubt the Group will be happy now you\'re officially a deserter.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent10-Text-0", "What on earth do you think you\'re doing, Prospector? You are completely off course.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent10-Text-1", "It\'s not earth, it\'s Icarus. Idiot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent10-Text-2", "Mr Berlinski-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent10-Text-3", "Oh will you shut up with all that crap.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent10-Text-4", "You have no right to derail this assignment with ridiculous conspiracy theories.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent10-Text-5", "Ridiculous? Ridiculous is believing a single bloody word you lot say.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent10-Text-6", "This has gone far enough. There will be consequences.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent11-Text-0", "She\'s activated a subwave locator on your suit. I knew they were still using those damn things.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent11-Text-1", "It\'ll attract every creature in a two mile radius, I need more time to get into this thing, can you hold them off?")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-0", "Nicely done, okay let\'s crack this thing open and-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-1", "Test test. Alright, hey there Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-2", "This has been a fun little chase, I\'m actually kind of impressed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-3", "Most of the Group 15 goons don\'t last that long, you did pretty well.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-4", "Listen, they\'re probably trying to get rid of me by this point, I\'ve got black data on them they really don\'t want anyone else knowing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-5", "I can explain everything, but I\'m in ... a bit of a situation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-6", "You can find the evidence for yourself not too far from here. I\'ll leave directions with this log.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-7", "But I\'d gear up if I were you. The only reason the Group hasn\'t destroyed it, is cause of my rather dangerous friend living nearby.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-8", "Good luck, Mo out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-9", "Dammit Mo! What about your family? Your crew? What about-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-10", "I\'ve thought about her stuck down here every damn day. Wondering how I could have stopped it. How I could have saved her.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-11", "But now I find out that she chose to stay and abandon everyone she knew and loved? For what?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent12-Text-12", "This evidence better blow the lid off Group 15.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent13-Text-0", "Damn, that subwave locator won\'t shut off. If you can get out of this area, you might be out of range of their satellite signal.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent13Warning1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent13Warning1-Text-0", "You need to move, you\'re still in range of the signal.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent13Warning2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent13Warning2-Text-0", "Get out of there friend! We need to break the signal.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent13Warning3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent13Warning3-Text-0", "That signal\'s not going anywhere, you need to move.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent14-Text-0", "Alright, that did it. Seems like it\'s stopped transmitting, but keep an eye out just in case. We aren\'t out of the woods yet.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent15-Text-0", "Oh man. I guess this is the \'little friend\' she was talking about.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent15-Text-1", "Good luck prospector, it\'s all been leading to this.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent16-Text-0", "You made it, I knew you would. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent16-Text-1", "Now. Let\'s find whatever Mo needs us to find.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent16-Text-2", "Those coordinates...  location is likely a cave.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent16-Text-3", "Somewhere along that cliff.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent17-Text-0", "I don\'t like this, I don\'t like this one bit. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent17-Text-1", "Prospector, you must leave this area at once.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent17-Text-2", "What the hell are these markings? What the hell have you been messing around with down here?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent17-Text-3", "That\'s classified.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent17-Text-4", "Classified my ass, keep going Prospector!")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-0", "Dear god, is that-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-1", "Mr Berlinski, I really must insist-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-2", "There were people here-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-3", "Not people. This information is classified, you do not have Group clearance to discuss such-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-4", "Fine, not people as we know them, but still, the poor creatures.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-5", "You knew about this, even before the terraforming you knew.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-6", "Subspecies 1341 was known to the Group yes, and deemed to be an unintelligent lifeform with no practical use for humanity.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-7", "Unintelligent? Are you kidding me? Just look at this place, look at it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-8", "Oh god, is that a child? I think I\'m gonna be sick.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-9", "The creatures were deemed to be non-sentient by the Group.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-10", "The fact that they were unable to adapt and survive the terraforming process proves that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-11", "Oh sure, I\'d like to see you survive the toxic hell we dumped on Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent18-Text-12", "That\'s enough, you don\'t get to-")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent19
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-0", "Oh, friend? I found another file in the data we decrypted. Playing it for you now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-1", "What you\'re seeing here is no lie. The Group knew that these creatures lived peacefully on Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-2", "As part of the first team of exo-geologists I had my suspicions. The reports were too clean, too quick.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-3", "We were rushed into starting the process, regardless of what it meant for native life. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-4", "I was not the only one who knew, but my colleagues backed down, one by one, the Group threatened and manipulated them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-5", "I decided that the only place I was going to get answers was on Icarus itself. So I made my last drop, and let my crew leave without me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-6", "I found this place and I\'ve been trying to find a way to get this information out into the world ever since.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-7", "Do not trust the Group, they do not honor their bargains. They only care about themselves.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-8", "They knew these creatures were sentient, had families and homes, art, culture.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-9", "And they killed them anyway, just to get the exotics. In the end, it always comes down to money.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-10", "The Group will kill anyone they need in order to keep this under wraps. So. Watch your back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-11", "For now, I\'ll keep hiding, keep exploring. Seems the least I could do is learn more about them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-12", "If you ever want to help my cause, find me. You seem to be one of the good ones.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-13", "And please, tell Sol it\'s not his fault. It was never his fault. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent19-Text-14", "Mo, out.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent20
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-0", "Alright \"Clarke\", if that\'s even your real name. It seems we have ourselves a situation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-1", "A situation indeed. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-2", "I already have a team enroute to your location Prospector. You should have known better than to go poking around in the Group\'s business.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-3", "And as for you- Berlinski-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-4", "Now now, let\'s not be rash about this. ")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-5", "While you were pulling your hair out trying to keep this shit quiet, I took the liberty of uploading all the logs we\'ve gathered over the last few weeks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-6", "Uploaded? How dare you-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-7", "Don\'t blow a gasket now, it\'s been sent to a secure, private server.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-8", "However, if anything were to happen to my partner here, or myself, that information will be beamed to every news station on earth, and orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-9", "You have no right to distribute Group 15 property.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-10", "You\'re not really in a position to be making demands, or threats. Call off your dogs.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-11", "Are we clear on this?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-12", "You two will not be safe for long, Berlinski. The Group finds a way. Always.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent20-Text-13", "Then you better get going, so long, ta ta.")

Rows.Name: PromFractureEvent21End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent21End-Text-0", "You alright, friend? Wow. What a ride.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent21End-Text-1", "I meant what I said, the data is secure, but I wouldn\'t trust the Group for any more assignments.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent21End-Text-2", "They\'re going to try and find a way around our little deal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent21End-Text-3", "But it buys us some time.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent21End-Text-4", "Keep this information to yourself for now. We\'ll need to lay low for a bit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent21End-Text-5", "I had hoped Mo was still with us, but now I know why she left... I just wish things were different.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent21End-Text-6", "We need her help to move on this, I wonder what other shady dealings Group 15 have been hiding.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent21End-Text-7", "Keep a weather eye open, it\'s just you and me ... for now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PromFractureEvent21End-Text-8", "Sol, out.")

Rows.Name: PROM_FRACTURE_EVENT17a
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PROM_FRACTURE_EVENT17a-Text-0", "I don\'t like this, I don\'t like this one bit. ")

Rows.Name: PROM_FRACTURE_EVENT17b
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PROM_FRACTURE_EVENT17b-Text-0", "Prospector, you must leave this area at once.")

Rows.Name: PROM_FRACTURE_EVENT17c
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PROM_FRACTURE_EVENT17c-Text-0", "What the hell are these markings? What the hell have you been messing with down here?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PROM_FRACTURE_EVENT17c-Text-1", "That\'s classified.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PROM_FRACTURE_EVENT17c-Text-2", "Classified my ass, keep going Prospector.")

Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_EXTERMINATION_A-Text-0", "Prospector, a new extermination mission is available.")

Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_EXTERMINATION_B-Text-0", "Prospector, you have been tasked with the extermination of a creature corrupted by exotics in the area. ")

Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_RECOVERY_A-Text-0", "Prospector, a new recovery mission is available.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_RECOVERY_B
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_RECOVERY_B-Text-0", "Prospector, you have been tasked with locating and retrieving a cache of supplies valuable to the UDA.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_RECOVERY_C
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_RECOVERY_C-Text-0", "Prospector, you have been tasked with recovering an item considered valuable to UDA personnel.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_RETRIEVAL_A
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_RETRIEVAL_A-Text-0", "Prospector, a new retrieval mission is available.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_RETRIEVAL_B
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_RETRIEVAL_B-Text-0", "Prospector, you have been tasked with retrieving the dogtags of a fallen contractor. ")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_SCANNING_A
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_SCANNING_A-Text-0", "Prospector, a new scanning mission is available.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_SCANNING_B
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_SCANNING_B-Text-0", "Prospector, you have been tasked with completing a terrain scan in the surrounding area.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_STOCKPILE_A
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_STOCKPILE_A-Text-0", "Prospector, a new stockpile mission is available.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_STOCKPILE_B
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_STOCKPILE_B-Text-0", "Prospector, you have been tasked with amassing a stockpile of various resources from the surrounding area.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_1-Text-0", "The device is located in the supply crate nearby.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_2-Text-0", "The device is stowed in your dropship.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_3-Text-0", "All required items are located in the nearby crate.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_4-Text-0", "You may proceed to the marked location.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_5-Text-0", "Reminder: Do not forget your supplies.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_6-Text-0", "Your next stop is marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_7-Text-0", "Please check the map for your next location.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_8-Text-0", "Attention prospector, your vital signs show evidence of a severe drop in temperature. ")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_9-Text-0", "Attention prospector, your vital signs show evidence of a severe rise in temperature. ")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_10-Text-0", "Please note, this area contains high concentrations of chemicals toxic to humans.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_11-Text-0", "Please note, there may be hostile wildlife in the surrounding area.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_12-Text-0", "The device should be somewhere near your vicinity.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_13-Text-0", "The equipment should be somewhere near your vicinity.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_14-Text-0", "The item should be somewhere near your vicinity.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_15-Text-0", "The wildlife should be somewhere near your vicinity.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_16-Text-0", "The scanning location should be somewhere nearby.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_20

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_21
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "SMPL3_GENERIC_21-Text-0", "Your O.E.S will arrive momentarily.")

Rows.Name: SMPL3_GENERIC_23

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadBriefing-Text-0", "Get ready prospector. Thanks to Group 15, we just got access to a previously off-limits part of Icarus.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadBriefing-Text-1", "Right on the fringe, where the terraforming started falling apart. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadBriefing-Text-2", "This is all new for me too. But from the info in the briefing packet, I can see why they were only letting the brains in. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadBriefing-Text-3", "It\'s.. A little more peculiar than what you\'ve seen of Icarus so far.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadBriefing-Text-4", "By the looks of it the UDA want you to test some... bloody insulting... New AI tech.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadBriefing-Text-5", "This ain\'t for freshfoots.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadBriefing-Text-6", "But there\'s a lot of new planet to explore, you in?")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadIntro-Text-0", "Hey Prospector. This place is pretty different from the rest of the terrazone huh?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadIntro-Text-1", "Data on this section of Icarus is limited, and mostly classified.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadIntro-Text-2", "What we do know is, the terraforming did. not. work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadIntro-Text-3", "On the topic of not working, I have a brand new bit of experimental garbage for ya.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadIntro-Text-4", "The UDA\'s testing out some \'groundbreaking\' new tech, some kinda AI.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadIntro-Text-5", "Think they can replace me with some 8 bit bag of bolts with attitude, hardly pay me anything anyway. Simple? Yeah, simply not needed. It\'s not like I\'m a damn luddite but HELL I\'m more valuable than a talking toaster.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadIntro-Text-6", "Uh, ahem, sorry. It\'ll be in an O.E.S pod nearby, go grab the thing. ")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent1-Text-0", "Prospector? You\'re gonna need that chip, that O.E.S pod should be around here somewhere.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent2-Text-0", "There\'s the pod and there\'s a... what the hell is that... This damn place.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent2-Text-1", "You can either take it out, or sneak past it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent2-Text-2", "Either way, we need that chip.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent3-Text-0", "Alright, you got the stupid thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent3-Text-1", "This is the third version they\'ve worked on, and it seems only good for basic errands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent3-Text-2", "So you\'ll still have me around for a while.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent3-Text-3", "Let\'s see just how awful it really is.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent11-Text-0", "Not sure if this has been brought up before, but we have a new way of doing things now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent11-Text-1", "Now, Sinotai have come up with a fancy new way of shipping your exotic hauls off-world.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent11-Text-2", "They\'re calling it the Orbital Exchange System. O. E. S.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent11-Text-3", "Abandoning all your planetside tech is a thing of the past if you prefer.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent11-Text-4", "Chuck \'em in the pod, and it drops it all off at the station. Pretty cool huh?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent11-Text-5", "It\'s free for now, while they\'re still testing the pods. Who knows how much cash they\'ll rake in from this later.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent11-Text-6", "It works in reverse too. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent11-Text-7", "Say you wanna order some shiny new gear from the workshop up there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent11-Text-8", "You can get it delivered just by pressing a few buttons. What a time to be alive.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent12-Text-0", "Well, that about covers it. Your next few missions will be delivered from the disembodied robot voice until you get back to UDA level.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent12-Text-1", "You\'ve gotta build the Infrasonic Relay Device for that. Then we can get back to working together again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent12-Text-2", "Everyone out here is starting from scratch, gotta prove your mettle.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent12-Text-3", "I\'ll see you in a bit, try not to die out here?")

Rows.Name: OpenWorldIntroOly
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-0", "Olympus. Closest we came to successful terraformin\'.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-1", "Probably the safest place on Icarus... uh... but that\'s not sayin much.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-2", "UDA has opened up the entire area for you to explore.")
