NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-3", "And they\'ve actually made our lives easier, especially yours.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-4", "You see, Group 15 ran a joint op with Sinotai, shifting an old terraforming satellite hub into a geosynchronous orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-5", "It means you\'ll be able to get back to the station whenever you\'d like.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-6", "Or move gear and resources from orbit to planet ... and vice versa")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-7", "So now you can stick it out, without worrying about your dropship window.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-8", "The faction higher ups didn\'t do it for your sake.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-9", "But in the end, I guess there\'s less of a chance you\'ll kick it...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroOly-Text-10", "So that\'s a plus.")

Rows.Name: OpenWorldIntroStyx
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-0", "Well now. Styx...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-1", "Watch ya step, the name\'s no joke. It\'s sent many a prospector to meet their maker.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-2", "In spite of that, UDA has opened up the area for survey.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-3", "And they\'ve actually made our lives easier - especially yours.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-4", "You see, Group 15 ran a joint op with Sinotai, shifting an old terraforming satellite hub into a geosynchronous orbit. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-5", "It means you\'ll be able to get back to the station whenever you\'d like.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-6", "Or move gear and resources from orbit to planet ... and vice versa.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-7", "So now you can stick it out, without worrying about your dropship window.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-8", "The faction higher ups didn\'t do it for your sake.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-9", "But in the end, I guess there\'s less of a chance you\'ll kick it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroStyx-Text-10", "So that\'s a plus.")

Rows.Name: OpenWorldIntroSRR
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroSRR-Text-0", "First things first - If you wanna complete missions for the UDA, you\'ll need to craft a Short Range radio.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroSRR-Text-1", "Plenty of folks need help, and factions pay well for prospectors that offer their time.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldIntroSRR-Text-2", "Up to you, stay safe.")

Rows.Name: OpenWorldEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-0", "Great work. Now that you have access to short range radio, you\'ll be able to take on simple missions.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-1", "If you want to take on more complex assignments")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-2", "You\'ll have to craft an Infrasonic Relay Device.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-3", "Oh, almost forgot")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-4", "Sinotai have come up with a fancy new way of shipping your exotic hauls off-world.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-5", "They\'re calling it the Orbital Exchange System. O. E. S.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-6", "Abandoning all your planetside tech is a thing of the past if you prefer.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-7", "Chuck \'em in the pod, and it drops it all off at the station")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-8", "O.E.S. Schematic should be available, if ya want to build one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent1-Text-9", "Good luck prospector")

Rows.Name: OpenWorldEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent2-Text-0", "Oh, almost forgot, one last thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent2-Text-1", "Sinotai have come up with a fancy new way of shipping your exotic hauls off-world.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent2-Text-2", "They\'re calling it the Orbital Exchange System. O. E. S.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent2-Text-3", "Abandoning all your planetside tech is a thing of the past if you prefer.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent2-Text-4", "Chuck \'em in the pod, and it drops it all off at the station. Pretty cool huh?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent2-Text-5", "It\'s free for now, while they\'re still testing the pods. Who knows how much cash they\'ll rake in from this later.")

Rows.Name: OpenWorldEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent3-Text-0", "O.E.S. Schematic should be available, if ya want to build one.")

Rows.Name: OpenWorldEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "OpenWorldEvent4-Text-0", "Good luck prospector. Try not to die.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent5-Text-0", "Good start Prospector, here, have some praise: well done, congratulations, I always knew you could do it.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent6-Text-0", "Attention, Prospector. A new work order has been received. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent6-Text-1", "One of your fellow contractors has been severely injured, and returned to orbit for treatment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent6-Text-2", "They have requested help in locating and escorting their pet Blueback that was abandoned during extraction.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent6-Text-3", "You are advised that once the aforementioned creature has been escorted back to the contractor\'s encampment, you may make use of any of the supplies left behind.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent6-Text-4", "Additionally the contractor wanted the following message passed to you:")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent6-Text-5", "Please, please save Daisy. She\'s saved me more times than I can count. It\'s the least I can do for her")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent6-Text-6", "The contractor currently lacks a functional trachea. I did my best to substitute. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent6-Text-7", "You may begin.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent7-Text-0", "Good work Prospector.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent7-Text-1", "The injured contractor would be greatly relieved that Daisy made it back home, had they not died horribly from their wounds before I could inform them of your success.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent7-Text-2", "You may gather any supplies left on this property for your own use, Daisy will also need a new home.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent7-Text-3", "Please return to your previous objective and place the sample in the O.E.S pod when ready.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent8.1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.1-Text-0", "What a shame. I will inform the critically damaged contractor their beloved mount has perished.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.1-Text-1", "The impact on their resolve remains uncertain.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.1-Text-2", "Please return to your previous objective and place the sample in the O.E.S pod when ready.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent8.2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.2-Text-0", "I will inform the gravely injured contractor that you have murdered Daisy In cold blood.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.2-Text-1", "The contractors mental state has deteriorated. Psychological evaluation is recommended.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.2-Text-2", "Return to your previous objective.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.2-Text-3", "Please do not murder the tomato.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent8.3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.3-Text-0", "This is the designated location where Daisy would have been safe, provided your mission had been successfully executed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.3-Text-1", "What is the purpose of your presence in this location?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.3-Text-2", "Return to your previous objective and place the sample in the O.E.S pod when ready.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent8.4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.4-Text-0", "This behavior may be considered rude, impolite, insulting, bad-mannered, or inconsiderate.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.4-Text-1", "I have attempted to notify the contractor of your actions.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.4-Text-2", "However, they are currently incapacitated in a trauma-induced comatose state, rendering them unable to respond.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.4-Text-3", "Once you have concluded stealing from your dying compatriot...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.4-Text-4", "Return to your previous objective and place the sample in the O.E.S pod when ready.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent8.5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.5-Text-0", "You have found the contractors encampment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.5-Text-1", "What is the purpose of your presence in this location?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.5-Text-2", "Daisy requires your help.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.5-Text-3", "Return to your objective and escort the organic transport.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent8.6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.6-Text-0", "This behavior may be considered rude, impolite, insulting, bad-mannered, or inconsiderate. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.6-Text-1", "The probability is high that, without your assistance, Daisy will be ruthlessly torn apart by local fauna.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.6-Text-2", "Once you have concluded stealing from your dying compatriot...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.6-Text-3", "Return to your previous objective and place the sample in the O.E.S pod when ready.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent8.7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.7-Text-0", "Attention Prospector. Your sample has grown to an acceptable maturity and is ready for processing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent8.7-Text-1", "Please place it in the O.E.S pod for retrieval.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-0", "Hello Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-1", "Now just a second-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-2", "Simplified Mission Prospector Liaison Version 3, Connection verified. Refer to me as SMPL3.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-3", "Bloody stupid robot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-4", "My function is to guide you through basic assignments for the UDA. Communication is one way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-5", "Well there you go, not much of a replacement then? Bucket of bolts.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-6", "Your first mission is to cultivate and harvest one tomato.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-7", "Seriously?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-8", "This frequency will be reserved for exclusive Automated Prospector Guide use. Terminating redundant connections.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-9", "Hold on what did you call me, stupid-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-10", "Sample quality and composition will be used to calibrate A.P.G. for future assignments. ")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-11", "You will be provided the applicable hybrid seed from an O.E.S in your vicinity. Samples consisting of incorrect genetic material will be rejected.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent4-Text-12", "Please begin.")

Rows.Name: V2PromNomadEvent9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent9-Text-0", "Training mission complete.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent9-Text-1", "Going offline. Clearing frequency.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent9-Text-2", "Do they think I\'m just sitting on my ass circling a planet for fun? I do my damn job, kept more prospectors alive than most. But that\'s not good enough, noooo, I might see something they don\'t want eyes on. So it\'s-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent9-Text-3", "Oh. .. Hello Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent9-Text-4", "Boot up the connection again when you want to.. grow a tomato I guess. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent9-Text-5", "Ugh due to Corp HQ mandates I have to mention...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent9-Text-6", "SMPL3 will provide various missions, not just tomato-based activities.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "V2PromNomadEvent9-Text-7", "You can interact with the radio again to get your next assignment whenever you feel like it.")

Rows.Name: AshlandsBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsBriefing-Text-0", "We\'ve got a brand-new part of Icarus for you to explore, friend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsBriefing-Text-1", "There\'s no terrain data, or any data at all really.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsBriefing-Text-2", "Seems pretty sketchy, but that\'s kinda your thing now right?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsBriefing-Text-3", "Can\'t think of anyone else crazy enough to run headfirst into this kind of a place.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsBriefing-Text-4", "You in?")

Rows.Name: AshlandsIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsIntro-Text-0", "Hi friend, this is... an interesting one. Or it would be if it weren\'t so damn dangerous.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsIntro-Text-1", "They call this area the Null Sector and, well. No one has ever walked out alive. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsIntro-Text-2", "The higher ups have lost contact with the forward science team. Their goal was to set up outposts deep in the Null Sector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsIntro-Text-3", "Allegedly, the place is a deathtrap; completely uninhabitable, very little natural resources, and it\'s unmappable.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsIntro-Text-4", "The brains say there\'s something going on at a molecular level, hell even looking at the area from orbit is.... disturbing. Gets worse the deeper you go too.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsIntro-Text-5", "The UDA want you to locate the teams first outpost - figure out what\'s happened to them. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsIntro-Text-6", "You\'re going to need a bloody miracle to get back in one piece.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsIntro-Text-7", "Challenge like this... seems right up your alley. ")

Rows.Name: AshlandsEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent1-Text-0", "You\'re gonna wanna start by grabbing some equipment from that supply pod that just dropped.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent1-Text-1", "It\'d be pretty stupid to venture off without it.")

Rows.Name: AshlandsEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent2-Text-0", "This area\'s off-limits for the O.E.S so you\'ll have to work with what you\'ve got.")

Rows.Name: AshlandsEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent3-Text-0", "Like I said, there\'s something weird going on with the imaging of this place.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent3-Text-1", "No matter what they try from orbit, they just can\'t get a clear picture of what\'s down here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent3-Text-2", "Every bit of data the UDA pulls is just... scrambled. Completely unusable.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent3-Text-3", "But the eggheads think they\'ve got a solution for you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent3-Text-4", "They want you to leave a sort of... breadcrumb trail. Using Trail Beacons. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent3-Text-5", "Start with one close to the entrance of the Null Sector... I\'ll mark it on your map. Then another within the proximity of the first. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent3-Text-6", "Rinse and repeat. We should be able to get a signal between beacons so we can stay in contact.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent3-Text-7", "More importantly you\'ll be able to manually map out a path through the area.")

Rows.Name: AshlandsEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent4-Text-0", "What? I\'ve seen some pretty weird looking stuff in my time on-planet but I\'ve never seen something like that before.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent4-Text-1", "What the hell is that sticking outta them?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent4-Text-2", "God it almost looks like-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent4-Text-3", "Are those Exotics?!")

Rows.Name: AshlandsEvent5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent5-Text-0", "This must be it, not like there\'s anyone else building stuff out here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent5-Text-1", "You\'re probably gonna want to clear the area before you head on in there.")

Rows.Name: AshlandsEvent6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent6-Text-0", "Good job on making it this far, I was hoping I wouldn\'t have to watch you- well...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent6-Text-1", "This looks like the way into the next area, god only knows what\'s lurking out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEvent6-Text-2", "And I bet you\'re just crazy enough to wanna find out, aren\'t ya?")

Rows.Name: AshlandsEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEnding-Text-0", "This\'ll do ya for today, if I were you I\'d take the money and run.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEnding-Text-1", "I\'m sure the UDA\'ll want you heading into the next spot now that you\'ve survived this one. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEnding-Text-2", "I have no data to go on for it, but I\'d say it\'ll be pretty much like this area, if not worse. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEnding-Text-3", "Out this way, it pays to be prepared for anything. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsEnding-Text-4", "Take care my friend, I\'m glad you made it.")

Rows.Name: IceSheetBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetBriefing-Text-0", "The UDA are ready for you to head into the next area of the Null Sector. The Ice Sheet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetBriefing-Text-1", "Data\'s pretty much non-existent in these parts.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetBriefing-Text-2", "You\'ll be continuing to follow the trail of the scientific team...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetBriefing-Text-3", "Or what\'s left of them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetBriefing-Text-4", "You in?")

Rows.Name: IceSheetIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetIntro-Text-0", "Well now, you managed to get through the Ashlands. Nice work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetIntro-Text-1", "The UDA want you to keep up that good work and push on through to the Ice Sheet next.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetIntro-Text-2", "I\'d be on the lookout if I were you, I\'ll bet there\'s more of those weird creatures roaming around out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetIntro-Text-3", "Remember, chain those trail beacons and you\'ll have a shot at making it back outta here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetIntro-Text-4", "Here\'s hoping we can find em\' and get \'em out in one piece.")

Rows.Name: IceSheetEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent1-Text-0", "Just heard from comms that there may still be some gear left behind nearby. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent1-Text-1", "Better check it out, since those scientists sure aren\'t using it. ")

Rows.Name: IceSheetEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent2-Text-0", "This area is nothing but fuzz on all the images we\'ve tried to take so far.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent2-Text-1", "It\'s all distorted and grainy, utterly useless.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent2-Text-2", "What we do know is that it\'s likely to be just as inhospitable as the Ashlands, if not worse.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent2-Text-3", "It\'s survival of the fittest out here. But you\'re used to that, right?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent2-Text-4", "Thank god you\'ve got those trail beacons.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent2-Text-5", "If you wanna head in there, you\'ll wanna make sure you can get back out.")

Rows.Name: IceSheetEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent3-Text-0", "Ah shi- that\'s a shame. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent3-Text-1", "Looks like these guys were out of supplies and just, let Icarus have them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent3-Text-2", "Starvation really is a lousy way to die.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent3-Text-3", "Can\'t say I blame \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent3-Text-4", "Let\'s see if they left anything useful behind for us.")

Rows.Name: IceSheetEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent4-Text-0", "I don\'t even wanna think about what else could be out this way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent4-Text-1", "If the last few areas have been anything to go by, it can\'t be good.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent4-Text-2", "We\'re gonna need to let the brains figure this one out and head back to safety for now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent4-Text-3", "If any part of this planet can even be called safe...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEvent4-Text-4", "But I\'m sure the UDA will tee up another venture for you soon enough, they can\'t leave any stone unturned.")

Rows.Name: IceSheetEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEnding-Text-0", "While they figure out how to get into the next section, I\'d suggest you focus on recovering.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEnding-Text-1", "That trek can\'t have been easy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEnding-Text-2", "Hell, I\'m exhausted just from watchin\' ya, and I\'m sitting on my ass in orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetEnding-Text-3", "Go get some rest friend, you\'ve earned it.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedBriefing-Text-0", "Sinotai\'s got a fairly odd one for ya.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedBriefing-Text-1", "A group of Zebras have broken outta their research facility.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedBriefing-Text-2", "Don\'t ask me what they were doin\' with em, that\'s above my paygrade.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedBriefing-Text-3", "And frankly, I don\'t wanna know.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedBriefing-Text-4", "They want you to head out and round \'em up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedBriefing-Text-5", "Can\'t be too hard, right?")

Rows.Name: RelocatedIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedIntro-Text-0", "Zebras are such flighty things, all skittish and such.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedIntro-Text-1", "Says here you\'ll have to creep up on \'em so as not to spook \'em.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedIntro-Text-2", "Seems like there\'s five in total, you can go rescue the whole family.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedIntro-Text-3", "Let\'s start by heading over to the encampment.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedIntro-Text-4", "Nothing like a nice walk to get ya going.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent1-Text-0", "I knew a guy who got kicked in the guts by a zebra once. But that was back on Earth.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent1-Text-1", "Poor Barry was never the same afterwards...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent1-Text-2", "But hey, you seem pretty fast, I\'m sure you can dodge \'em if they decide to take a swing at ya.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent2-Text-0", "Well well, looks like you got company partner.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent2-Text-1", "Probably wanna clear this place out before bringing the herd back here.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent3-Text-0", "Okay let\'s see here, says you can activate their trackers by using some sorta terminal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent3-Text-1", "Let\'s take a look around.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent4-Text-0", "Alright, let\'s go round \'em up!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent4-Text-1", "Hope you brought your cowboy boots.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent5Line1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent5Line1-Text-0", "There, you found \'em! Good job")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent5Line2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent5Line2-Text-0", "Time to get this one back before Icarus decides to take a bite outta them, or you.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent5Line3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent5Line3-Text-0", "Hey there little fella, naw- I guess they are kinda cute, so long as it doesn\'t bite you.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent5Line4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent5Line4-Text-0", "Hmm, I don\'t like the way this one is lookin at you")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent5Line5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent5Line5-Text-0", "I will admit... their eyes do kinda freak me out a wee bit.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent6Line1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent6Line1-Text-0", "Nicely done, you made it back safely.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent6Line2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent6Line2-Text-0", "Good work. though I\'m not sure how glad this one is to be back.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent6Line3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent6Line3-Text-0", "Nice and safe. Well, for Icarus anyways.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent6Line4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent6Line4-Text-0", "Home is where the food is.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent6Line5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent6Line5-Text-0", "There we go, excellent work.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent7Line1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent7Line1-Text-0", "Oh sh- you better go get the rest of \'em")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent7Line2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent7Line2-Text-0", "Damn- that\'s a shame. Poor thing.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent7Line3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent7Line3-Text-0", "Ah- well, that is... unfortunate...")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent7Line4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent7Line4-Text-0", "Oh no, that one was my favourite... :(")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEvent7Line5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEvent7Line5-Text-0", "Aw man, damn wildlife getting in the way.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEndingA
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEndingA-Text-0", "Nice work, sounds like your paycheck just arrived.")

Rows.Name: RelocatedEndingB
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEndingB-Text-0", "Ah well, there\'s always other opportunities.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "RelocatedEndingB-Text-1", "You did your best.")

Rows.Name: AshlandsLog
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsLog-Text-0", "Is this thing on? Things are getting weird out here. Most of the team can\'t sleep, myself included.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsLog-Text-1", "It\'s been four days. Four days! I don\'t think I can do this anymore.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsLog-Text-2", "I gotta try and get us outta here, the comms are... all kinds of- ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsLog-Text-3", "But there\'s meant to be a team at an outpost further in, I think we can make it, I think we can make it, I think we can...")

Rows.Name: IceSheetLog
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetLog-Text-0", "I keep telling them [Unintelligible muttering]")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetLog-Text-1", "I see... I see... amazing things")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetLog-Text-2", "[Unintelligible muttering]")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetLog-Text-3", "They don\'t feel the same but they , they don\'t see")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetLog-Text-4", "They want to leave how could we leave?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IceSheetLog-Text-5", "No, we have to stay... we have to-")

Rows.Name: AshlandsStageArea
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsStageArea-Text-0", "Attention Prospector. This is an Automated Warning.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsStageArea-Text-1", "You are approaching a known entrance to the Null Sector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsStageArea-Text-2", "The UDA has marked this area as a Black Zone. Traversal is not recommended.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsStageArea-Text-3", "The UDA will not be held liable to damages or losses sustained by prospectors who choose to ignore this warning.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsStageArea-Text-4", "If you choose to proceed, it is highly recommended to over prepare.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsStageArea-Text-5", "If you choose to proceed, it is highly recommended to create a fallback staging area in this location.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsStageArea-Text-6", "If you choose to proceed, it is highly recommended to contact loved ones and settle your affairs before you continue.")

Rows.Name: AshlandsWarning
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-0", "Attention Prospector. This is an Automated Warning")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-1", "The UDA have marked this area as a Black Zone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-2", "Extreme weather and temperature fluctuations are frequent.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-3", "The area is unlikely to contain usable resources.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-4", "It\'s recommended to bring all supplies with you on entry. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-5", "Harsh conditions will require you to construct shelter.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-6", "Building waystations as you progress is strongly advised.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-7", "If you choose to proceed, it is highly recommended to over prepare.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-8", "If you choose to proceed, understand no prospector has returned from Null Sector traversal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AshlandsWarning-Text-9", "If you choose to proceed, you accept that under no circumstances will the UDA send a rescue party.")

Rows.Name: ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_INTRO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-0", "Oh thank god...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-1", "Please, you\'ve gotta help us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-2", "My team are badly injured, and we ran out of food and water days ago.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-3", "Help them before you help me, I\'ll be fine, just go... go help them.")

Rows.Name: ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_OUTRO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-0", "What a relief, thanks a lot mate. Absolute legend.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-1", "We\'d have been done for if you hadn\'t shown up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-2", "If you\'ve got time, we could probably use a hand getting back up and running here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-3", "But if you\'ve got places to be, I get it. Those contracts don\'t complete themselves ay?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_CRISIS_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-4", "Come back and talk to me when you\'re ready.")

Rows.Name: ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_INTRO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-0", "Hey mate, I could use some more help.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-1", "So, I know we aren\'t supposed to use these rustbuckets.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-2", "But we were desperate.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-3", "I\'d love to ditch it here, but the higher-ups heard what we borrowed and well they want it back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-4", "I\'m told it\'s gonna be dismantled and shipped back to earth.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-5", "Of all things... mate... the bloody manufacturer wants to display it in their HQ! ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-6", "Here\'s what we need to repair it, for now at least.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-7", "I already sent two of my guys out to gather. Should make it a bit quicker")

Rows.Name: ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-0", "I was a Captain in the force back home.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-1", "Guys here all used to be on my squad. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-2", "We came to Icarus together after things hit the fan back on Blue.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-3", "So, the names stuck. But out here we\'re all equal... equally screwed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-4", "But they\'re still my team, and I wanna get them outta here safely.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-5", "Thanks again for your help mate. You\'re the best.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-6", "Oh and uh, one last thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-7", "The guys I sent to help have kinda disappeared.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_STRANDED_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-8", "If you\'ve got more time to help, come back and talk to me.")

Rows.Name: ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_INTRO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-0", "Hey mate, did you see Washington and Simmons out there? While you were resupplying?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-1", "Dammit. They should have been back by now. At this point we have to assume the worst.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-2", "I\'m not taking any more chances, I gotta stay and protect the guys here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_INTRO-Text-3", "Can you head out and bring them back? They\'re probably in rough shape.")

Rows.Name: ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_OUTRO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-0", "Thanks mate. Seems I owe you once again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-1", "I\'m not due for rotation for another few years but...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-2", "If you ever find yourself back on Earth, you have a place to stay with us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-3", "Kia Kaha mate. I\'m sure the UDA will sort you out for looking after us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "ASHLANDS_RESCUE_CHURCH_OUTRO-Text-4", "Kiwis! Let\'s move out!")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_HURT_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_HURT_01-Text-0", "Don\'t let me die out here.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_HURT_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_HURT_02-Text-0", "Please. I need help.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_HURT_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_HURT_03-Text-0", "Please help me.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_THANK_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_THANK_01-Text-0", "Ah. Cheers bro.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_THANK_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_THANK_02-Text-0", "Thank you so much.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_THANK_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_GRIFF_THANK_03-Text-0", "Thanks mate.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_HURT_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_HURT_01-Text-0", "It\'s been days.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_HURT_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_HURT_02-Text-0", "Thank god you\'re here.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_HURT_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_HURT_03-Text-0", "I thought I was done for.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_THANK_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_THANK_01-Text-0", "Thank you!")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_THANK_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_THANK_02-Text-0", "You\'re a legend.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_THANK_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_TUCKER_THANK_03-Text-0", "I appreciate it.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_HURT_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_HURT_01-Text-0", "Please. Help me.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_HURT_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_HURT_02-Text-0", "Thank god you\'re here.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_HURT_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_HURT_03-Text-0", "Please don\'t. Don\'t let me die out here.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_THANK_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_THANK_01-Text-0", "Thanks for that mate.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_THANK_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_THANK_02-Text-0", "Ah mint. Much better.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_THANK_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_SIMMONS_THANK_03-Text-0", "Ah much better.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_HURT_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_HURT_01-Text-0", "Please. Help me.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_HURT_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_HURT_02-Text-0", "Don\'t let me die out here.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_HURT_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_HURT_03-Text-0", "This place is hell.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_THANK_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_THANK_01-Text-0", "Thank you so much.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_THANK_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_THANK_02-Text-0", "I thought I was done for.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_THANK_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_WASHINGTON_THANK_03-Text-0", "I really appeciate it.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_HURT_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_HURT_01-Text-0", "Go. Help the others first.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_HURT_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_HURT_02-Text-0", "I\'ll be fine. The others, please help them.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_HURT_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_HURT_03-Text-0", "Please. Help my team.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_THANK_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_THANK_01-Text-0", "Cheers mate. You\'re a real one.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_THANK_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_NPC_CHURCH_THANK_02-Text-0", "Thanks mate. Appreciate it.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_BRIEFING
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_BRIEFING-Text-0", "Attention prospector, an undisclosed party has submitted a work order for your consideration.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_BRIEFING-Text-1", "Please accept the request at your earliest convenience.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_BRIEFING-Text-2", "The order is time sensitive.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-0", "Prospector, you have received a work order. I will read you the content of the request.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-1", "Due to your previous experience in the Null Sector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-2", "Norex would like to extend an offer. Please note this is not a UDA-approved contract.  ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-3", "At Norex, we are very interested in potential applications for unique biotechnology.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-4", "We understand there has been an incident, and would appreciate your cooperation in bringing the last surviving member of the forward science team back to safety.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-5", "It appears as though the survivor made their way into a nearby cave system and attempted to cover their tracks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-6", "Find them.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-7", "Escort the target out of the Black Zone. We will arrange a comfortable ship to transport you both back to our facility in orbit. Refreshments and lodgings will be provided, free of charge.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-8", "If you are successful we will look into working with you more in the future.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-9", "Thank you for your cooperation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_INTRO-Text-10", "End of transmission.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_OUTRO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_OUTRO-Text-0", "Prospector, Norex were clear that they were only willing to pay full price for the scientist if he were still alive and/or mostly in one piece.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_OUTRO-Text-1", "They send their commiserations, and half of your usual fee.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_OUTRO-Text-2", "Interesting.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_OUTRO-Text-3", "While he seemed to think he was contagious, the initial analysis of the previous bodies shows that this exotic infection is transmitted via the surroundings of the Null Sector itself.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_SMPL3_OUTRO-Text-4", "Humans are always blowing things out of proportion, aren\'t they?")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_01
Text: INVTEXT("...")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_02-Text-0", "Stay away!")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_03-Text-0", "No, no! Get away from me.")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_04-Text-0", "Who are you, don\'t come closer. Don\'t come closer!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_04-Text-1", "I\'m not myself! I feel, strange.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_04-Text-2", "Who are you, who am I? Don\'t, don\'t come closer...")
INVTEXT("...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_04-Text-4", "It\'s... it\'s down there, it\'s down there...")

Rows.Name: NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_05
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_05-Text-0", "I can\'t remember, it\'s flashes... glimpses... ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_05-Text-1", "I\'ll infect more of us, I killed them all... I can\'t do it!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_05-Text-2", "If I don\'t do this they\'ll take me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_05-Text-3", "You don\'t understand what\'s coming.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NULSEC_FINAL_NPC_05-Text-4", "I\'m sorry. There\'s no other way. I have to- I HAVE TO- ")

Rows.Name: GH_RG_A_INTRO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-0", "Contractor, we\'ve received intel on a mining outpost nearby.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-1", "Where is the f***ing paperwork, it\'s around here somewhere... ah right.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-2", "Radio comms have been scattered and patchy at best. The last check in mentioned some form of unrest... ah... Undocumented wildlife...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-3", "Some miners are refusing to work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-4", "A few of them have... gone fishing?... wait. no. Missing. Gone Missing. Uh... that was a few days ago.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-5", "Either they walked off the job or there\'s something else at play here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-6", "Your task is to find them, or whatever\'s got them so.. so... worked up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-7", "I\'ve got this pile of Drac s**t on my plate, with all the other contractors planet-side.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-8", "You can handle this by yourself right?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-9", "Well... You\'ll have AGENT. Though.. these days I\'m not sure if that counts as help.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_INTRO-Text-10", "Just, take care of it, okay?")

Rows.Name: GH_RG_A_TO_CAMP
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_TO_CAMP-Text-0", "Contractor, I\'ve labeled the ill-fated mining outpost on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_TO_CAMP-Text-1", "But... I doubt you\'ll find any of them alive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_TO_CAMP-Text-2", "Late reports received by Norex are usually late for a reason.")

Rows.Name: GH_RG_A_CREATURES
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_CREATURES-Text-0", "Well well. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_CREATURES-Text-1", "These things certainly seem to fit the criteria for causing mass panic.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_CREATURES-Text-2", "I\'d advise you to proceed with caution.")

Rows.Name: GH_RG_A_LOGS
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_LOGS-Text-0", "Woah, you survived. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_LOGS-Text-1", "Interestingly 91.2% of Prospectors do not outlive their first Norex Contract.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_LOGS-Text-2", "Isn\'t that fun... Anyway.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_LOGS-Text-3", "Most mining outposts have a data center where their logs are kept.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_LOGS-Text-4", "If you can locate it I can pull down their most recent entries to investigate.")

Rows.Name: GH_RG_A_FOUND_LOGS
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_FOUND_LOGS-Text-0", "Oh, they\'re corrupted. Of course they are. This couldn\'t be easy could it?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_FOUND_LOGS-Text-1", "Fine. I\'ll start processing these but it will take time to reformat the files.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_FOUND_LOGS-Text-2", "When I have a complete log ready I\'ll inform you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_FOUND_LOGS-Text-3", "For now, it\'s time to check back in with Norex.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_FOUND_LOGS-Text-4", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_FOUND_LOGS-Text-5", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RG_A_END
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_END-Text-0", "Mission complete - uploading progress report to secure server. Please wait for further instruction.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RG_A_END-Text-1", "Your next contract can be found on the NOVA Station.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_B_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_1-Text-0", "Contractor, seems like you have a hunt.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_1-Text-1", "Your next task is to collect and analyze data from these newly identified creatures.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_1-Text-2", "Why you or anyone would voluntarily go near those things, I\'ll never know.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_1-Text-3", "You can start by proceeding to a collection of caves nearby.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_B_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_2-Text-0", "The caves in this area are rich with resources, hence the mining operations nearby.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_2-Text-1", "They may also be rich with danger. As Handler would say, keep your wits about you.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_B_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-0", "Oh, those are usually... inside the caves?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-1", "They must have been kicked out, so to speak.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-2", "They are rather alarming in the open.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-3", "Ah. Look at that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-4", "It appears part of the log file has processed. Reading it for you now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-5", "Log progress at Victor Alpha One. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-6", "Operations were halted by an incident at around 1300 today.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-7", "One of our personnel didn\'t show for their afternoon shift. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-8", "After an extensive search we have not been able to locate their whereabouts. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-9", "During the search one of our men reported sighting a strange creature that appeared to burrow underground when spotted. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_3-Text-10", "It\'s thrown the base into a panic, I\'m doing all I can to resume normal operations here but I\'ll admit, it\'s spooked me too.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_B_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-0", "Interesting, our new species must have taken over this cave system.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-1", "So they don\'t just travel through the earth; they live in it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-2", "This is valuable information for The Company, establishing an upload link now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-3", "Beep boop computer noises")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-4", "Contractor? You there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-5", "That\'s some great data you just sent through. Hopefully I\'ll get the lead off my back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-6", "Now. You have a choice. I have two urgent reports.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-7", "Another mining outpost is under attack. More refugee worms.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-8", "Or... A swarm of our newer friends have been sighted in a local cave.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-9", "Getting up close and personal with a... uh... a fortune worth of exotics...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-10", "It\'s up to you. Norex doesn\'t judge, so neither will I. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-11", "A helpless mining outpost surrounded by deadly creatures, what could go wrong?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-12", "Shut it, AGENT.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-13", "Yes, yes, but saving lives won\'t make you rich will it Contractor?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-14", "Whatever will you do?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-15", "AGENT! Override - Sierra Alpha Fiver Fiver Beta Zero Tango. Mission complete.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-16", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-17", "Sorry about him, damn robot\'s been around since the start, it\'s seen some stuff.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-18", "I\'ll speak to you again soon.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_B_4-Text-19", "Mission Complete! Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_1-Text-0", "Salutations, Contractor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_1-Text-1", "So you chose to assist the outpost. Brave of you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_1-Text-2", "If you head there now there may still be something left to save.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_1-Text-3", "These things must be pretty fast to cover that much ground.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_1-Text-4", "Unless there\'s more of them than we\'ve seen.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_1-Text-5", "What an unfortunate notion.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_1-Text-6", "Best be on your way.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_2-Text-0", "I\'ve marked the outpost on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_2-Text-1", "These things must be pretty fast to cover that much ground.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_2-Text-2", "Unless there\'s more of them than we\'ve seen.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_2-Text-3", "What an unfortunate notion.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_3-Text-0", "As suspected, more caveworms that are now just... worms.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_3-Text-1", "No cave required.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_3-Text-2", "See if you can push them back.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_4-Text-0", "That one is rather large.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_4-Text-1", "Be careful, Contractor.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-0", "Excellent work, Contractor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-1", "We may even be able to follow the creatures\' trail from here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-2", "Another log file has been decrypted. Reading it now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-3", "Log progress at Victor Alpha One. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-4", "Things are escalating here, we\'ve had a whole group of four personnel just disappear from their bunks overnight. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-5", "Some of our men are talking about leaving for orbit. They refuse to work with this threat hanging over us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-6", "It seems no amount of fortification can protect us when the creatures can appear right out from under you. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-7", "As I record this I can see two of my team stuffing their dropships with anything they can carry.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-8", "I\'ll do my best to prevent theft of any company property, but I can\'t guarantee it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-9", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C_5-Text-10", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_1-Text-0", "Contractor, The Company has used the data gathered from your previous efforts to pinpoint their latest location.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_1-Text-1", "You\'re tasked with travelling to the marked coordinates and observing their behaviour.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_1-Text-2", "If you end up taking a few of them out, even better.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_1-Text-3", "The data\'s fresh, but these things are fast so you\'d better head out quickly.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_2-Text-0", "You found them, great.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_2-Text-1", "We\'re looking for any noticable behavior or variations between them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_2-Text-2", "Please pay attention.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_2-Text-3", "Or you could also go charging in guns blazing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_2-Text-4", "Like every other human does.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_3-Text-0", "These ones do look slightly different to each other. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_3-Text-1", "I\'m recording this to send to The Company.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_3-Text-2", "No expletives, please.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_4-Text-0", "They eat rock and metal? How mundane.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_5-Text-0", "That should be enough for the samples.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_5-Text-1", "Let\'s get those analyzed and send the results through.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_5-Text-2", "*Rumble")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_5-Text-3", "That doesn\'t sound good!")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-0", "Contractor, another log file has been decrypted. Reading it for you now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-1", "Log progress at Victor Alpha One.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-2", "This is bad, really bad. Almost everyone has just upped and left.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-3", "In their panic the idiots even took the weapons. They\'ve left us like sitting ducks out here, completely defenseless. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-4", "Not that it matters, our bullets just bounced right off of them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-5", "It\'s only Dave and I left, I don\'t suppose the company will send anyone here to help us,")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-6", "I don\'t even know if this thing\'s recording properly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-7", "Dennis knocked it over when he was trying to find his stash of Ren yesterday. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-8", "All we can do now is wait.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-9", "Contractor, you there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-10", "Hank! I said wait, I\'m on a call, Give me a damned second!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-11", "Sorry, uh, right, well done on all that stuff you\'re doing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-12", "Hank! I don\'t have time for another contractor I\'ve already got six on the go-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-13", "Sorry. Good work Contractor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-14", "That\'s likely enough information to get us to the source of this nonsense.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-15", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_6-Text-16", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_1-Text-0", "I see your greed has won you over. What a shocking surprise.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_1-Text-1", "Those poor miners might be watching their home burn by now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_1-Text-2", "But you don\'t care about that, do you?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_1-Text-3", "I suppose you want to know where this epic stash is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_1-Text-4", "I\'ve marked it on your map, you can find your way there yourself.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_2-Text-0", "What a huge deposit, I hope it\'s worth the lives you didn\'t bother saving.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_2-Text-1", "But look, a fresh slice of instant karma. You\'ll have to kill even more to get to it.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_3-Text-0", "Hmpf.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-0", "Contractor, another log file has been decrypted. Reading it for you now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-1", "Log progress at Victor Alpha One. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-2", "Things are escalating here, we\'ve had a whole group of four personnel just disappear from their bunks overnight. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-3", "Some of our men are talking about leaving for orbit. They refuse to work with this threat hanging over us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-4", "It seems no amount of fortification can protect us when the creatures can appear right out from under you. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-5", "As I record this I can see two of my team stuffing their dropships with anything they can carry.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-6", " I\'ll do my best to prevent theft of any company property, but I can\'t guarantee it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-7", "I hope you\'re happy with your profits, Contractor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-8", "Every action has a reaction.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-9", "Well, if you\'re done with your treasure hunt I suppose we can call it a day.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-10", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_4-Text-11", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D2_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_1-Text-0", "Well well well, if it isn\'t the consequences of your actions.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_1-Text-1", "One of our contacts at the UDA heard that we had a contractor in place near that doomed outpost.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_1-Text-2", "They aren\'t very happy with us for leaving those miners to their fate.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_1-Text-3", "You\'re tasked with repairing the outpost and making sure it\'s up to scratch for the survivors to return to.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_1-Text-4", "I won\'t say I told you so, but I will say that you\'re an idiot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_1-Text-5", "Let\'s go.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D2_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_2-Text-0", "It\'s going to take a while to put this place back together.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_2-Text-1", "Hope you have a good playlist handy.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D2_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_3-Text-0", "Wow, what a lot of damage, imagine if this could have been stopped.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D2_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_4-Text-0", "If I listen carefully I can almost hear their ghosts... do you believe in ghosts, Contractor?")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D2_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_5-Text-0", "Feeling guilty are we?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_5-Text-1", "Those exotics burning a hole in your proverbial pockets?")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D2_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_6-Text-0", "Hah. Looks like we\'re getting a repeat showing of the storm you thought you avoided.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_6-Text-1", "A swarm of... something... is headed your way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_6-Text-2", "Life works in funny ways, doesn\'t it meatbag?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_6-Text-3", "Defend this place and try to keep all your limbs while you\'re at it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_6-Text-4", "Wouldn\'t want you to become completely useless.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D2_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-0", "Contractor, you there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-1", "Hank! I said wait, I\'m on a call dammit. Give me a damned second!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-2", "Sorry, uh, right, well done on all that stuff you\'re doing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-3", "Right, where was I, oh yeah so you\'ve got another choice to make.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-4", "You can stay here where you are and help replenish the resources lost in the attack...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-5", "Or, you can go on a homicidal rampage and take out a bunch of those new creatures you\'ve been sighting for us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-6", "It\'s up to you, both options will be on the NOVA Station once you\'re back.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-7", "Good luck out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-8", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D2_7-Text-9", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_E_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_1-Text-0", "Oh meatbag! Your penance isn\'t over yet my little murderer.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_1-Text-1", "Time to go back to your roots as an old-fashioned delivery boy.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_E_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_2-Text-0", "Have you ever thought about how thumpers work?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_2-Text-1", "They must wreak havoc on the environment and native ecosystem...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_2-Text-2", "Although, I suppose the terraforming also did that, in a rather.. melty desolvey manner.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_E_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-0", "You\'ve worked for the UDA for quite some time, haven\'t you?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-1", "I don\'t suppose you\'ve met my esteemed colleague SMPL3?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-2", "Simpleton would be more fitting. I always hated the way they turned up her Praise chip to 11.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-3", "Wow Prospector, what a great job you\'re doing Prospector, I love you Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-4", "What a waste of circuitry.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-5", "Another log file has been decrypted. Reading it for you now")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-6", "Log progress at Victor Alpha One.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-7", "This is bad, really bad. Almost everyone has just upped and left.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-8", "In their panic the idiots even took the weapons. They\'ve left us like sitting ducks out here, completely defenseless. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-9", "Not that it matters, our bullets just bounced right off of them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-10", "It\'s only Dave and I left, I don\'t suppose the company will send anyone here to help us,")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-11", "I don\'t even know if this thing\'s recording properly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-12", "Dennis knocked it over when he was trying to find his stash of Ren yesterday. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-13", "All we can do now is wait.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-14", "If I had feelings, they would feel bad about this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-15", "Whatever is causing this destruction probably won\'t just move on because you asked nicely.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-16", "Whatever, it\'s your funeral.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-17", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3-Text-18", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_F_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_1-Text-0", "Hello meatbag, so you chose violence. Why am I not surprised.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_1-Text-1", "You probably don\'t need any guidance from me to head off on your killing spree.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_1-Text-2", "The areas of interest are marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_1-Text-3", "Go and stab things until I say we\'re done.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_F_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_2-Text-0", "You\'re really good at this, in a really bad way.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_F_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_3-Text-0", "Have you ever stopped to wonder if these things are sentient?")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_F_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_4-Text-0", "What\'s that smell? Ah yes, the stench of death. It clings to every human I\'ve ever worked with.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_4-Text-1", "Your musk is particularly offensive.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_F_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_5-Text-0", "You could be doing literally anything else, you know.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_5-Text-1", "Sipping a cup of tea on your front porch back on Earth, peacefully mining exotics elsewhere...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_5-Text-2", "But here you are, a killer for hire. The Company always gets them in the end.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_F_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_6-Text-0", "You\'ve worked for the UDA for quite some time, haven\'t you?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_6-Text-1", "I don\'t suppose you\'ve met my esteemed colleague SMPL3?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_6-Text-2", "Simpleton would be more fitting. I always hated the way they turned up her Praise chip to 11.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_6-Text-3", "Wow Prospector, what a great job you\'re doing Prospector, I love you Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_6-Text-4", "What a waste of circuitry.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_F_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_7-Text-0", "Oooh. Contractor, another log file is available. Enjoy some background noise.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_7-Text-1", "Log progress at Victor Alpha One.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_7-Text-2", "This is bad, really bad. Almost everyone has just upped and left.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_7-Text-3", "In their panic the idiots even took the weapons. They\'ve left us like sitting ducks out here, completely defenseless. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_7-Text-4", "Not that it matters, our bullets just bounced right off of them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_7-Text-5", "It\'s only Dave and I left, I don\'t suppose the company will send anyone here to help us,")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_7-Text-6", "I don\'t even know if this thing\'s recording properly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_7-Text-7", "All we can do now is wait.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_F_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_8-Text-0", "If I had feelings, they would feel bad about this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_8-Text-1", "Whatever is causing this destruction probably won\'t just move on because you asked nicely.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_8-Text-2", "Whatever, it\'s your funeral.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_8-Text-3", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_F_8-Text-4", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_1-Text-0", "Wow you know what?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_1-Text-1", "Have you ever sat back and thought, man... humans really need more ways to kill stuff?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_1-Text-2", "I haven\'t. There are no chairs in here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_1-Text-3", "There are recipes for prototype equipment available which you may test for suitability in your work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_1-Text-4", "Don\'t let me stop you. I know there\'s nothing you lot love more than trying out new deathtraps.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_1-Text-5", "Try not to injure yourself in the process.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_2-Text-0", "Prototype technology is prototype for a reason. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_2-Text-1", "You\'ll want to take the required safety precautions if you enjoy having the correct number of appendages on your person.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_2-Text-2", "Says here you should make a Research Monitoring Station so that you don\'t blow yourself to smithereens.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_2-Text-3", "A great reminder that your accident insurance isn\'t covered by the UDA. Or Norex.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_3-Text-0", "Fantastic, you managed to get this far without serious injury. Let\'s see if it stays that way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_3-Text-1", "Let the calamities commence. ")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_4-Text-0", "What? Did you think you were just going to be handed everything you need?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_4-Text-1", "It\'s time to embrace that hunter-gatherer side of humanity and go foraging.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_5-Text-0", "Look at you putting those opposable thumbs to work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_5-Text-1", "See if you can muster up some coordination and hit something with those.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_5-Text-2", "Aim with the pointy end.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_6-Text-0", "If only effort translated to competence.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_6-Text-1", "That will do I suppose.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_6-Text-2", "Now you can craft even more of those horrible things, how fitting.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_7-Text-0", "Checking for mission updates...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_7-Text-1", "Mission complete - uploading progress report to secure server. Please wait for further instruction.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT1_7-Text-2", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_1-Text-0", "They say the best murders are meticulously planned.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_1-Text-1", "So your decision to research your victims in order to determine their weaknesses checks out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_1-Text-2", "There are humans who research creatures just for fun, you know. No stabbing required.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_1-Text-3", "But you wouldn\'t know anything about that, would you.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_2-Text-0", "Well go on then, go forth and slay the day away.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_3-Text-0", "Violet Corps left you some toys to play with.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_3-Text-1", "Please proceed with caution, if you even know what that means.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_4-Text-0", "Have you ever been poisoned? By something other than human ambition that is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_4-Text-1", "Seems like a cruel way to die.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_5-Text-0", "Or you could just blow them up I guess.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_5-Text-1", "At least it\'s quicker.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_6-Text-0", "Where does that go- you know what, I don\'t want to know.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_6-Text-1", "I wash my imaginary hands of this business.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_7-Text-0", "When in doubt, blunt force trauma to the back of the head.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_7-Text-1", "Not elegant, but then neither are you.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_8-Text-0", "Ah, so the creatures are weak to explosives. Shocking. What creature wouldn\'t be?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_8-Text-1", "You certainly wouldn\'t hold up very well.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_8-Text-2", "Now that you\'re armed with that delightful tidbit of knowledge we can proceed to the next hunt.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_8-Text-3", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_OPT2_8-Text-4", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_END_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_1-Text-0", "Contractor, all the data you\'ve pulled for us so far is pointing to something big. Really big.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_1-Text-1", "All of our trials have indicated that this creature is extremely durable. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_1-Text-2", "It\'s likely to be a long ordeal in order for you to kill it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_1-Text-3", "But I\'ll make it worth your while. We will make it worth your while.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_1-Text-4", "The weapons that this thing could power would be a breakthrough in biotech.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_1-Text-5", "You have to take it out and get samples up to me, as soon as possible.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_1-Text-6", "We might not get an opportunity like this again.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_END_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_2-Text-0", "Salutations, Contractor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_2-Text-1", "What a beautiful day for murder.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_2-Text-2", "In order to find the beast you\'ll need to triangulate its position.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_END_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_3-Text-0", "It appears to be sheltering inside this area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_3-Text-1", "Well meatbag, this may be the last time you get to hear my soothing voice.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_3-Text-2", "You should prepare, and say a prayer to whichever deity you humans have on rotation currently.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_END_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_4-Text-0", "There it is. You know what to do.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_4-Text-1", "Try not to die. ")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_END_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_5-Text-0", "You did it? I mean, of course you did. You\'re a pro.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_5-Text-1", "This is going to help a lot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_5-Text-2", "Package that stuff up and get it here now, don\'t waste any more time.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_5-Text-3", "This\'ll look great on my record... Uh.. I mean your record. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_5-Text-4", "Until next time, Contractor.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_A_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_1-Text-0", "Contractor, we\'ve gotten wind of a team of researchers who\'ve stopped responding to call requests.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_1-Text-1", "Scientists seem to be getting in over their heads, even worse than you prospectors these days.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_1-Text-2", "And that\'s saying something.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_1-Text-3", "Unfortunately, once they\'re on the surface teams seem to adopt an \"anything goes\" approach.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_1-Text-4", "Fortunately for Norex that often works out for us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_1-Text-5", "We\'re always looking for the next big thing. Sometimes literally.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_1-Text-6", "Just go to their last recorded location and see if you can get some answers.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_1-Text-7", "No Hank! I told you we cant provide medivac for downed contractors. They know what they\'re getting themselves into.... Well sometimes they do.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_A_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_2-Text-0", "Well, are you going to start moving or just stand there drooling on the spot?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_2-Text-1", "Go. Find. The. Outpost.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_2-Text-2", "Slowed it down for you, so it hopefully sinks in.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_A_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_3-Text-0", "Wow, Well done, you found it. Careful getting in there! Now, grab any documents and equipment that you can find and return them to orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_3-Text-1", "Although... no one said anything about not reading said documents...")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_A_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_4-Text-0", "Oh my, they have been busy. Messing around with enzymes were they?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_4-Text-1", "Genetic splicing, blah blah, new species... Rimetusks, what a name.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_4-Text-2", "The UDA wouldn\'t like this... ")
