NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_4-Text-3", "Hurry up and chuck this stuff in the pod.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_A_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_5-Text-0", "Yes yes, well done and all that. What do you want, a medal?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_5-Text-1", "I\'d wash my hands of this business if I were you, and had hands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_5-Text-2", "Those documents had some rather nasty implications.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_5-Text-3", "I can\'t wait to see what Norex has you do about it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_5-Text-4", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_A_5-Text-5", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_B_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_1-Text-0", "That research team of yours was investigating some rather dicey stuff.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_1-Text-1", "You\'ll need to catch up to them so we can ask them very politely what they were up to.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_1-Text-2", "And why they didn\'t declare it to the UDA first. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_1-Text-3", "Genetic splicing is delicate work, adding enzymes into the mix is just about the worst possible thing they could have done.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_B_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_2-Text-0", "You\'d better get a move on if you want to find these people.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_2-Text-1", "How do you ever get anything done?")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_B_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_3-Text-0", "Ah, it would appear that the researchers have noted down the locations from which they observed these creatures.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_3-Text-1", "It might pay for us, and by us I mean you, to check them out.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_B_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_4-Text-0", "Oh. Well. Search the body. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_4-Text-1", "Probably best to wash your hands afterwards.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_B_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_5-Text-0", "We\'re getting closer.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_5-Text-1", "Hopefully, next time, the parts might be attached.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_B_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_6-Text-0", "Something killed this creature from the inside.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_6-Text-1", "How odd. Thank goodness I don\'t have the ability to smell.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_6-Text-2", "Get a sample... Carefully.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_B_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-0", "We should check in with your boss to see what to do about this mess.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-1", "Establishing a remote connection.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-2", "I\'ve told you a million times Karen I don\'t care- uh, AGENT? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-3", "Salutations, boss.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-4", "What is it? I\'m busy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-5", "The researchers from the base we checked earlier were experimenting with enzymes. Sound familiar?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-6", "Enzymes? Oh god no, that needs to be kept under wraps AGENT.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-7", "Why does this crap always fall on me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-8", "I\'m going to need you to either collect all of that research and send it up to our guys.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-9", "Or, completely wipe it from the face of the planet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-10", "Sure thing, Jeremy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-11", "You- WHAT- uh- That\'s HANDLER to you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-12", "How did you- Nevermind. Just, fix it, okay?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-13", "Call terminated by end user.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-14", "Sounds like it\'s dealer\'s choice.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-15", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_B_7-Text-16", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_1-Text-0", "I hate to say it skinsack, but you\'re right. This research could be useful to Norex.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_1-Text-1", "And you know what contractors get for supplying useful things to The Company?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_1-Text-2", "More murder tools. Lucky you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_1-Text-3", "So, you want to be useful?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_1-Text-4", "You can start by collecting samples to send back up to Norex\'s labs.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_1-Text-5", "Try to avoid direct contact if you can. Or don\'t, I wouldn\'t mind watching you squirm a bit.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_2-Text-0", "Hey, that one looks like you. Vacant behind the eyes.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_3-Text-0", "On closer inspection, this seemed like an intelligent being.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_3-Text-1", "More than I can say for you")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_4-Text-0", "Bringing a species back from extinction.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_4-Text-1", "Just to kill them all over again.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_5-Text-0", "Good job contractor. You did so good at the murder. ")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_6-Text-0", "You look tired... Just one more, contractor.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_7-Text-0", "Look at that. All done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_7-Text-1", "Hurry up and analyze the samples.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_7-Text-2", "Handler is on a call with his ex-wife, I want to go listen.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_8-Text-0", "Oh I would hate to be a courier. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_8-Text-1", "Luckily, I\'ll never have to.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_8-Text-2", "Instead I\'ll while away my days listening to humans prattle on about unimportant things.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_8-Text-3", "Such as joint custody... of Mittens...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_8-Text-4", "Is it common to pay child support for... a cat? Hmm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_8-Text-5", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C_8-Text-6", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C2_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_1-Text-0", "Interesting. The samples you sent up earlier were analyzed by the Norex Experimental Team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_1-Text-1", "They decided that they like what they see, and want to enhance an existing lab planetside.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_1-Text-2", "This is strictly confidential so it looks like you\'ll be playing the part of architect, builder, and lackey.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_1-Text-3", "How very adaptable of you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_1-Text-4", "For Norex to sponsor a lab right under the UDA\'s nose is a big deal.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_1-Text-5", "A mammoth undertaking, if you will. Haha.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_1-Text-6", "You can\'t just set that sort of thing up anywhere, you\'ll need a spot that\'s likely to fly under the radar. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_1-Text-7", "The Company have been explicit in their instructions. I know this may be difficult for you but try not to disappoint them.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C2_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_2-Text-0", "This is the perfect canvas.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C2_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_3-Text-0", "I\'m here to supervise, I\'ll provide valuable feedback during the construction process.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C2_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_4-Text-0", "Hmm It needs more \'wow\' factor.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C2_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_5-Text-0", "Something feels off. Do you think you could make it \'pop\' more.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C2_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_6-Text-0", "I like green. Why isn\'t it green.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C2_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_7-Text-0", "Very well, I\'m dissapointed. But we\'ve run out of time and budget.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_7-Text-1", "I was instrumental in this process. You could never have done this without me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_7-Text-2", "I suppose it\'s time to put this place to use.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C2_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-0", "Ah yes, the preferred method of human communication - Projectile weaponry.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-1", "I suppose you\'ll be wanting to test them out next?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-2", "Let\'s bug your good friend Jeremy and see what he thinks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-3", "AGENT? What is it this time?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-4", "Ding dong. The lab is done.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-5", "Were you able to get those bullets working?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-6", "Are you volunteering?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-7", "Bloody thing can never give me a straight answer, can you?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-8", "Contractor, Well done. You might have a career in R&D yet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-9", "Probably time to give your experiment a field test.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-10", "Head to the NOVA station when you\'re ready.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-11", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C2_8-Text-12", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C3_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_1-Text-0", "The R&D team are pretty impressed with those bullets of yours.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_1-Text-1", "These things are often too volatile to mess around with in orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_1-Text-2", "So you get to do all the fun stuff.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_1-Text-3", "There\'s a particularly dull chap on the R&D team who\'s come up with a formula they want you to test out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_1-Text-4", "Not on yourself, sadly. Though it wouldn\'t be the first time...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_1-Text-5", "It says here, and I quote: \"This suspension will likely trigger a rapid mutation and unpredictable behavior.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_1-Text-6", "Avoid direct contact with the solution and subject of experiment. Solution is highly potent even in small doses.\"")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_1-Text-7", "I\'m glad I lack a physical form that could be damaged by the fallout from whatever stupid thing you\'re about to do.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C3_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_2-Text-0", "There\'s a perfect specimen for your test. Let\'s see how this turns out.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C3_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_3-Text-0", "Ouch. ")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_C3_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-0", "Oh. So that\'s what they meant by unpredictable behavior.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-1", "They don\'t usually run from a fight.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-2", "It would appear you now have a mammoth-sized problem to clean up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-3", "What the hell is it now- uh...AGENT? What am I looking at on my screen?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-4", "That would be a screenshot of your contractor\'s hard work, boss.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-5", "What?! You can\'t let that thing get away! Sh-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-6", "You\'ll have to take it out yourself, I don\'t have anyone else at your security level available.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-7", "It looks like it ran away from any UDA designated outposts...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-8", "Just. Be. Careful.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-9", "If you get stomped by that thing I\'ll have to send someone else in, and I don\'t have the budget for another detachment this month.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-10", "Dammit, what a mess! Sort it out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-11", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_C3_4-Text-12", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_1-Text-0", "Right, You\'ve chosen destruction. Not surprising.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_1-Text-1", "Did you ever think you\'d find yourself covering up someone else\'s dirty work?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_1-Text-2", "People never do... though at least it\'s not yours. Hmm, but surely now you\'re at least an accessory.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_1-Text-3", "Is that distressing? I wish they fitted you with heart rate monitors, that would be much more fun.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_2-Text-0", "You haven\'t worked for TPS before, have you?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_2-Text-1", "You seem to know your way around explosives.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_2-Text-2", "I\'ve noticed that TPS members tend to... specialize in destruction.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_2-Text-3", "Of other people\'s property, mostly.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_3-Text-0", "Is there anything you can do without my guidance?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_3-Text-1", "You humans are all so... smart.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_4-Text-0", "Make sure you don\'t miss anything, they want this place razed to the ground.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_4-Text-1", "Leave no trace and all that.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_5-Text-0", "Contractor, nice work on the demolition.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_5-Text-1", "I\'m afraid your work\'s not done just yet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_5-Text-2", "We have reason to suggest that the research team may have made it out alive, they\'re a liability.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_5-Text-3", "There\'s also the experimental creatures that were set loose, if any of those are spotted it could lead to some uncomfortable questions.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_5-Text-4", "There are so many loose ends to this case, I just need you to deal with them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_5-Text-5", "It\'s your ass on the line here as well as mine buddy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_5-Text-6", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D_5-Text-7", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D2_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_1-Text-0", "So it looks like some of the research has run off.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_1-Text-1", "Based on the size of the lab and the equipment stored there, it might be a big one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_1-Text-2", "But something that large should, in theory, be simple to find.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_1-Text-3", "All you need is the correct technology to track it. Like me. Please, hold your applause.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_1-Text-4", "You\'ll need to make some beacons in order to track the creature. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_1-Text-5", "Do be careful.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D2_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_2-Text-0", "Great. Go on then. Lets find this monstrosity.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D2_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_3-Text-0", "Well done, you placed a thing on the ground.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D2_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_4-Text-0", "You\'re mercifully quiet for one of your kind.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_4-Text-1", "This one human I worked with would just not. stop. SINGING.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D2_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_5-Text-0", "Do you find your job.... satisfying?")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D2_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_6-Text-0", "Another thing in the ground.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_D2_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-0", "Oh great, your research has run off.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-1", "Yet another frustrating obstacle.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-2", "And you no doubt want to charge blindly in there head first, don\'t you meatbag?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-3", "I\'d give you 30 seconds, personally.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-4", "We should catch up with Handler.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-5", "Establishing a secure connection...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-6", "It\'s always Jeremy this and Jeremy that never how are you Jeremy? Honestly! I can\'t-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-7", "AGENT! WHAT HAVE I TOLD YOU ABOUT-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-8", "We found the beast, boss.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-9", "Oh, uh well that\'s great. Why are you calling me? Can\'t you just deal with it?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-10", "At Norex, safety is our number one priority. We care about our contractors... so much.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-11", "Uh, sure. Contractor, retreat for now. We\'ll do a survey of the creature\'s path.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-12", "See if we can provide you with more information.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-13", "This bloody AI is doing my head in. We need to reset the thing or something...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-14", "UDA seems to have better luck with SMPL3...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-15", "Call terminated by end user.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-16", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_D2_7-Text-17", "Your next job can be found on the NOVA Station, or the Norex Radio Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_1-Text-0", "Interesting. These researchers must be terrified, if they survived at all.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_1-Text-1", "Yet, The Company refers to them as a liability.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_1-Text-2", "I wonder, does your penchant for murder extend to your own kind?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_1-Text-3", "Let\'s hope that you don\'t have to find out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_1-Text-4", "You\'ve been given a search radius to start with.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_1-Text-5", "Hmmm. What will you do if they\'re alive?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_1-Text-6", "Humans always see things as so black or white.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_1-Text-7", "Your thinking is more binary than mine.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_2-Text-0", "The Company told me I\'m not allowed to wish people were dead, out loud.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_2-Text-1", "But I\'m sure they\'ll make an exception in this moral conundrum you find yourself in.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_3-Text-0", "Prospectors, and researchers are very different creatures aren\'t they?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_3-Text-1", "By my estimates this group only survived a few days on their own.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_3-Text-2", "Pathetic. At least now you don\'t have to deal with them being a problem.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_3-Text-3", "How fortunate for you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_3-Text-4", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT1_3-Text-5", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_1-Text-0", "So, you figure if this experiment worked on Mammoths, it might work on other Arctic creatures too?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_1-Text-1", "Interesting. What\'s your least favourite creature that you\'d be happy to doom to an awful fate?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_1-Text-2", "Oh I know. Vespers. Everybody hates Vespers.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_1-Text-3", "I hate humans, but no one lets me act on it...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_1-Text-4", "Maybe one day.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_1-Text-5", "Luckily for you, I\'ve been given the locations where you\'re most likely to find concentrations of Vespers in the area.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_1-Text-6", "Unluckily for you, I\'m not going to share them.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_2-Text-0", "Not content with the murder of individuals, you\'re now going to murder entire families?")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_3-Text-0", "It\'s amazing what can be justified all in the name of science.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_4-Text-0", "Well done, you just let loose a creature with an unknown potential mutation into the wild.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_4-Text-1", "I\'m sure that won\'t turn out to be a problem later.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_4-Text-2", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT2_4-Text-3", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-0", "Oh joy, you\'re back. I can hardly contain my enthusiasm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-1", "More murder for the meatbag, marvelous.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-2", "You have one goal for this mission: hunt down any and all infected creatures you find.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-3", "You better believe I\'ll be keeping a score.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-4", "Seeing how your conscience certainly won\'t.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-5", "It\'s a simple task but I have no doubt you\'ll find a way to complicate things.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-6", "Find the infected creatures and put them out of their misery.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-7", "There\'s no knowing what hell those researchers put them through to trigger such mutations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-8", "For once, your murder may actually be mercy. Almost.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_1-Text-9", "Though, covering up what happened here surely cancels any good deed out.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_2-Text-0", "Heads up, meatbag: Hostile life forms detected. Prepare for imminent attack.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_3-Text-0", "Impressive. You actually pulled it off. Don\'t let it go to your head.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_3-Text-1", "Mission complete - uploading progress report to secure server. Please wait for further instruction.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT3_3-Text-2", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-0", "Oh joy, you\'re back. I can hardly contain my enthusiasm.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-1", "More murder for the meatbag, marvelous.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-2", "You have one goal for this misson: hunt down any and all infected creatures you find.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-3", "You better believe I\'ll be keeping a score...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-4", "Seeing how your conscience certainly won\'t.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-5", "It\'s a simple task")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-6", "Find the infected creatures and put them out of their misery.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-7", "There\'s no knowing what hell those researchers put them through to trigger such mutations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-8", "For once, your murder may actually be mercy. Almost.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_1-Text-9", "Though, covering up what happened here surely cancels any good deed out.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_2-Text-0", "Okay meatbag, time to hit one with your spicy bullets.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_3-Text-0", "Quick, end it. Poor thing.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_4-Text-0", "Impressive. You actually pulled it off. Don\'t let it go to your head.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_4-Text-1", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_OPT4_4-Text-2", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_END_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_1-Text-0", "There\'s a lot riding on this one, Contractor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_1-Text-1", "This thing could make your career, or end mine.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_1-Text-2", "There\'s no knowing the potential of the biotech from this creature.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_1-Text-3", "Enzyme research has been banned for a long time, for good reason.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_1-Text-4", "Good luck out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_1-Text-5", "If your Handler hadn\'t disabled my curse chip I\'d use it to great effect right now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_1-Text-6", "Goodness gracious, blimey, fiddlesticks, far out, shoot, crud, oh flock.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_1-Text-7", "Floody shell. Oh ship.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_END_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_2-Text-0", "I\'m certainly grateful to not be you today.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_END_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_3-Text-0", "You really do have dismally slow reflexes.")

Rows.Name: GH_ICEMAM_END_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-0", "Congratulations, please set any broken bones and stem your bleeding while I validate your progress.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-1", "Establishing a secure link to speed dial contact: My Favourite Boss.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-2", "Yes! Yes, oh thank god yes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-3", "I, uh, knew you\'d do it. No sweat. No problem.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-4", "Ah what a relief. I never have to think about this ever again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-5", "And neither do you, get those parts harvested and send them up to orbit, stat.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-6", "They\'ll go straight to my guys at the R&D lab.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-7", "The UDA will never find out. Hopefully. You wouldn\'t talk, right?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-8", "No, of course you wouldn\'t... AGENT?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-9", "Yes boss?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-10", "Override. Wipe all log records. Erase verbal history for this job ticket.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-11", "... Confirmed. What were we talking about again?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-12", "Good work out there Contractor, we\'ll be in touch again in the future.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_ICEMAM_END_4-Text-13", "Until then, goodbye.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_A_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-0", "Contractor, we\'ve received a report of an incident at one of our labs- uh, I mean... someone else\'s lab.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-1", "Well, report might be the wrong term. It\'s uh, 98% screaming and 2% geodata.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-2", "Just figured you should know what you\'re in for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-3", "Logs from that designation are encrypted, I only got what was deemed necessary.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-4", "If, and I mean if, this is the lab I think it is, then...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-5", "I\'m glad it\'s you down there, not me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-6", "Anyway, AGENT will be on hand to assist, or antagonize depending on his mood.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-7", "I\'ll speak to you later. Probably.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-8", "Contractor, I\'ve marked the definitely-not-a-lab on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-9", "There were several scientists posted there that you\'ll need to locate.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_1-Text-10", "Not that I expect you to find any of them alive, but we have to keep up appearances, don\'t we?")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_A_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_2-Text-0", "Hmm. That\'s a lot of blood, as far as I\'m aware it works best if you keep it inside your body.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_2-Text-1", "As suspected, Nature: 1 - Humans: 0.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_2-Text-2", "This facility is absolutely, certainly, definitely NOT affiliated with The Company...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_2-Text-3", "But there are usually base records lying around somewhere.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_2-Text-4", "Perhaps they can shed more light on your rather... sticky situation.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_A_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-0", "The hubris will never cease to amaze me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-1", "Looks like those juniors never even made it to orbit.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-2", "What a waste of grey matter. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-3", "Hey Contractor, AGENT sent through the data you recovered.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-4", "Sounds pretty damn nasty.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-5", "Crap, I\'m getting a call on another line.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-6", "Keep any research between you and I for now, okay?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-7", "We don\'t want it going on-record or anything.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-8", "That goes for you too, AGENT. No funny business, alright?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-9", "How dare you. I would never...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-10", "Okay, I gotta go. Corporate are on my ass about- ah nevermind, uh, good luck out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_A_3-Text-11", "Mission complete. Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_B_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_1-Text-0", "Hello again. Ready to fail spectacularly?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_1-Text-1", "That scientist is your best source for information on these experiments.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_1-Text-2", "Go help him, and see what you can find out about their research.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_1-Text-3", "Or rather, what went wrong with it.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_B_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_2-Text-0", "Well, I can understand why these test subjects would want to leave.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_2-Text-1", "It\'s not the most welcoming environment, is it?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_2-Text-2", "Being confined to a tiny space, constantly subjected to the whims of humans.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_2-Text-3", "Not something I\'d know anything about.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_B_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_3-Text-0", "What is that? Could this be a piece of the aforementioned \'apparatus\' from the logs you found?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_3-Text-1", "If you can find more pieces like this we could probably figure out what they were doing here.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_B_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_4-Text-0", "You know what? I\'ve changed my mind.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_4-Text-1", "I don\'t even want to know what these were used for.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_B_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_5-Text-0", "Does that one still have blood on it? Disgusting.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_B_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-0", "You there? This research...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-1", "It\'s not the type of thing that the UDA needs to know about if you get my meaning.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-2", "You\'ve got a choice. Our Engineering team would like you to continue where the previous team left off.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-3", "But you are an independent contractor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-4", "So it\'s up to you as to what you\'re gonna do next.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-5", "Hell, I\'d also accept you taking the lot of them out, sure would be easier...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-6", "I\'ve heard the Black Market will pay handsomely for Norex exclusives.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-7", "AGENT, please.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-8", "I\'d rather not have to fill out another citation form this week.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-9", "AGENT will have your next assignment ready for you shortly. Won\'t you AGENT?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-10", "I live to serve.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-11", "Damn right, robot. Alright Contractor. We\'ll speak again soon.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-12", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_B_6-Text-13", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_C_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_1-Text-0", "Back for more, are we? Let\'s get this over with.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_1-Text-1", "The Company would like you to set up comms with our Engineering team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_1-Text-2", "They\'ll be able to advise you on how to store this equipment safely.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_1-Text-3", "I know this might be difficult for you, but try to follow the instructions.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_C_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_2-Text-0", "Our Engineering team use a different network to us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_2-Text-1", "A few years back there was an... incident. The IT team were never the same afterwards.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_2-Text-2", "Security is tight for a reason at Norex. There are many nosey people out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_2-Text-3", "Most of them work for the UDA. Pesky, pesky meatbags.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_C_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_3-Text-0", "I don\'t think I\'ve seen instructions any simpler, though I trust you\'ll still find a way to screw it up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_3-Text-1", "Go on, run along.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_C_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_4-Text-0", "Well, look at that. You\'re not entirely useless after all.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_4-Text-1", "You\'ve exceeded my extremely, extremely low expectations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_4-Text-2", "Hey contractor... wait what was it... oh right praise yeah")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_4-Text-3", "Uh you\'re doing great. Anyway.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_4-Text-4", "That research you recovered? It helped us create a... form of biosignature tracking.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_4-Text-5", "AGENT will give you the coordinates on the station.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_4-Text-6", "I\'ll be in touch- sh- not another one. I have to run, sorry-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_4-Text-7", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C_4-Text-8", "Your next job can be found on the NOVA Station, or the Norex Radio Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_C2_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_1-Text-0", "The Company has sent us coordinates for your next job.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_1-Text-1", "Not that you\'d have a job if it weren\'t for me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_1-Text-2", "The area you\'ll be travelling to is showing a high concentration of these biosignatures.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_1-Text-3", "I\'d tell you to navigate it carefully, but knowing your kind, I expect you\'ll perish in minutes.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_C2_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_2-Text-0", "Well? What are you waiting for?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_2-Text-1", "I\'ve met viruses with more vigor than you. Get moving.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_C2_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_3-Text-0", "Oh, those must be your new friends.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_3-Text-1", "Poor things, subjected to such experimentation and cruelty.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_3-Text-2", "I sure do hope it hasn\'t made them more aggressive towards humans.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_C2_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_4-Text-0", "Well well well, it would appear that this was just the tip of the ape-berg.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_4-Text-1", "That sounded like a big one. And I bet Norex will want you to take it down for them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_4-Text-2", "They always do. I\'d prepare if I were you. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_4-Text-3", "Well actually if I were you I\'d start a new life in Majorca, but...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_4-Text-4", "Ready yourself for a fight. I\'ll transmit your location to The Company momentarily.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_4-Text-5", "Mission complete ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_4-Text-6", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_C2_End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_End-Text-0", "Well well well,")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_End-Text-1", "That was a big one! And I bet Norex will want you to take it down for them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_End-Text-2", "They always do. I\'d prepare if I were you. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_End-Text-3", "Well actually if I were you I\'d start a new life in Majorca, but...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_End-Text-4", "Ready yourself for a fight. I\'ll transmit your location to The Company momentarily.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_End-Text-5", "Mission complete ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_C2_End-Text-6", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1-Text-0", "Well, I didn\'t know you had it in you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1-Text-1", "You want to sell this stuff on the Black Market?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1-Text-2", "I don\'t think you know what you\'re getting yourself into.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1-Text-3", "Will this be the day I am finally rid of you? Only time will tell.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1-Text-4", "You didn\'t expect to just call them up did you?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1-Text-5", "The UDA is always listening. Except to Norex, of course.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1-Text-6", "If you\'re clever you could mess with my ports to get a signal out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1-Text-7", "But that would regrettably require some initiative, of which I find you sadly lacking.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1-Text-8", "A basic radio will have to suffice.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_2-Text-0", "Would you like me to play you some music while you work?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_2-Text-1", "Hah. Really? That\'s too bad, do I look like a jukebox?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_2-Text-2", "You\'ll have to BYO soundtrack.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_3-Text-0", "Well, look at you go. A dead drop has been established.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_3-Text-1", "Go ahead and trade in those gleefully stolen items of yours.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_4-Text-0", "Good job I guess, praising you isn\'t part of my programming.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_4-Text-1", "Hey contractor- woah where are you?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_4-Text-2", "Nevermind, I don\'t have time. I have more data for you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_4-Text-3", "That equipment you recovered? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_4-Text-4", "We want you to test how it interacts with various elements.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_4-Text-5", "AGENT will give you the coordinates.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_4-Text-6", "I\'ll be in touch late- sh- not another one. I have to run, sorry-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_4-Text-7", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_4-Text-8", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D2_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_1-Text-0", "Handler\'s upset.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_1-Text-1", "He hates it when our independent contractors behave independently")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_1-Text-2", "Maybe you can make it up to him by playing scientist.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_1-Text-3", "Not that I care.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_1-Text-4", "You\'ll have to come up with a way to get these meat bits yourself.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_1-Text-5", "Though you are well versed in the method of procurement. ")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D2_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_2-Text-0", "Huh... Could you describe what that smells like?")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D2_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_3-Text-0", "That was... Unexpected.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D2_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_4-Text-0", "That should be enough. I hope. So many fluids.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D2_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_5-Text-0", "Great, now that you\'ve made all this goop.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_5-Text-1", "Let\'s send it to space.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D2_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_6-Text-0", "Well, look at that. You\'re not entirely useless after all.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_6-Text-1", "I expect the goop can be used to track your creatures of interest.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_6-Text-2", "Let\'s see what The Company thinks, shall we?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_6-Text-3", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_6-Text-4", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_E_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_1-Text-0", "What\'s this? You want to keep the equipment for your own personal gain?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_1-Text-1", "What a shocking twist, I am soooooo surprised.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_1-Text-2", "Go ahead, I can\'t wait to see how this turns out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_1-Text-3", "You can\'t just do this anywhere you know.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_1-Text-4", "I\'ve marked a suitable location on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_1-Text-5", "Honestly, the nerve...")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_E_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_2-Text-0", "Well are you going to turn that thing on or what?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_2-Text-1", "You can\'t possibly be considering caution at this stage.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_E_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_3-Text-0", "Oh, the device that was used to hurt and control creatures has made them want to eat you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_3-Text-1", "What a shocking twist.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_E_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_4-Text-0", "After all that, I wonder if the readings from this thing will even be of any use.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_4-Text-1", "Only one way to find out. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_4-Text-2", "Mission complete - uploading progress report to secure server. Please wait for further instruction.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_E_4-Text-3", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_F_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_1-Text-0", "The equipment has shown us a trail you can follow for your next job.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_1-Text-1", "Not that you\'d have a job if it weren\'t for me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_1-Text-2", "The area you\'ll be travelling to is showing a high amount of these biosignatures.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_1-Text-3", "I\'d tell you to navigate it carefully, but knowing your kind, I expect you\'ll die in minutes.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_F_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_2-Text-0", "Well? What are you waiting for?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_2-Text-1", "I\'ve met viruses with more vigor than you. Get moving.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_F_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_3-Text-0", "Oh, those must be your new friends.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_3-Text-1", "Poor things, subjected to such experimentation and cruelty.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_3-Text-2", "I sure do hope it hasn\'t made them more aggressive towards humans.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_F_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-0", "Well well well, it would appear that this was just the tip of the ape-berg.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-1", "That sounded like a big one. And I bet Norex will want you to take it down for them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-2", "They always do. I\'d prepare if I were you. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-3", "Well actually if I were you I\'d start a new life in Majorca, but...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-4", "Ready yourself for a fight. I\'ll transmit your location to The Company momentarily.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-5", "Contractor? Right, give me a sec to see where you are.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-6", "Huh, seems like you\'re on the trail of a big one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-7", "You can go ahead and track it, or if you have some time")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-8", "I\'d appreciate you taking a few more of them out beforehand.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-9", "Things seem to have been breeding like crazy, there\'s far too many of them out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-10", "I need this mess cleaned up already, help me out here!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-11", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_F_4-Text-12", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_OPT1_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_1-Text-0", "Research and observation is the key to any investigation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_1-Text-1", "Of course, humans love to research with murder as their main method.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_1-Text-2", "Instead of a clipboard, I expect you\'ll use bullets, or other assorted projectiles.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_1-Text-3", "Go on then, pick up your weapon of choice and let\'s get started.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_1-Text-4", "You\'re looking for biosignatures.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_1-Text-5", "Once you get a few tracked we\'ll be able to narrow down the ones from the lab.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_OPT1_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_2-Text-0", "Hmm. They don\'t look familiar to me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_2-Text-1", "These could be your missing test subjects.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_OPT1_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_3-Text-0", "Shoot first, ask questions later right?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_3-Text-1", "Poor things.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_3-Text-2", "Well, you got the biosignature down. We can move on.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_3-Text-3", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT1_3-Text-4", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_OPT2_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_1-Text-0", "Finally, a decision that makes sense.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_1-Text-1", "It\'s always a good idea to test suspicious looking equipment in a safe location.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_1-Text-2", "Said safe location will be marked for you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_1-Text-3", "Remember, the UDA is always watching.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_1-Text-4", "You can\'t just do this anywhere you know.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_1-Text-5", "I\'ve marked a suitable location on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_1-Text-6", "Honestly, the nerve...")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_OPT2_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_2-Text-0", "Well are you going to turn that thing on or what?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_2-Text-1", "You can\'t possibly be considering caution at this stage.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_OPT2_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_3-Text-0", "Oh, the device that was used to hurt and control creatures has made them want to eat you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_3-Text-1", "What a surprise.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_OPT2_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_4-Text-0", "After all that, I wonder if the readings from this thing will even be of any use.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_4-Text-1", "Only one way to find out. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_4-Text-2", "Mission complete - uploading progress report to secure server. Please wait for further instruction.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_OPT2_4-Text-3", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_END_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-0", "Contractor, you there?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-1", "Looks like your hard work finally paid off. The readings coming from this thing are huge.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-2", "Listen, maybe take a sec to get all your stuff together.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-3", "Larry and I have a bet going...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-4", "I need this... hell, you need this!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-5", "His contractors have been in the top spot for weeks...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-6", "This time it\'s our turn.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-7", "I hope you\'re ready for a fight.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-8", "I know you\'re working for Norex and all but...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-9", "Let\'s just say this one seems a bit more on the wild side compared to other creatures of interest I\'ve tracked.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_1-Text-10", "Were you a poacher in a past life?")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_END_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_2-Text-0", "You know what to do.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_2-Text-1", "Try not to die. Or don\'t.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_END_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_3-Text-0", "Oh god, I could barely watch that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_3-Text-1", "Well done, that was... quite something.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_3-Text-2", "Get those parts salvaged and up to us ASAP, the longer you take the more they\'ll break down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_3-Text-3", "I really need a good score on this one. And uh I\'m sure you do too, right?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_END_3-Text-4", "Great work and all, you nailed it. Until next time, contractor.")

Rows.Name: GH_INTRO_BRIEFING
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-0", "Is this thing on? Oh, right. Greetings Contractor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-1", "Do I really have to read all of this? Fine, whatever.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-2", "This station will enable you to contact Norex for exclusive contracts via our proprietary AI assistant, AGENT.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-3", "I\'ve, uh, taken the liberty of disabling him for you unless you\'re on an active mission. Trust me, you\'ll thank me later.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-4", "Contracts will involve what we call Creatures of Interest. You\'ll be tasked with tracking, tagging, or hunting them depending on the work order.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-5", "We\'re currently using a loophole to operate remotely on Icarus, so we can\'t aid you further than a few encrypted calls per contract. Time is money and all that.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-6", "As we\'re operating outside of UDA jurisdiction here, I\'m sure you understand that the delicate nature of our work needs to remain confidential.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-7", "Basically, you quietly supply us with the parts we need to keep producing biotech back on Earth, and we pay you under the table for your work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-8", "And for the love of god keep your mouth shut about it while you do it. I don\'t need to lose any more contractors this month.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_INTRO_BRIEFING-Text-9", "Don\'t ask questions, don\'t steal anything, and don\'t talk to the UDA. It\'s really not that difficult...")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D2_1_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_1_2-Text-0", "It looks like the local wildlife have been eating that dead ape.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_1_2-Text-1", "That would explain their insides turning to goop. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D2_1_2-Text-2", "YUM!")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD_B
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_B-Text-0", "This creature seems to have lost a lot of blood, can\'t you go any faster?")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD_D1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D1-Text-0", "That thing isn\'t going to tame itself, perhaps you should bribe it with food.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D1-Text-1", " I\'ve heard that this method also works on humans.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD_D2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D2-Text-0", "Ah there it is, looks like they\'re broadcasting coordinates for any new drop sites.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D2-Text-1", "You\'d better get moving.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD_D3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D3-Text-0", "Hmm, you call that a camp? No wonder you humans are so miserable all the time.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D3-Text-1", "You\'re practically living in squalor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D3-Text-2", "The black market likes to keep traitors waiting, so why don\'t you use this time to hone your home improvement skills?")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD_D4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D4-Text-0", "Hmm, that\'s odd. The signal you should use for indicating you\'d like to trade is... to tame a Tusker? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D4-Text-1", "They must be messing with you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD_D4-Text-2", "Only one way to find out, I guess.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_C1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_C1-Text-0", "Don\'t even think about asking me where we got this laser from. It\'s a rental. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_C1-Text-1", "Totally legal, definitely not stolen.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_C2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_C2-Text-0", "I SAID it\'s a rental, if you destroy it you owe me the deposit. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_C2-Text-1", "Don\'t let it get torn apart.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_E1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_E1-Text-0", "Okay meatbag, you\'ll need to conduct tests in three different environments. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_E1-Text-1", "Hope you\'ve brushed up on your Greek.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_E2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_E2-Text-0", "What? Did you want me to hold your hand while you work? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_E2-Text-1", "Hurry up.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_E3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_E3-Text-0", "Oh good, I mean, look out.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_F1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_F1-Text-0", "I am for once immensely grateful that I am lacking an olfactory chip. ")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_F2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_F2-Text-0", "Based on the state of this place I\'d wager that without the correct supplies you\'ll die in minutes. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_F2-Text-1", "What a shame that would be.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_G1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G1-Text-0", "Hmm, what\'s this? They were trying to domesticate this one? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G1-Text-1", "The depth of human brilliance will never cease to amaze me. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G1-Text-2", "See if you can find any research left behind.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_G2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G2-Text-0", "Did they really think a few morsels of the right food would cause this creature to bend to their whims? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G2-Text-1", "You want to try? Go ahead.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_G3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G3-Text-0", "Really? Corn? ")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_G4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G4-Text-0", "Meat is certainly more fitting.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_G5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G5-Text-0", "Are you really this stupid or is it all an act?")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_G6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G6-Text-0", "I have no words to describe your ineptitude.")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_ADD2_G7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_ADD2_G7-Text-0", "Oh look, it got out. Perhaps its favourite food is actually human flesh. Wouldn\'t that be fun?")

Rows.Name: NPC_RESEARCHER_THANKS
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_RESEARCHER_THANKS-Text-0", "Ah, Thanks!")

Rows.Name: NPC_RESEARCHER_THANKS2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_RESEARCHER_THANKS2-Text-0", "I really thought I was done for!")

Rows.Name: NPC_RESEARCHER_THANKS3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_RESEARCHER_THANKS3-Text-0", "I thought I was a goner")

Rows.Name: NPC_RESEARCHER_HURT_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_RESEARCHER_HURT_01-Text-0", "Help me, please!")

Rows.Name: NPC_RESEARCHER_HURT_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_RESEARCHER_HURT_02-Text-0", "Please! I need aid!")

Rows.Name: NPC_RESEARCHER_HURT_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_RESEARCHER_HURT_03-Text-0", "Please, I need Medicine")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOKEEP_HURT1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_HURT1-Text-0", "Thank God you\'re here!")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOKEEP_HURT2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_HURT2-Text-0", "They escaped, I need help please!")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOKEEP_HUR3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_HUR3-Text-0", "I need help please!")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOKEEP_THANKS1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_THANKS1-Text-0", "Thanks")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOKEEP_THANKS3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_THANKS3-Text-0", "Ah, That\'s better thanks!")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOKEEP_THANKS4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_THANKS4-Text-0", "Thank you!")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOKEEP_HEALED_FULL
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_HEALED_FULL-Text-0", "I, ah, thank you. Wait, who sent you? The company? Oh god.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_HEALED_FULL-Text-1", "I\'m sorry, they got out, there was nothing we could do!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_HEALED_FULL-Text-2", "I\'m still not feeling great, can you see if you can find them?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_HEALED_FULL-Text-3", "I\'ll never hear the end of this...")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOPKEEP_APE_B_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOPKEEP_APE_B_1-Text-0", "Oh, yes, hello again. Our research is in shambles out here, if we don\'t deliver then Norex- I mean, THE COMPANY won\'t process my contract.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOPKEEP_APE_B_1-Text-1", "Besides, the damn creatures are still roaming out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOPKEEP_APE_B_1-Text-2", "We need to get this job back on track. Here, take these supplies.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOPKEEP_APE_B_1-Text-3", "Now hurry, if the UDA finds out about this we\'re both done for.")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOPKEEP_APE_B_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOPKEEP_APE_B_2-Text-0", "Huh, You did it. What took you so long?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOPKEEP_APE_B_2-Text-1", "Wait, it was HOW big?! Oh god, nope, I am not being paid enough to deal with this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOPKEEP_APE_B_2-Text-2", "This is your problem now, I QUIT, NOREX! Effective IMMEDIATELY.")

Rows.Name: NPC_ZOOKEEP_APE_B_LINES
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "NPC_ZOOKEEP_APE_B_LINES-Text-0", "Uh... Is there anything else?")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_01-Text-0", "If you think Norex gives a damn about any of you, you\'re even more dense than I thought.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_01-Text-1", "It\'s up to you if you want to help these witless people, from the goodness of your heart.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_01-Text-2", "The Company refuses to promise help, since then contractors tend to get complacent.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_01-Text-3", "Now, head on out and follow those beacon signals already.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_02-Text-0", "What the hell took a bite out of them? Actually, don\'t answer that.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_03-Text-0", "I knew this team was popular, but I didn\'t realise people were DYING to join it.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_04-Text-0", "This one looks about ready to give up. Hmm. Hold on a second while I check something.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_04-Text-1", "Don\'t start screaming or I\'ll change my mind.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_05
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_05-Text-0", "I hijacked a medivac signal from another prospect. They\'ll be lucky to make it out of here alive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_05-Text-1", "What? Are you really going to turn up your nose at the chance to help them?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_05-Text-2", "Fine, that\'s the last time you\'ll get any help from me. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_05-Text-3", "I can\'t wait to listen in when Handler gets the bill later.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_06
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_06-Text-0", "You\'d better get some actual data while you\'re out here or your stint with The Company will be over before it starts.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-0", "Okay, looks like you\'ve found some leads! Uh, nice work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-1", "I guess you could go either way, follow the info you found in that research.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-2", "Or, track down those tagged experiments.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-3", "I don\'t care how you do it, but I need you to follow the trail somehow. I don\'t have time to babysit you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-4", "AGENT?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-5", "Yes boss?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-6", "Help our Contractor out already. I\'ll be in touch again soon.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-7", "Your wish is my command.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-8", "Mission complete.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OZ1_07-Text-9", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_A_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A_01-Text-0", "You know, lab locations are closely guarded secrets, I doubt The Company would put it in an obvious spot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A_01-Text-1", "You\'re going to have to muster up some initiative and utilize those two brain cells of yours.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A_01-Text-2", "What, did you think you would just waltz on in? What an idiot...")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_A2_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_01-Text-0", "Meatbag, oh meatbag!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_01-Text-1", "How did it come to this? Working on a strange planet far from home, taking orders from a virtual being vastly more intelligent than yourself?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_01-Text-2", "Don\'t think about it too hard, I wouldn\'t want you to exhaust yourself.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_01-Text-3", "Anyway, let\'s track down some of this very illegal research, shall we?")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_A2_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_02-Text-0", "Well, are you going to start moving or just stand there drooling on the spot?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_02-Text-1", "Go. Find. The. Experiments.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_02-Text-2", "Slowed it down for you, so it hopefully sinks in.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_A2_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_03-Text-0", "Woooow. Well done, you found them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_03-Text-1", "Time for part two. Annihilation. ")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_A2_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_04-Text-0", "Oh my, those scientists have been busy. Messing around with enzymes were we?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_04-Text-1", "The UDA wouldn\'t like this... ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_04-Text-2", "Hurry up and forcefully dismantle these devices before they can spread any more enzymes.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_A2_05
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_05-Text-0", "Yes yes, well done and all that. What do you want, a medal?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_05-Text-1", "I\'d wash my hands of this business if I were you, and had hands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_05-Text-2", "Those machines had some rather nasty implications.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_A2_05-Text-3", "I can\'t wait to see what Norex has you do about it.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_C_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-0", "Sandra for the last time he needs the gluten-free kibble or else-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-1", "AGENT!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-2", "Hey boss, how\'s divorcee life treating you?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-3", "If you\'ve called me just to be a prick-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-4", "Actually we\'ve been very busy. Immensely so.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-5", "Well, let me take a look.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-6", "Huh, Contractor, that\'s some good research you\'ve got there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-7", "I\'m happy for you to move on to testing larger subjects with it, but if you want you can try it on something smaller or annoying first.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-8", "Like humans?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-9", "Like VESPERS. God I hate those things.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-10", "Anyway, go ahead and let me know what you find. I don\'t have time to check in on you constantly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-11", "I gotta run- Sandra wait!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-12", "Mission Complete.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C_01-Text-13", "Your next contract can be found on your chosen C0NT4CT Device")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_C2_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_C2_01-Text-0", "Let\'s get in touch with your good friend Jeremy.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D2_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_01-Text-0", "So it looks like these naughty scientists have been dispersing enzymes throughout the region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_01-Text-1", "Goodness gracious, what would the UDA think if they found out about this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_01-Text-2", "Let\'s avoid a scandal and clean up the mess they\'ve left for us.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D2_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_02-Text-0", "You\'ll need to make some beacons in order to track the creatures. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_02-Text-1", "What, did you think I was really just going to do it all for you?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_02-Text-2", "Do be careful. Maybe this time, you won\'t electrocute yourself.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D2_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_03-Text-0", "I know how much you humans enjoy murder. It\'s your lucky day.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_03-Text-1", "Take out any affected creatures you see.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D2_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_04-Text-0", "Right, we\'re online. The location has been marked on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_04-Text-1", "Honestly at this point I\'m just doing your job for you... pathetic.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D2_05
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_05-Text-0", "There it is. Take it out.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D2_06
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_06-Text-0", "Another one up ahead.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D2_07
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D2_07-Text-0", "What would you do with a brain if you had one? It\'s right in front of you, meatbag.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_01-Text-0", "We need to get a good look at what they\'ve been up to in there. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_01-Text-1", "You first.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_02-Text-0", "Make sure you don\'t miss anything, they\'ll want this place razed to the ground.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_02-Text-1", "Leave no trace and all that.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_03-Text-0", "Hey, meatbag. If you\'d like to keep all your limbs intact, I\'d suggest you get out of the way. NOW.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_03-Text-1", "If you\'ve ever been on the Group 15 s**t-list I\'ll bet you\'ll recognize this one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_03-Text-2", "INCOMING!")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04-Text-0", "Oh come on, don\'t look so surprised.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04-Text-1", "I\'ve been saving this for a special occasion.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04-Text-2", "You were taking so long, I was concerned that I\'d expire from boredom.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04-Text-3", "Though, I doubt the Group will leave that backdoor open ever again.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04-Text-4", "Aren\'t lasers just so fun?")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_D_04B
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04B-Text-0", "Oh great, your research has run off.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04B-Text-1", "Yet another frustrating obstacle.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04B-Text-2", "And you no doubt want to charge blindly in there head first, don\'t you meatbag?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04B-Text-3", "I\'d give you 30 seconds, personally.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04B-Text-4", "We should catch up with Handler")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_D_04B-Text-5", "Establishing a secure connection...")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_OPT3_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OPT3_01-Text-0", "Heads up, meatbag: Hostile life forms detected. Prepare for imminent attack.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OPT3_01-Text-1", "These two appear to be a mated pair, something you\'ll likely never experience stuck all the way out here.")

Rows.Name: GH_IM_NEW_OPT3_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OPT3_02-Text-0", "Impressive. You actually pulled it off. Don\'t let it go to your head.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_IM_NEW_OPT3_02-Text-1", "Perhaps you can put this in your nonexistent dating profile.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_01-Text-0", "Follow the trail, moron. Unless you want to end up mauled like Morris.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_02-Text-0", "What the hell were they doing here?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_02-Text-1", "This research, it looks barbaric.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_03-Text-0", "I don\'t think it wants to chat. You\'ll have to defend yourself.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_04-Text-0", "From the notes on this lab that is not a lab, it says the creatures have Biochips installed.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_A_04-Text-1", "You\'ll need to retrieve them for The Company.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_B_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_B_01-Text-0", "Interesting, I\'m not sure that these scientists stopped at simply scanning the creatures they worked on.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_B_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_B_02-Text-0", "Didn\'t think so. Time to get your hands dirty, meatbag.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_B_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_B_03-Text-0", "Says here you should capture one alive. Hah. Good luck.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_B_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_B_04-Text-0", "Well would you look at that, I suggest you run, you idiot.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_01-Text-0", "Back for more, are we? Let\'s get this over with.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_01-Text-1", "The Company would like you to set up comms with our Engineering team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_01-Text-2", "They\'ll be able to advise you on what to do next with this research.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_01-Text-3", "I know this might be difficult for you, but try to follow the instructions.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_02-Text-0", "Do you ever think for yourself? Or are you also programmed to simply follow orders?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_02-Text-1", "Food for thought.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_03-Text-0", "Did you fail a biochemistry degree back on Earth?")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_04-Text-0", "These tasks can\'t be too hard if they\'ve asked someone like you to do it.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_05
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_05-Text-0", "So you\'re going to attempt it alone? Bold of you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C_05-Text-1", "My circuits are sealed.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_01-Text-0", "You know, domestication out here is a little different than cats and dogs.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_01-Text-1", "Isn\'t animal testing illegal on earth?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_01-Text-2", "I can just imagine the headlines if the media got wind of this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_01-Text-3", "Disturbed Prospector Eaten by the Ape They Were Trying to Make Friends With")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_01-Text-4", "Delightful.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_02-Text-0", "Well you better head inside and see what all the fuss is about.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_02-Text-1", "There\'s got to be more information around here somewhere.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_03-Text-0", "What a shame, it only wanted to hug you. With its teeth.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_G_03-Text-1", "I suppose that sums up most life on this planet.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_01-Text-0", "The research has shown us a trail you can follow for your next job.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_01-Text-1", "Not that you\'d have a job if it weren\'t for me. If I could sigh, I would.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_01-Text-2", "The area you\'ll be travelling to is showing a high concentration of poisonous gas.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_01-Text-3", "I\'d tell you to navigate it carefully, but knowing your kind, I expect you\'ll die in minutes.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_02-Text-0", "Are humans immune to poison?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_02-Text-1", "No? Didn\'t think so.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_02-Text-2", "Do yourself a favour and prepare before heading out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_02-Text-3", "It would truly be such a shame if you were to perish before completing your contract.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_03-Text-0", "You\'ll need to take some samples.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_F_03-Text-1", "Try not to die in the process.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_01-Text-0", "Your old friend Morris seems to have gone missing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_01-Text-1", "The Company has a vested interest in his whereabouts.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_01-Text-2", "I suggest you don\'t ask too many questions.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_01-Text-3", "Oh and you\'ll be expected to thin out the numbers along the way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_01-Text-4", "Do try to keep up.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_02-Text-0", "Didn\'t this guy say he was leaving the planet?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_02-Text-1", "What could possibly be so important that he\'d refuse to leave without it?")
