Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_03-Text-0", "Ah, what a surprise. SMPL3 owes me ten dollars.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_03-Text-1", "Well, you know what to do. A dead man doesn\'t need whatever\'s in his pockets.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_04-Text-0", "Really? You want to honor his last wish?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_04-Text-1", "How touching.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_05
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_05-Text-0", "Well Morris, I\'d say I hope you\'re happy but you are in fact, dead.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_05-Text-1", "Therefore you can\'t feel much of anything anymore.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_OPT1_05-Text-2", "May your corpse rot in peace on a barren planet far away from humanity.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D_01-Text-0", "Ah there it is, looks like they\'re broadcasting coordinates for any new drop sites. You\'d better get moving.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D_01-Text-1", "The location changes each week, I happened to guide another contractor to a deal a few days ago.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D_01-Text-2", "Though, they didn\'t make it very far before another Contractor caught up with them...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D_01-Text-3", "You\'re welcome, meatbag.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D_02-Text-0", "Hmm, you seem to have caught their attention.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D_02-Text-1", "I daresay you\'ll find yourself working for them soon enough.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_01-Text-0", "Handler\'s upset.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_01-Text-1", "He hates it when our independent contractors behave independently")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_01-Text-2", "Maybe you can make it up to him by playing scientist.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_01-Text-3", "Though based on the fact this job\'s for the black market, I doubt he\'ll be happy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_01-Text-4", "Don\'t worry, your secret\'s safe with me. I promise.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_02-Text-0", "You\'ll need some specialist equipment for this job.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_02-Text-1", "Or were you just planning on throwing the poor beast directly into a pod?")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_03-Text-0", "Off we go, ready to kidnap an unsuspecting child.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_03-Text-1", "Do you do this often?")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_04-Text-0", "Well well well.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_04-Text-1", "Your morals just became even more questionable.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_04-Text-2", "How do you feel about all of this anyway?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_04-Text-3", "Does it keep you up at night?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_D2_04-Text-4", "Unable to sleep? Unable to dream? How awful would that be?")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_01-Text-0", "What\'s this? You want to slaughter them all to cover up the research on behalf of The Company?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_01-Text-1", "What a shocking twist, I am soooooo surprised.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_01-Text-2", "Go ahead, I can\'t wait to see how this turns out.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_02-Text-0", "You can\'t just do this anywhere.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_02-Text-1", "I\'ve marked some suitable locations on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_02-Text-2", "Honestly, the nerve...")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_03-Text-0", "Time to do it all again.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_04-Text-0", "Rinse and repeat.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_04-Text-1", "You really could do with a rinse, you know.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_05
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_05-Text-0", "One more, for safety.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_06
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_06-Text-0", "Maybe one of these ones will finally kill you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E_06-Text-1", "A bot can dream.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_01-Text-0", "We\'ve had some reports of local wildlife going off the rails, so to speak.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_01-Text-1", "It falls to you to deal with it, as always.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_01-Text-2", "Hope you\'re ready for a fight.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_02-Text-0", "Your first instruction is to set up a hunting base, though, aren\'t all bases made for hunting?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_02-Text-1", "It certainly seems as though you humans just can\'t help yourselves in that regard.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_02-Text-2", "Go on, shoo. Get moving.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_03-Text-0", "This is as good a spot as any. You should get started.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_03-Text-1", "It sure would be a shame if you died to the elements out here.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_04-Text-0", "Hmm, seems something else beat you to it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_04-Text-1", "See if you can find a trail to follow.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_04-Text-2", "A predator eating the flesh of an experimental creature can\'t be a good thing.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_05
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_05-Text-0", "Bingo. There it is. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_E2_05-Text-1", "Try to survive if you must.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_01-Text-0", "The Company has sent us coordinates for your next job.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_01-Text-1", "Not that you\'d have a job if it weren\'t for me.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_01-Text-2", "You\'ll be attempting to lure the remaining creatures out in order to eliminate them.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_01-Text-3", "But be careful, Contractor. You don\'t know what else might be lurking out there.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_02
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_02-Text-0", "You\'ll need a suitable enclosure for this job.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_02-Text-1", "I\'ll list out instructions for you, try not to injure yourself this time.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_03
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_03-Text-0", "Alright my master of mayhem, flip that switch and let\'s get started.")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_04
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_04-Text-0", "Look at the size of that thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_C2_04-Text-1", "What? Are you going to just stand there and gawk at it?")

Rows.Name: GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_INFANT_FIND
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_INFANT_FIND-Text-0", "Look at the state of it! What kind of experiments were they running down here?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_AGENT_NEW_APE_INFANT_FIND-Text-1", "You can\'t ship it off looking like that! Poor thing")

Rows.Name: GH_APE_D_1_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1_2-Text-0", "Ah there it is, looks like they\'re broadcasting coordinates for any new drop sites. You\'d better get moving.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1_2-Text-1", "The location changes each week, I happened to guide another contractor to a deal a few days ago.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1_2-Text-2", "Though, they didn\'t make it very far before another Contractor caught up with them...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_APE_D_1_2-Text-3", "You\'re welcome, meatbag.")

Rows.Name: GH_MissionComplete
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_MissionComplete-Text-0", "Mission complete")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_MissionComplete-Text-1", "Your next job can be found on the NOVA Station or the radio device")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_END_2.2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_2.2-Text-0", "Salutations, Contractor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_2.2-Text-1", "What a beautiful day for murder.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_END_2.2-Text-2", "In order to find the beast you\'ll need to triangulate its position.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_NEW_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_NEW_2-Text-0", "No respect for them, even in death?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_NEW_2-Text-1", "And people think I\'M cold.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_D_3_2_NEW
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_3_2_NEW-Text-0", "Well well well, are you going to betray the company?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_D_3_2_NEW-Text-1", "I wouldn\'t if I were you. You never know who\'s watching through your helmet.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_1-Text-0", "Looks like these two took out additional insurance before working for Norex.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_1-Text-1", "Though, I can only imagine how much their premium must have cost.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_1-Text-2", "We don\'t exactly have the best reputation for safety.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_2-Text-0", "We\'ve been given the last two locations they were working in to search.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_2-Text-1", "Try not to perish in the process.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_3-Text-0", "Hmm, looks like there\'s no one here. Better check the next one.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_4-Text-0", "Rescue missions are not my speciality.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_4-Text-1", "I\'ll leave this one up to you.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_5-Text-0", "Well, THAT wasn\'t in the report.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_6-Text-0", "I\'ll have you know, you just killed an endangered species.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_6-Text-1", "Though on Icarus, I suppose humans are in the same category.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_6-Text-2", "Hurry up if you want them to survive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_E_3_NEW_6-Text-3", "You only get paid if they make it back to orbit.")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_RUMBLE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_RUMBLE-Text-0", "That doesn\'t sound good")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_EXOTICQUARRITE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_EXOTICQUARRITE-Text-0", "Is that thing made of exotics? Funny, I\'ve only ever seen that in the Null sector")

Rows.Name: GH_RCKGLM_C2_FRAGMENTS
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_FRAGMENTS-Text-0", "You cavemen like to bang things together! ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GH_RCKGLM_C2_FRAGMENTS-Text-1", "Why don\'t you try make something useful out of those fragments?")

Rows.Name: Ely_OpeningMission_Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Briefing-Text-0", "Hey Prospector. It\'s a mess down here, and we need an extra pair of experienced hands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Briefing-Text-1", "I\'ll bring you up to speed when you arrive - but for now... here\'s the big picture:")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Briefing-Text-2", "I\'m running the investigation planetside, while Sol and a citizen led committee are running things back on earth.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Briefing-Text-3", "The riots back home... well, they\'ve spread here. Prospectors are being recruited into TPS. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Briefing-Text-4", "Like I said. It\'s a mess.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Briefing-Text-5", "We could really use your help.")

Rows.Name: Ely_OpeningMission_Intro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Intro-Text-0", "Glad to have you on board prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Intro-Text-1", "We\'re bringing you down directly to Eden.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Intro-Text-2", "We\'ve had problems with prospectors being swarmed on landing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Intro-Text-3", "Wait... what the hell is -")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Intro-Text-4", "DAMN IT! TPS fired something at your pod.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Intro-Text-5", "You\'re going down. Fast. And not anywhere close to where we wanted you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_Intro-Text-6", "Sh- Brace for impact!")

Rows.Name: Ely_OpeningMission_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_1-Text-0", "Prospector, are you alright? I thought we\'d lost you!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_1-Text-1", "Let me see if I can figure out where you\'ve landed...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_1-Text-2", "We would have seen you coming down if you were close to Eden, So you\'re probably in TPS Territory.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_1-Text-3", "Dammit. You\'ll need to send us a signal, for us to locate you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_1-Text-4", "If you can shoot a flare high enough, that should do it.")

Rows.Name: Ely_OpeningMission_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_2-Text-0", "Prospector? Still alive?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_2-Text-1", "Well, I\'ve got good news and bad news.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_2-Text-2", "The bad news first - We still have no idea where you are. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_2-Text-3", "Both the tracker on the pod and your suit must have been damaged during your graceful landing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_2-Text-4", "We\'re not getting the feed from your helmet cam either.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_2-Text-5", "The good news is, if we can\'t find you, neither can TPS.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_2-Text-6", "Iris, another inquisition recruit, has come up with a few solutions:")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_2-Text-7", "We should be able to send you schematics of a make-shift Beacon through your radio link.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_2-Text-8", "Placing the Beacon should give us your location, and then I can guide you to Eden.")

Rows.Name: Ely_OpeningMission_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-0", "Great! We\'re secure. Now, you\'ll need to get your hands on an amplifier for that radio.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-1", "Ah, Mo? You need to warn them. They\'ll need to make preparations.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-2", "Ah. Right. Yes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-3", "Once you manage to get a link online to us...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-4", "We\'re not the only ones who will know your location. All of Elysium will.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-5", "It\'s likely you\'ll have some of our TPS friends coming to investigate.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-6", "So, you\'ll want to prepare for that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-7", "I\'ll jump on comms now and then. Start briefing you about our situation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-8", "That way you can hit the ground running when you get to Eden.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_OpeningMission_3-Text-9", "Good luck prospector - we\'re pulling for ya.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_Lore1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-0", "Okay, briefing time. Let\'s start with TPS. The People\'s Syndicate.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-1", "They\'re an old world faction, formed around workers protesting conditions and pay. Unions, that sorta thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-2", "Started out pretty harmless, but corporations and the UDA stamped down on them hard. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-3", "There were deaths, which radicalised a handful of members. You\'ve probably heard of the attacks they\'ve claimed over the years.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-4", "TPS was designated a terrorist organization. Even though it was just mostly families, trying to build better lives.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-5", "More recently, the UDA had mostly wiped them out. Then our news of the Icarian Genocide broke.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-6", "Suddenly, TPS propaganda was being force fed to everyone in orbit, and back home.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-7", "Earth had riots, attacks. Over our way, Prospectors started to defect.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-8", "Banding together to steal exotics for themselves.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-9", "It\'s hard to tell who identifies as what.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-10", "Most of them aren\'t bad people. You\'ve seen what it\'s like on Icarus. It\'s gruelling, there\'s death around every corner. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-11", "And we get cents on what makes the UDA billions.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-12", "What am I doing working for them again?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore1-Text-13", "Don\'t lose your head, Prospector.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_Lore2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-0", "Ah I should probably tell you how I ended up here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-1", "After the discovery in Prometheus, Sol had all the evidence stored as collateral on a secure server.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-2", "And, of course, It didn\'t take long before someone at G15 tried to mess with the data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-3", "Long story short: It was rigged for this exact reason. Sent to virtually every public and private newsvendor out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-4", "Unfortunately... That caused some chaos.I mentioned the riots, yeah?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-5", "Well the UDA responded by shutting down the group entirely. They kicked off a massive inquest.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-6", "Sol was rotated back earthside to testify and help with the investigation, at his request.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-7", "Before he left, he got in contact, managed to  convince me to run this team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-8", "\"Do you really trust anyone else to investigate\"... Yeah. He was right. I don\'t.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-9", "Sol\'s got this way of always making you do the right thing. It\'s infuriating, bless him.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore2-Text-10", "Stay safe prospector. You\'re making good time.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_Lore3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore3-Text-0", "So, you\'re mostly up to speed at this point, what else? Ah, Eden. Right.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore3-Text-1", "When the Investigation started Earth-side, Elysium was constantly mentioned in Group 15 docs.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore3-Text-2", "The UDA found that interesting, on account of the whole sector being tagged as a black zone, by G15. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore3-Text-3", "Naturally, there was a fair amount of interest about why they would keep an entire sector to themselves.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore3-Text-4", "So, the Eris Inquisition was put together to investigate their activities here in Elysium.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore3-Text-5", "And that, led to Eden. See you soon.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_Lore4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore4-Text-0", "Well done. Just remember. All hell\'s gonna break loose as soon as you place that thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Lore4-Text-1", "Make sure you\'re prepared to deal with TPS.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_Intro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Intro-Text-0", "Okay, right, I can see your location!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_Intro-Text-1", "Iris is picking up some TPS chatter. They\'re heading towards you. Stay alive!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_1-Text-0", "Phew! You made it.TPS can be quite a handful.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_1-Text-1", "Grab the supplies from the pod. There\'s a TPS comms tower blocking our signal, you\'ll need to shut it down. Then I can guide you to Eden.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_1-Text-2", "Damn! They made it? F--king hell, I just lost so... SO much money.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_1-Text-3", "What?! Theo! Is someone taking bets on squad survival?!?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_1-Text-4", "Yeah, no offense and all but you gotta make your money somewhere, it sure as hell ain\'t comin\' from the UDA these days. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_1-Text-5", "Come here. You\'re supposed to be a senior here Theo, what the hell are you thinking?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_1-Text-6", "Go. Now. Shut it down.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_2-Text-0", "Seen snails move faster than that one. Honestly just letting anyone in these days-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_2-Text-1", "Ugh, don\'t mind him, Theo\'s ex-military.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_2-Text-2", "I wouldn\'t take it personally, working for the ACS would make anyone a bit.. ah.. abrasive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_2-Text-3", "I\'m just sayin\', how are we gonna get anything done here if everyone you hire is so slow.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_2-Text-4", "We may as well just roll over and let TPS have the place at this rate.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_2-Text-5", "Have some faith, Theo. The UDA wouldn\'t put you on a losing team with your history. Ha.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_2-Text-6", "Damn straight they wouldn\'t, I don\'t lose. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_2-Text-7", "Ughhh.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_3-Text-0", "Most of us have been here for a couple of months now, you\'re the last one to arrive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_3-Text-1", "Once we get you settled in we can start doing some real digging.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_3-Text-2", "I have my hunches about what the Group were up to here... but god, I hope I\'m wrong.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_3-Text-3", "It\'ll be good to have you here, we need people we can trust.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_3-Text-4", "Stay vigilant.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-0", "Great, that\'s done it. Now I can plot a course for you. Victor, do we have any intel worth sharing on this route?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-1", "Victor? Do you copy?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-2", "Victor is our intel guy, he\'s been an asset to the team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-3", "Whenever he decides to actually pick up his comms unit...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-4", "Victor! Report!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-5", "Mo, hi, sorry. I was, uh, busy.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-6", "We\'re en route to Eden, can we expect anything up ahead?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-7", "Hmm, says here you should be prepared for... sand. Lots of sand.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-8", "Vic- wait. Was that a joke? I didn\'t know you had it in you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-9", "It\'s been known to happen from time to time.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-10", "In all seriousness, there are plenty of TPS patrols about, keep an eye out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_4-Text-11", "Apart from that, enjoy the hike.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_5-Text-0", "You\'ll have to fight your way through.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_5-Text-1", "Be careful, desperate people tend to fight dirty.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_5-Text-2", "And TPS are the most desperate of all...")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_5.1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_5.1-Text-0", "Sh- You have incoming- Good luck.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_5.2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_5.2-Text-0", "More TPS. Keep your head attached.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_5.3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_5.3-Text-0", "Prospector - TPS are headed your way.Show them what you\'re made of.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_6-Text-0", "You made it! This is Eden. Home sweet home.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_6-Text-1", "Come and find me first, I\'m upstairs.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_6-Text-2", "Welcome to The Eris Inquisition.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_7-Text-0", "Prospector? How the hell did you- Nevermind. Hurry up and get inside before someone sees you!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_7-Text-1", "Come and find me first so I can deliver your briefing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_7-Text-2", "The team will want to meet you as well, no one\'s going to believe you made it here all by yourself.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_7-Text-3", "Prospector, welcome to The Eris Inquisition.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_8-Text-0", "Hey Prospector, great to see you in one piece.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_8-Text-1", "Welcome to Eden, home of the Eris Inquisition.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_8-Text-2", "I know it\'s a lot to take in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_8-Text-3", "When the UDA asked me to pu-. Well. When Sol asked me to put together a team...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_8-Text-4", "I made sure we\'d have more than enough manpower.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_8-Text-5", "The data we\'ve gathered so far is limited...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_8-Text-6", "But if the Group managed to keep the Icarian Genocide under wraps then...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_8-Text-7", "What else were they doing here? It\'s our job to find out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_8-Text-8", "Go and introduce yourself to the rest of the team.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_9-Text-0", "Oh, hi there, Prospector! Nice to meet you, I mean, properly, in person of course. I\'m Iris.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_9-Text-1", "Anyway, I still can\'t believe the Group could do such a thing, and with my poor team helping them too!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_9-Text-2", "It\'s just awful, I can certainly understand why Mo decided to investigate it herself. She can never let things go.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_9-Text-3", "When I heard that she was still alive, goodness, it was such a huge shock. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_9-Text-4", "And then when she called me to join the team? Well, I signed up on the spot!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_9-Text-5", "But I must admit I had forgotten just how harsh it can be living away from Earth.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_9-Text-6", "You\'ve gotta be tough as nails to make a living out here.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_10-Text-0", "Ah, hello prospector. Mo\'s told me a great deal about you. I look forward to working with you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_10-Text-1", "I\'ve worked... odd jobs here and there, but never investigated a conspiracy before.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_10-Text-2", "First time for everything.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_10-Text-3", "I\'ve heard you\'re fairly resourceful.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_10-Text-4", "Unfortunately, that\'s more than can be said for some who seek their fortune out here...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_10-Text-5", "We\'ve... Already lost too many just getting Eden up and running.  ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_10-Text-6", "Hopefully we can complete this investigation without more bloodshed. On either side.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_10-Text-7", "But that seems unlikely.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_11-Text-0", "So, you\'re the other Prospector?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_11-Text-1", "Huh. You\'re shorter than I expected... I\'ve heard some wild stories about your time on Icarus...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_11-Text-2", "Hey listen, don\'t get too attached to anything... or, uh, anyone here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_11-Text-3", "TPS bastards are everywhere. If you like something... chances are they\'ll steal it, shoot it, or blow it up.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_11-Text-4", "Don\'t worry though, I\'ve got your back. I\'m always ready for anything out here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_11-Text-5", "Never hurts to be too careful with enemies around every corner.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_End_Iris
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_End_Iris-Text-0", "But anyway, listen to me prattling on! I have a task for you, when you\'re ready to get stuck in.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_End_Victor
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_End_Victor-Text-0", "I should mention, Iris was talking about a task she wanted your help with earlier. You should pop in and check with her for the details.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionOne_End_Theo
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionOne_End_Theo-Text-0", "Oh yeah, Iris mentioned she had something she wanted your help with. I have more important things to do though, so you should run along and see what she needs.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Briefing-Text-0", "Hi there, Prospector. I have a task for you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Briefing-Text-1", "We\'ve intercepted a message from TPS regarding a location that may be of interest to our investigation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Briefing-Text-2", "They mentioned Group 15, so we\'d better check it out ourselves.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Briefing-Text-3", "Though I should warn you, there will likely be TPS interference along the way.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_Intro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Intro-Text-0", "Alrighty then, I\'ve been tinkering with an old radio I found in one of the crates out here.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Intro-Text-1", "TPS are deliberately low-tech when it comes to their comms, I must admit... it\'s rather clever. We couldn\'t figure out how they were communicating with each other for weeks.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Intro-Text-2", "I managed to tune in to their current frequency, they seem to rotate regularly, and I overheard a conversation about an old survey hut. We think it might have been used by Group 15.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Intro-Text-3", "I don\'t have much to go on as to what they were using it for, that\'s up to you to find out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Intro-Text-4", "This location may be part of a much larger research network, if we can find a way in I\'m certain we\'ll find the answers we\'re looking for.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_Intro-Text-5", "Theo has some equipment for you, go talk to him first.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_1-Text-0", "This place is facinating. I\'m really hopeful that this will provide more insight into what the Group were doing here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_1-Text-1", "What other reason could there possibly be for blocking off an entire area of Icarus, right under the UDA\'s nose?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_1-Text-2", "You really think the UDA didn\'t know what was happening here?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_1-Text-3", "Well, they sent us here to investigate. That\'s a fair amount of money to waste on a fake expedition.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_1-Text-4", "To preserve their reputation they\'d burn all the cash on Earth. I\'m sure they know more than they let on. Most organisations do.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_1-Text-5", "Their methods may be different on the surface but they\'re just as bad as TPS in some ways.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_1-Text-6", "You seem to know a fair bit about TPS...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_1-Text-7", "They\'re people just like you and I. Upset, desperate people doing terrible, desperate things.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_1-Text-8", "I don\'t completely disagree with their message, just their methods.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_2-Text-0", "Gosh, TPS have really trashed the place. I\'ve only ever heard statistics regarding TPS... civilians killed, buildings burned... that sort of thing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_2-Text-1", "You hear whatever the powers want you to hear.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_2-Text-2", "That seems a rather... convenient excuse, don\'t you think?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_2-Text-3", "I\'m not saying those things don\'t happen... It\'s why they happen.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_2-Text-4", "I mean, just in this sector alone there have been dozens of casualties already, Victor. Perhaps-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_2-Text-5", "Look, just- Let\'s leave it. Agree to disagree, yes?")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_3-Text-0", "My intel shows that TPS are mostly using drones now due to all the casulties out here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_3-Text-1", "Looks like this guy wasn\'t so lucky. Search him for information. Respectfully.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_3-Text-2", "At least he gave us a clue. The next location could have security. Let\'s keep moving.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_4-Text-0", "Of course they couldn\'t just leave it unguarded. I hope your data is worth it Iris.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_5-Text-0", "Great work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_5-Text-1", "They mentioned data sticks and hard drives that they couldn\'t get into, look for those first.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_6-Text-0", "Bingo. That\'s exactly what I need, but knowing the Group it\'ll likely be encrypted.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_6-Text-1", "I\'ll get to work on it straight away.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_7-Text-0", "Vic, does it ever get easier? The violence?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_7-Text-1", "When I was last here I left the hunting and such to the rest of the team. I\'m not very good with blood.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_7-Text-2", "Since we\'ve been back...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_7-Text-3", "Hunting for your food is one thing, but no. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_7-Text-4", "We may only be defending ourselves out here... but seeing a fellow prospector laying dead never gets easier.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_7-Text-5", "And it shouldn\'t. That\'s a good thing. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_7-Text-6", "I\'ve seen it happen... People can be monsters... ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_7-Text-7", "Best not to think about it too much, Iris. ")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_8-Text-0", "Thank you, Prospector. Excellent work today.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_8-Text-1", "Hopefully this will shed some light on G15\'s shady little operation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_8-Text-2", "For now, thanks for helping out. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_8-Text-3", "You did well with your first official Inquisition task.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_8-Text-4", "It\'s great to have you on board, Prospector.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionTwo_End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_End-Text-0", "Prospector! Come quick!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_End-Text-1", "The data you found was a goldmine of intel.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_End-Text-2", "This is the biggest cache of useful data we\'ve found so far.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_End-Text-3", "It\'s... ah, nevermind - I\'m supposed to tell you:")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionTwo_End-Text-4", "Mo wants to see you as soon as possible.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Briefing-Text-0", "Prospector. I need you to come talk to me. ASAP.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Briefing-Text-1", "That data you found... It\'s given us a location.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Briefing-Text-2", "I\'ll brief you when you get here.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_Intro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Intro-Text-0", "Hi Prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Intro-Text-1", "Okay. The data has given us a... rough location - some partial schematics.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Intro-Text-2", "It looks like a lab. Completely underground.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Intro-Text-3", "How they could construct something like this under the UDA\'s nose.... I just... I don\'t see how they could.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Intro-Text-4", "Your job is to get in, and extract as much information as possible.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Intro-Text-5", "I\'ll mark the area to search on your map.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_Intro-Text-6", "Be careful prospector.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-0", "As much as this should be my top priority. I have another operation to coordinate. So I\'ll pass you over to the B team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-1", "Prospector, Theo and I will be on comms to provide assistance. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-2", "Get a move on new blood, you got a big hike ahead.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-3", "Extra points for any TPS you put down along the way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-4", "Theo they\'re not all bad. Most of them are just looking for a better life.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-5", "It\'s not like the UDA have done prospectors any favors, Right? Even you complain about the p-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-6", "Ugh. Not this again. Look, we get it. Everyone\'s a unique little flower full of potential blah blah blah.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-7", "Well. When flowers start killing other flowers... I say salt the ****ing fields. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-8", "Uh... In this metaphor... Are we all flowers? Are you saying we should all... die?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_1-Text-9", "Uh- It\'s military speak. You wouldn\'t understand.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_2-Text-0", "Took you long enough. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_2-Text-1", "Now you\'ve had a nice little stroll, search the area for the faca- facil- the ****ing entrance.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_2-Text-2", "We don\'t know what-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_2-Text-3", "We have no idea what it looks like. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_2-Text-4", "But it should be around here somewhere. So use your eyes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_2-Text-5", "And be careful.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_3-Text-0", "There it is. Doesn\'t seem like TPS has staked a claim.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_4-Text-0", "Looks like this was well traveled.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_4-Text-1", "Hopefully we don\'t run into any G15 stragglers.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_5New
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_5New-Text-0", "Is that an elevator? Just how big is this place?!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_6-Text-0", "Watch out!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_7.1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_7.1-Text-0", "We\'ll need to disable the security system at an isolated level.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_7.1-Text-1", "Iris, can you hop on comms?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_7.1-Text-2", "One step ahead of you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_7.1-Text-3", "Okay, I think that should open it.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_7.2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_7.2-Text-0", "We\'ll need to disable the security system at an isolated level. Iris, can you hop on comms?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_7.2-Text-1", "One step ahead of you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_7.2-Text-2", "Okay, I think that should open it.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_7.3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_7.3-Text-0", "*Creatures Groan")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_8-Text-0", "Is that a, reactor? Jeez they really thought of everything out here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_8-Text-1", "There\'s likely a terminal around here somewhere, see if you can find any more data.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_9-Text-0", "Huh - That\'s an incredible amount of terraforming enzymes.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_9-Text-1", "It might be more than anywhere else on Icarus... The System even.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_9-Text-2", "You find any more of those computers in there?")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_10-Text-0", "You\'re kidding me - I thought I saw this on the plans... But I wasn\'t entirely sure.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_10-Text-1", "I\'m thinking THAT, controls G15\'s famous orbital laser. Mo, didn\'t you have a few run-ins with the other end of that thing?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_10-Text-2", "You could say that.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_11-Text-0", "Dead, all of them, what a waste.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_11.1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_11.1-Text-0", "Not a single one left alive, what a waste. Prospector, check the room for evidence before you move on.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionThree_End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-0", "Oh. S***. MO! Mo you need to see this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-1", "No this can\'t be right. We would have seen this when we started terraforming")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-2", "What is it- No that... that can\'t be.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-3", "Iris, can you double check this for me?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-4", "That would mean...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-5", "The hell are you guys talking about? It\'s just a bunch of graphs?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-6", "Shut THE **** UP THEO. EVERYONE. SHUT. UP.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-7", "Iris... Did you double check?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-8", "I\'m sorry Mo... It\'s correct.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-9", "NO!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-10", "Oh. Christ.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-11", "I\'ll go check on her.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-12", "Would somebody please explain what the hell is going on!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-13", "It\'s data from before the terraforming process started Theo.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-14", "It looks like, the terraforming shouldn\'t have failed. It was sabotaged.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-15", "S***. But why would they-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-16", "I don\'t have all the answers. Mo or Iris will explain it better.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-17", "But it looks like the goal was... Exotics. Of course.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-18", "Oh. Ohhhh.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionThree_End-Text-19", "Yeah, Prospector, I\'ve got another job I need to do. Come back to Eden when you\'re ready for more work.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Briefing-Text-0", "Prospector, we\'ve gathered a few more locations of interest from the lab data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Briefing-Text-1", "Some of them look quite tricky to get to, we\'ll have to pass through some areas of radioactivity.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Briefing-Text-2", "I\'m going to take some time to prep supplies for the journey before heading out, I\'d suggest you and the team do the same.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Briefing-Text-3", "Meet me at Eden and we can get started.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_Intro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Intro-Text-0", "Prospector. After sifting through all the data from the lab, it appears there\'s a few more locations worth investigating.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Intro-Text-1", "The ones we\'ll be tackling first appear to require passing through radioactive zones.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Intro-Text-2", "I know it\'s a pain, but we\'ll need to prep supplies before we head out, I\'ve got Iris and Theo doing the same.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Intro-Text-3", "Hah I\'d bet Iris has packed enough for a month-long getaway.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Intro-Text-4", "Unlike you Theodore, I take radiation extremely seriously. Don\'t you like having functioning organs?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Intro-Text-5", "Ah fine. I\'ll start prepping.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Intro-Text-6", "Mo was going to lead this one but... I told her I\'d handle it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_Intro-Text-7", "She\'s uh, not dealing with the terraforming news very well.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_1-Text-0", "That lab... I\'m still shocked.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_1-Text-1", "I\'ve barely slept.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_1-Text-2", "It\'ll take us some time to piece it all together.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_1-Text-3", "I\'m not sure I want the answers anymore. Even just watching the feed of that place gave me the creeps.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_2-Text-0", "Hey prospector. I still can\'t believe the UDA deliberately botched the terraforming...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_2-Text-1", "The amount of work that went into it, they must have falsified all of the data they provided to my team.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_2-Text-2", "I can understand why Mo\'s upset. She was incredibly hopeful back then, I think she took Icarus personally.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_2-Text-3", "She used to talk about Icarus like it was already her home, she was talking about moving her mother and her brother out here when we were finished.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_2-Text-4", "A colony for the hopeless, she called it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_2-Text-5", "I still thought it could work too, but, she was always more invested in it than I was.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_2-Text-6", "I hope she can come back from this.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_3-Text-0", "Unfortunately it would appear that the reports were correct.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_3-Text-1", "Keep your gear handy, just to be safe.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_4-Text-0", "I think I\'m at the right place, what are we looking for again?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_4-Text-1", "More survey huts, buildings and such. Hopefully we can find some that haven\'t already been looted out here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_4-Text-2", "Those TPS chaps really can be... Frustrating.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_4-Text-3", "Yeah that\'s one word for them.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_5-Text-0", "I\'m stumped. There\'s nothing out here, why the hell did he send us all this way?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_5-Text-1", "Victor? Victor! Come in? Where the hell is he? Victor!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_5-Text-2", "S***- What the hell was that?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_5-Text-3", "Theo? Are you-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_5-Text-4", "F***- AMBUSH! ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_5-Text-5", "No no no!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-0", "I managed to lose them but I think my leg is broken.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-1", "AH- It\'s definitely broken...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-2", "I need help, Theo?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-3", "I\'m miles in the opposite ****ing direction to you Iris, prospector\'s closer, they can get ya!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-4", "Dammit! I should have known he\'d set us up like this!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-5", "What on earth are you talking about-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-6", "Isn\'t it obvious? Victor! He gave each of us our coordinates and we all ran into a ****ing trap!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-7", "He set us up! I swear when I get my hands on him-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-8", "Theo! We don\'t know anything yet, AH- Prospector, can you come and help me? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_6-Text-9", "Theo, don\'t do anything rash.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_7-Text-0", "THIS IS AN ANNOUNCEMENT FROM THE PEOPLE\'S SYNDICATE")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_7-Text-1", "ALL PROSPECTORS MUST EVACUATE FROM THIS SECTOR IMMEDIATELY")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_7-Text-2", "A PROCESS TO TERRAFORM THE ELYSIUM QUADRANT IS UNDERWAY")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_7-Text-3", "WE REPEAT. ALL PERSONNEL MUST EVACUATE FROM THIS SECTOR IMMEDIATELY")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_7-Text-4", "A PROCESS TO TERRAFORM THE ELYSIUM QUADRANT IS UNDERWAY")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_7-Text-5", "THE PEOPLES SYNDICATE IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR LOSS OF LIFE IF YOU CHOOSE TO REMAIN")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_7-Text-6", "WE ARE TPS, THE UDA WILL FALL")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_7-Text-7", "****ing TPS...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_7-Text-8", "Hold tight Iris. It\'s probably just a bluff.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_8-Text-0", "Prospector! Over here!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_9-Text-0", "Thank you prospector, that\'s already much better. But I\'ve been thinking...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_9-Text-1", "The only place that has terraforming enzymes at such a scale out here is... well the Lab.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_9-Text-2", "Prospector, you have to get there before TPS does. If they drop those enzymes... I\'m not sure what will happen.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_9-Text-3", "God, why isn\'t Vic picking up?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_9-Text-4", "He\'s in on it Iris. He\'s not even responding on comms. He doesn\'t care about us. As far as I\'m concerned he\'s a dead man.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_10-Text-0", "More blood on his hands, that backstabbing bastard.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_11-Text-0", "We\'re too late...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_11-Text-1", "Check all the rooms prospector. With the Terraforming Lab as a priority.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_11-Text-2", "We need to know what they got away with.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_12-Text-0", "No, No! They can\'t seriously be doing this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_12-Text-1", "This is a disaster, it\'s all gone!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_12-Text-2", "There might be... There might be validity to their claims.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_13-Text-0", "Well at least the control panel for the laser\'s bolted down.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_13-Text-1", "Idiots probably didn\'t even know what it was.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_14-Text-0", "Did they really have to? Why the hell did they do this?")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFour_End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_End-Text-0", "Gone? All of the prototype equipment, the enzymes, the paperwork.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_End-Text-1", "All our evidence, all our hope of us actually holding G15 accountable. Mo is going to be... furious.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_End-Text-2", "And for what? The chance of them actually terraforming the sector is... I\'ll need to run the numbers. But after seeing the new data... I don\'t...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_End-Text-3", "I don\'t even know If that\'s possible.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_End-Text-4", "Victor is still missing... I don\'t want to believe Theo... but... Where the hell is he?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFour_End-Text-5", "Get yourself back to Eden immediately, Prospector. We need to come up with a plan, now.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFive_Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Briefing-Text-0", "Hi prospector, thanks again for your help.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Briefing-Text-1", "I wouldn\'t have made it back without you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Briefing-Text-2", "You need to get back to Eden.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Briefing-Text-3", "We have a... Situation. See you soon.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFive_Intro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Intro-Text-0", "Prospector. I heard you\'re responsible for saving Iris... Thank you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Intro-Text-1", "I\'m sorry I wasn\'t in contact - Like the rest of you, I walked into a trap.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Intro-Text-2", "Something hit my helmet... killed my comms. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Intro-Text-3", "I didn\'t even know about the... the situation, until I got back to Eden.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Intro-Text-4", "Theo still blames me I think. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Intro-Text-5", "Thing is... Mo gave me those coordinates. It.. It was her operation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Intro-Text-6", "We can\'t believe- How could sh....")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Intro-Text-7", "It\'s better to show you. Go. Search her cabin. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_Intro-Text-8", "I need you up to speed. We have some hard decisions to make.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFive_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-0", "Ah, yeah. Seems like she\'s taking things into her own hands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-1", "Vic - We just got a message from her.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-2", "Hey team. It wasn\'t supposed to go this way... I\'m... I\'m really sorry.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-3", "I told them just to delay you. I don\'t know what happened.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-4", "Look- You guys have to get off planet. No one has to get hurt. It\'s not your fight.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-5", "I\'m done with the lies, done with the bullsh**...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-6", "Icarus is going to be what it was supposed to or it can ****ing burn. And the UDA along... Along with it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-7", "It\'s. Not. Your. Fight. Get everyone from the team off planet. Now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-8", "Well thats... definitive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-9", "So... We need to leave right? She\'s completely ****ing lost it!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-10", "I still can\'t believe she\'s doing this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-11", "We. Need. To. Leave-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-12", "Wait wait wait. Slow down. We need to think this through. Iris, could we track the terraforming enzymes?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-13", "We could track them, but it\'ll take some work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-14", "Great. Prospector. You and Theo find out where the enzymes are. Then we\'ll find Mo. It might not be too late. We could stop this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-15", "We got a problem. There is a huge creature that will surely get in the way if we don\'t take it out first.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_1-Text-16", "Make sure you\'re prepared. Seriously prepared.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFive_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_3-Text-0", "That\'s it! Sorry, I ain\'t dying down here! You guys are on your own.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_3-Text-1", "Dammit Theo! We need your help!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_3-Text-2", "Did you happen to get a look at the size of that damn thing?! I didn\'t sign up for this bullsh**. I\'m out.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_3-Text-3", "Theo No!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_3-Text-4", "You guys can leave anytime. Nothing... NOTHING is keeping you here. Just ****ing leave. It\'s not worth it.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFive_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_4-Text-0", "S***. It\'s so much worse than we thought!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_4-Text-1", "How much worse?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_4-Text-2", "Chances of successful terraforming... less than... Less than two percent.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_4-Text-3", "I... Would Mo know this?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_4-Text-4", "I have no idea. She doesn\'t... Seem like herself.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_4-Text-5", "I need to check something else. Be right back.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFive_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_5-Text-0", "Okay... um more bad news. If the terraforming fails, which... as you know, is very likely.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_5-Text-1", "Or even if it does succeed. There\'s an unsettling high chance of a... I don\'t even know what to call it. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_5-Text-2", "A cascade reaction? Half the planet could be gone in seconds.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_5-Text-3", "We need to stop this. Please hurry!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFive_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_6-Text-0", "I hope the stories I\'ve heard about you are true, prospector.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_6-Text-1", "Take it out, and we can get to Mo.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionFive_End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_End-Text-0", "Great work! We\'ll have a location for you soon. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_End-Text-1", "Come back to Eden when you\'re ready. And make sure you\'re prepared.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionFive_End-Text-2", "Seriously prepared. I think this is going to get ugly. See you soon prospector.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_Briefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Briefing-Text-0", "Prospector, this is it. We\'ve got their location.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Briefing-Text-1", "We can only hope you get there before they start the terraforming process.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Briefing-Text-2", "Get to Eden and come and see me, NOW.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_Intro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-0", "Alright prospector, due to your efforts we\'ve pinpointed the location TPS have been operating from.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-1", "Nasty spot, it\'ll be quite the trek to get there. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-2", "Based on the intel we have available we think you\'ll probably be walking straight into a fight.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-3", "I suggest you prepare accordingly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-4", "Iris and I will head over to the lab, just to make sure we haven\'t missed anything.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-5", "It\'s also the safest place to be if the enzymes do get dropped, hopefully being that far underground will help us to avoid the worst of it.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-6", "Don\'t be ridiculous, Vic. If the chain reaction occurs then there\'s nowhere safe on this planet.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-7", "Well, I- Surely...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-8", "There\'s absolutely no sugar coating this. We\'re in just about the worst position we could find ourselves in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-9", "Our only hope is that you get there before they launch the payload.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-10", "These satellites take a long time to charge up, you\'ll probably see it from the ground.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-11", "Luckily for us, the enzymes are loaded last. So if you can get there in time...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-12", "We could stop the whole process.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-13", "Exactly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_Intro-Text-14", "Ready yourself prospector, let\'s move out. ")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_1-Text-0", "We\'re heading back over to the lab now.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_1-Text-1", "It\'s slim but, there\'s also a chance Mo might stop this madness if she knows we\'re still here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_1-Text-2", "She must be beside herself, she can\'t be thinking clearly.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_1-Text-3", "We might have to make some difficult choices, should the worst happen.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_1-Text-4", "I don\'t like it Victor, I don\'t want us to rely on-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_1-Text-5", "And we won\'t, but if the time comes-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_1-Text-6", "It won\'t.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_2-Text-0", "Iris, I know we\'re looking for a miracle here but... We have to be prepared for the fact we might not get home from this mission...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_2-Text-1", "Were you able to get a message off to your family?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_2-Text-2", "Well, I had a template selected when I first joined, I assume that if I don\'t return to orbit in time the UDA will just... send that one.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_2-Text-3", "That was a while back. You sure you don\'t want to dictate a new one? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_2-Text-4", "I can give you some privacy-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_2-Text-5", "Yes I\'m sure, because we won\'t be dying here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_2-Text-6", "I can\'t think like that Vic. There\'s too many lives at stake here for us to slip up and get emotional.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_2-Text-7", "In that regard you\'re correct. We\'ll soldier on. Together.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_3-Text-0", "Alright, prospector, we\'ve made it to the lab. God what a mess they\'ve left it in.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_3-Text-1", "We\'ll get stuck in here and see if we can find any more data that might help.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_3-Text-2", "And... somewhere to seek shelter if we need to.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_4-Text-0", "There it is.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_4-Text-1", "Stay alive dammit. I\'ll be with you each step of the way!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_5-Text-0", "Prospector?! What are you doing?!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_5-Text-1", "You don\'t need to do this, there\'s still time, you need to get off-planet!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_5-Text-2", "Wait, are the rest of the team still down there too?")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_5-Text-3", "Save yourselves, get out of there! I won\'t ask again.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_6-Text-0", "I\'ve got it! I managed to track her comms, she\'s straight up ahead. If you hurry you can catch up to her!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_7-Text-0", "That\'s it, just a bit further.")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_8-Text-0", "Keep going, Prospector!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_9-Text-0", "You\'re almost there, god we\'re so close! We can stop her!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_10-Text-0", "F***, her helmet. We\'re too late. She tricked us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_10-Text-1", "Iris, I\'m sorry but we have to do it!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_10-Text-2", "NO. No-no-no-no. No! I won\'t do it- ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_10-Text-3", "It\'s this or we all die! We\'re too damn late Iris, we didn\'t make it. Look at the satellite! She\'s about to pull the trigger on us!")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-0", "*Distant rumbling*")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-1", "This is an emergency announcement - any remaining personnel on-planet have one minute to get to orbit. The terraforming process has been initiated.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-2", "No Victor, I won\'t do it, I can\'t!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-3", "We have no other choice! She\'s going to destroy the whole bloody planet with us still on it! There\'s no ****ing way.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-4", "Victor! Please, I can\'t! I just can\'t... ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-5", "You can\'t, but I can. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-6", "*Activates Orbital Laser")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-7", "I\'m sorry. I\'m so ****ing sorry. Don\'t look.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-8", "*Sobbing*")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-9", "Iris? Team? Oh god, no. No-no-no-no I told you to get off planet!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-10", "I can\'t stop it, it\'s already begun, I\'m sorry, Christ I\'m so sorry.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-11", "*Mo\'s Satellite Explodes!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-12", "MO! NO! No!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-13", "You bastard!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-14", "Iris, God I\'m sorry, there was no other option, you agreed to the plan earlier-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-15", "I thought we would find another way! But you, you- you KILLED her, Mo, oh Mo, she was- god she was better than all of us.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-16", "I can\'t do this, I need space, I need- don\'t you dare follow me Victor!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-17", "I, ah s***- I... Prospector, we... we should probably all head back to Eden.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-18", "An incident on this scale is bound to be noticed by the UDA. We need to be prepared for the fallout.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_11-Text-19", "I\'ll, ah. I\'ll meet you there... God, what have I done...")

Rows.Name: Ely_MissionSix_End
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-0", "Prospector, I- she\'s refusing to talk to me, I\'m sorry.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-1", "I- I managed to catch up with her on the way back to Eden. We had quite an... intense discussion.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-2", "I know I did the right thing, there would have been a far more people dead if I hadn\'t...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-3", "But, she may never forgive me. And she doesn\'t have to. We were able to agree on one thing, however.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-4", "Mo, while clearly driven to extremes by her anger, was a source of hope for many.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-5", "We agreed that in order to... preserve her memory... We\'re going to keep the finer details of today from the UDA, or anyone else that comes asking.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-6", "We wouldn\'t want it to reflect badly on her, her family will be devastated enough as it is. Not to mention Sol... We both agreed that it\'s better if he doesn\'t know.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-7", "I\'m deeply sorry that you were involved in this... tragedy. We all cared for Mo in our own ways...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-8", "But, she started the Eris Inquisition with a mission. The truth of Group 15 and the UDA\'s meddling is still out there.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-9", "We still have a job to do. For now, that\'s my focus. What you do now is up to you. Either way, take care.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-10", "And please, keep moving forward, no matter what this place throws at you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Ely_MissionSix_End-Text-11", "For Mo.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_1-Text-0", "Cheerio.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_2-Text-0", "Come back alive.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_3-Text-0", "Don\'t ask me questions you don\'t need answers to.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_4-Text-0", "I\'ll handle the intel. You focus on the mission.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_5-Text-0", "If I had anything useful, I\'d share it.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_6-Text-0", "If things go wrong I\'ll be ready.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_7-Text-0", "If you need anything, don\'t hesitate to ask.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_8-Text-0", "I know enough to stay out of trouble.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_9-Text-0", "I\'ll let you know if something\'s important. Until then, stay focused.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_10-Text-0", "If you\'re not watching your back, I\'ll be watching it for you.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_11-Text-0", "I\'ve got eyes everywhere-don\'t worry about it.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_12-Text-0", "I\'ve got your back, just stay sharp.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_13-Text-0", "Keeping this base safe is a full-time slog that\'s for sure...")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_14-Text-0", "Keep your eyes open.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_15-Text-0", "The less you know, the safer you are.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_16-Text-0", "No one\'s safe here, not really.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_17-Text-0", "Prospector. ")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_18-Text-0", "God there are so many of them, they\'re everywhere.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_19
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_19-Text-0", "Stay in one piece.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_20
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_20-Text-0", "Stay vigilant.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_21
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_21-Text-0", "Watch your back out there.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_22
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_22-Text-0", "We\'ll get through this, just stick to the plan.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Victor_23
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Victor_23-Text-0", "Where could they be coming from?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_1-Text-0", "Hey prospector, what\'s new?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_2-Text-0", "Workin hard or hardly workin?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_3-Text-0", "What is it this time?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_4-Text-0", "Goddamn TPS constantly on my ass.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_5-Text-0", "There aren\'t enough bullets on Icarus...")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_6-Text-0", "This place gets to you after a while, but we manage.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_7-Text-0", "You ever get the feeling we\'re just waiting for the next fight?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_8-Text-0", "Yeah, I\'ve been through worse, I\'m not taking anything for granted.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_9-Text-0", "Focus up, pay attention, you\'ll live longer.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_10-Text-0", "Yeah I\'ll take the next mission, but only if we get proper intel this time.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_11-Text-0", "Sure, I trust my gear. I trust my instincts more.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_12-Text-0", "Sometimes, you just can\'t plan for everything, you just gotta roll with it.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_13-Text-0", "A quiet day\'s a good day. Don\'t expect it to last.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_14-Text-0", "Chou keeps pushing us, but I\'m not really sure where we\'re headed.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_15-Text-0", "Keep your head on a swivel.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_16-Text-0", "You get used to the grind, but it\'s still a hard way to live.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_17-Text-0", "Do not let your guard down, even for a second.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_18-Text-0", "I\'ve been in worse situations, but that doesn\'t mean I\'m not ready for anything.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_19
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_19-Text-0", "We\'ve seen it all, haven\'t we? Just another gorgeous day full of rainbows and puppies on-planet.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_20
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_20-Text-0", "Can\'t afford to make mistakes in this line of work.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_21
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_21-Text-0", "Stay sharp.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_22
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_22-Text-0", "Good luck out there, kid.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Theo_23
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Theo_23-Text-0", "Keep your eyes peeled.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_1-Text-0", "Hi there Prospector.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_2-Text-0", "Good luck!")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_3
