Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_3-Text-0", "The minerals gathered here are so different to anything else I\'ve studied...")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_4-Text-0", "I wonder how the influence of exotics might affect these samples.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_5-Text-0", "Note to self: order a new Geiger counter. Second note: do not lend out Geiger counters...")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_6-Text-0", "The data\'s not adding up-something\'s wrong.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_7-Text-0", "I swear, these readings are getting more unstable every day.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_8-Text-0", "Do you think they\'ll actually listen to our findings this time?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_9-Text-0", "I\'ve been up for 36 hours straight... if I get one more sample request...")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_10-Text-0", "We\'re pushing the limits here-don\'t know how much longer this can hold.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_11-Text-0", "Have you seen the latest results? We\'re on the verge of something big... or dangerous.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_12-Text-0", "Another anomaly? This place is full of them.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_13-Text-0", "I\'ve got a theory, but I need more tests to confirm.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_14-Text-0", "I can\'t believe they\'re throwing all this away for a quick fix.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_15-Text-0", "Goodbye!")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_16-Text-0", "We\'re not even sure what half of this stuff does.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_17-Text-0", "Can we please get more secure equipment? This old stuff\'s falling apart.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_18-Text-0", "I need more time...")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_19
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_19-Text-0", "I keep telling them, if we don\'t understand it, we shouldn\'t touch it.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_20
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_20-Text-0", "Don\'t get too close to the containment area. Trust me.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_21
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_21-Text-0", "Be careful!")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Iris_22
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Iris_22-Text-0", "Do be safe out there, prospector!")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_1-Text-0", "Hi.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_2-Text-0", "If we don\'t find more soon, this\'ll all be for nothing.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_3-Text-0", "Why does it always fall on me to fix these things?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_4-Text-0", "Catch ya.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_5-Text-0", "I\'ve seen this before... doesn\'t end well.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_6-Text-0", "Let\'s get this done quickly-we don\'t have the luxury of time.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_7-Text-0", "I don\'t know why I keep pushing-just can\'t seem to stop.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_8-Text-0", "I should\'ve double-checked that intel.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_9-Text-0", "Good work.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_10-Text-0", "I know you\'ve got the skills, but I still worry about our team.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_11-Text-0", "Just keep your head down and your instincts sharp. We\'ll get through this.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_12-Text-0", "Hello.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_13-Text-0", "Hi there.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_14-Text-0", "Hey, how are things?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_15-Text-0", "How are you?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_16-Text-0", "How\'s it going?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_17-Text-0", "How\'s your day?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_18-Text-0", "If I\'m wrong about this, we\'re all in trouble.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_19
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_19-Text-0", "I\'ll figure this out-there\'s always a way.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_20
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_20-Text-0", "I swear, if we don\'t find answers soon, I\'m walking away.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_21
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_21-Text-0", "I should\'ve known it\'d be this complicated.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_22
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_22-Text-0", "Keep your eyes open-nothing\'s ever as simple as it seems.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_23
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_23-Text-0", "I\'ve made worse decisions, but I\'m still here.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_24
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_24-Text-0", "Just need to keep digging... there\'s something here.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_25
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_25-Text-0", "It\'s never just one thing, is it?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_26
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_26-Text-0", "I\'m not sure how much longer I can keep this up.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_27
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_27-Text-0", "We\'ve got one shot at this-let\'s not screw it up.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_28
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_28-Text-0", "See ya.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_29
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_29-Text-0", "Prospector, hope you\'re settling in well.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_30
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_30-Text-0", "You ever get the feeling someone\'s always watching?")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_31
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_31-Text-0", "I\'ve got a gut feeling something\'s off here, but I can\'t put my finger on it.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_32
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_32-Text-0", "Stay alert, Prospector. I\'ve seen too many things go wrong in places like this.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_33
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_33-Text-0", "Stick close and stay quiet, we don\'t need any extra attention.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_34
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_34-Text-0", "We stick together, we get this done-just stay on your toes.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_35
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_35-Text-0", "This doesn\'t add up...")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_36
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_36-Text-0", "I don\'t trust anyone else on this, but I trust our team, Prospector.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_37
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_37-Text-0", "Until next time.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_38
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_38-Text-0", "Watch your back out there.")

Rows.Name: DH_Bark_Mo_39
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Bark_Mo_39-Text-0", "I\'ve been in worse situations than this.")

Rows.Name: DH_Mo_M1_CrashlandedStatic
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_Mo_M1_CrashlandedStatic-Text-0", "*Static")

Rows.Name: DH_ELY_M2_CaveBlocker
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_M2_CaveBlocker-Text-0", "Well, my job here is done. Good luck kid.")

Rows.Name: DH_ELy_M3_KillCreatures
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELy_M3_KillCreatures-Text-0", "What the hell were those things? Were they-")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELy_M3_KillCreatures-Text-1", "Group 15 scientists.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELy_M3_KillCreatures-Text-2", "Well, I guess we know why they didn\'t bother evacuating \'em.")

Rows.Name: Dh_ELY_EXPLOSIVESPICKUP
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Dh_ELY_EXPLOSIVESPICKUP-Text-0", "Here you go! Try not to blow yourself up!")

Rows.Name: DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_1-Text-0", "Sol? Hey, it\'s Mo. Yeah, it\'s secure. How are things? I hope the media are behaving themselves...")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_1-Text-1", "Cmon, I bet you\'re loving the limelight. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_1-Text-2", "Yeah, I\'ve got most of the team assembled, the UDA insisted on throwing some meathead into the mix though.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_1-Text-3", "Ah crap, I\'ve got another call coming in, I have to take this.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_1-Text-4", "Don\'t worry about me, I\'ll be fine... ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_1-Text-5", "You too buddy. Alright, Bye.")

Rows.Name: DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_2-Text-0", "Hi Mum! Sorry I missed your call earlier. The reception out here is just awful.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_2-Text-1", "Thank you so much for sending through that care package, I promise I\'ve been using the vitamins and I\'ve been journaling too and it\'s been really great.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_2-Text-2", "Um, just to keep you updated we\'re underway with the full investigation soon, just waiting on the last teammate to show up before we hit the road.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_2-Text-3", "Anyway, please say hi to Dad and Suzie, sending you all my love, bye!")

Rows.Name: DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_3-Text-0", "I\'m telling ya, that Chou lady\'s a witch. Every time I sneak out to go play dice she\'s just there!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_3-Text-1", "Oh, we don\'t gamble in this unit Theo. Oh, that\'s not behaviour befitting of a soldier of your rank, Theo.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_3-Text-2", "She can kiss my ass. Bring the guys to my section next time you cowards, I\'d like to see how you like getting caught!")

Rows.Name: DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_4-Text-0", "Stop calling me on this number, it\'s over. I\'m out of that life, and you\'d do well to remember that.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_4-Text-1", "If Hasko knows what\'s good for him he\'ll disappear. It wasn\'t my fault. I didn\'t lie to him.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_4-Text-2", "There\'s only so much I could do after you blew my cover you asshole! ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_EDEN_AUDIOLOG_4-Text-3", "Leave me alone, I never want to speak with you again.")

Rows.Name: DH_ELY_MISSION_5_DOUBLESTACK
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_MISSION_5_DOUBLESTACK-Text-0", "You probably wanna double stack for this one! It\'s massive!")

Rows.Name: DH_ELY_MISSION_3_ELEVATOR
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_MISSION_3_ELEVATOR-Text-0", "Is that an elevator? Just how big is this place?")

Rows.Name: DH_ELY_MISSIONFOUR_KILLITMORE
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_ELY_MISSIONFOUR_KILLITMORE-Text-0", "Kill it more!")

Rows.Name: DH_BLACKMARKET_AGENT_01
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_BLACKMARKET_AGENT_01-Text-0", "Well, well well. Have we met? Maybe. Maybe not. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_BLACKMARKET_AGENT_01-Text-1", "Anyway, lets get ready to kill things!")

Rows.Name: DH_FISHERMAN_HURT
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_FISHERMAN_HURT-Text-0", "I need help, please!")

Rows.Name: DH_FISHERMAN_HEALED
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_FISHERMAN_HEALED-Text-0", "Ah, that\'s better - thanks. Reckon you can help me rebuild this place?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes1-Text-0", "Ah, the Arctic. At least that\'s what we call it here.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes1-Text-1", "I do sometimes wonder what was here before we ruined it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes2-Text-0", "The cold here can kill you before you realise it. Wrap up properly.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes3-Text-0", "The desert regions of this area are not forgiving.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes3-Text-1", "Keep a close watch on your vitals.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes4-Text-0", "Is that an oasis? No, just the light playing tricks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes4-Text-1", "The desert does enjoy that sort of cruelty.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes5-Text-0", "This stretch is known as the Riverlands.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes5-Text-1", "The UDA were not especially imaginative with names in the Terrazone.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes5-Text-2", "To be fair, they were rather busy.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes6-Text-0", "Time to add a few more layers. Wrap up warm.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes7-Text-0", "It is bitterly cold out there. Do not ignore it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes8-Text-0", "You will start losing fingers if you don\'t warm up soon.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes9-Text-0", "You look half frozen.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes10-Text-0", "Find somewhere and get some heat into you.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes11-Text-0", "Monitor your vitals carefully.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes12-Text-0", "This region is infamous for brutal weather. Stay aware.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Biomes13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Biomes13-Text-0", "Prospector, you appear to be overheating.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings1-Text-0", "The ACS have developed a prototype device that requires practical testing. You are their chosen volunteer.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings2-Text-0", "The African Assembly have a prototype they would like evaluated under real conditions. You will be handling that evaluation.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings3-Text-0", "When it comes to exotics, the Assembly tend to focus rather intensely. It is not a subtle interest.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings4-Text-0", "The Lagos Group require assistance with what they are calling bio research.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings4-Text-1", "Details are sparse. That alone should tell you something.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings5-Text-0", "No one else has volunteered for this assignment. That should tell you everything you need to know.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings6-Text-0", "They need you on the surface to activate a newly developed device. The specifications are, predictably, incomplete.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings7-Text-0", "There is another prototype requiring validation. They would prefer you conduct the validation.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings8-Text-0", "We\'ve got some unconfirmed reports coming in from the surface, and they want you to check them out.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings9-Text-0", "We\'re receiving unverified reports from the surface and would like someone reliable to investigate them.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings10-Text-0", "They require someone willing to operate where others have declined. You meet that requirement.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Briefings11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Briefings11-Text-0", "They seem to believe you\'re motivated by adequate compensation. I trust that assessment is correct.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures1-Text-0", "Those markings don\'t match the official records. Makes you wonder what the UDA have been tinkering with now.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures2-Text-0", "Wolves. Watch out.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures3-Text-0", "Careful of the pack.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures4-Text-0", "Bears. Every prospector\'s recurring nightmare on Icarus.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures5-Text-0", "Deer and other prey will spook at the slightest noise. Best move carefully around them.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures6-Text-0", "They don\'t usually linger here. Perhaps you made an impression.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures7-Text-0", "What on earth is that doing here?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures8-Text-0", "That is... rather large.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures9-Text-0", "Did you notice the size of it?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures10-Text-0", "That one looks thoroughly displeased.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures11-Text-0", "That creature appears quite serious about its intentions.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures12-Text-0", "Stay alert. There may be more nearby.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures13-Text-0", "In my experience, there\'s rarely only one.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures14-Text-0", "They favour packs. Keep an eye out.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures15-Text-0", "There\'s almost never just one of them. Stay sharp.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures16-Text-0", "You\'re holding up well. Keep at it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures17-Text-0", "Headshots would be advisable.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures18-Text-0", "This may be the moment to retreat.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures19
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures19-Text-0", "Well. That was spirited.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures20
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures20-Text-0", "For a moment there, I thought we\'d lost you.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures21
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures21-Text-0", "I have witnessed a fair number of skirmishes. That was impressive.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures22
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures22-Text-0", "Pull back and find somewhere to recover.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures23
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures23-Text-0", "That was close enough. Keep moving.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures24
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures24-Text-0", "It seems to be guarding something.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures25
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures25-Text-0", "Curious. What exactly is it protecting?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures26
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures26-Text-0", "Its den may be just behind it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures27
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures27-Text-0", "If we can reach it, we could eliminate the entire pack.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures28
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures28-Text-0", "Careful. There may be others inside.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Creatures29
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Creatures29-Text-0", "Stay alert. More could follow.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions1-Text-0", "Cutting through that valley is probably your best option.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions2-Text-0", "Your next stop is marked on your map.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions3-Text-0", "Check your map for the next location.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions4-Text-0", "Let\'s move to the next site.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions5-Text-0", "Take a look at your map for the next location.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions6-Text-0", "It\'s to the north.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions7-Text-0", "Looks like you\'re heading north.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions8-Text-0", "Looks like you\'re heading west.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions9-Text-0", "It\'s to the west.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions10-Text-0", "Let\'s head east.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions11-Text-0", "Looks like we\'re heading east.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions12-Text-0", "It\'s to the south.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions13-Text-0", "Looks like we\'re heading south.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Directions14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Directions14-Text-0", "That storm is drifting straight over you.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones1-Text-0", "Drones are in the area. They tend to notice movement before you notice them.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones2-Text-0", "Keep low. Those drones don\'t miss much.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones3-Text-0", "If you hear a faint hum overhead, assume it is not friendly.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones4-Text-0", "Drone patrols are rarely solo. There will be more nearby.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones5-Text-0", "Those drones are fitted for more than observation. Do not test them.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones6-Text-0", "TPS soldiers ahead. They\'re organised and they won\'t hesitate.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones7-Text-0", "If you spot TPS, expect resistance.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones8-Text-0", "They are disciplined. Don\'t assume they will break easily.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones9-Text-0", "If they have set up here, they intend to hold it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones10-Text-0", "This is not wildlife. This is TPS, and they are armed.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones11-Text-0", "Drones and TPS together? That is going to be unpleasant.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Drones12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Drones12-Text-0", "Eyes up. Drones above, soldiers on the ground. Efficient, if nothing else.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure1-Text-0", "Keep an eye on that timer.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure2-Text-0", "That dropship will leave, with or without you.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure3-Text-0", "You really do not want to miss that ship.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure4-Text-0", "Prospector, you may want to start heading back.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure5-Text-0", "You are cutting this rather close.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure6-Text-0", "You are aware there is a time limit on this drop, yes?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure7-Text-0", "You are planning to make it back into orbit, I hope.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure8-Text-0", "It will be a minor miracle if you make it in time.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure9-Text-0", "You need to run. Now.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure10-Text-0", "Run. Get out of there!")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure11-Text-0", "Get back to the ship. Now.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure12-Text-0", "I had hoped I would not be losing you.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure13-Text-0", "Not another one. If only you had just-")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure14-Text-0", "No. That \'s it. You\'re on your own now, prospector.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure15-Text-0", "Good luck. It has been a pleasure.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure16-Text-0", "Without that, the mission is over. We\'re heading back up.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure17-Text-0", "A solid attempt, but this is where it ends.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Failure18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Failure18-Text-0", "Well. That went poorly. We will have to start again.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler1-Text-0", "What do you make of that?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler2-Text-0", "Someone passed through here not long ago.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler3-Text-0", "For a facility closed several years, it is in surprisingly decent condition.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler4-Text-0", "I cannot shake the sense this closure applied only to those outside the UDA.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler5-Text-0", "I was under the impression this site was abandoned.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler6-Text-0", "Curious. It appears other prospectors have been here.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler7-Text-0", "There is likely more to this place than we have been told.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler8-Text-0", "Between us, these briefings have been rather selective with the truth.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler9-Text-0", "It appears this prospector was not especially fortunate.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler10-Text-0", "They were likely left behind when the zone was sealed.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler11-Text-0", "They have been here quite some time.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler12-Text-0", "Caught out in a storm, perhaps.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler13-Text-0", "Perhaps they lost track of their dropship.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler14-Text-0", "They may have been out here alone.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler15-Text-0", "No one quite warns you about the sheer amount of walking in this profession.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler16-Text-0", "Keep your head about you.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler17-Text-0", "Watch carefully.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler18-Text-0", "Stay sharp.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Filler19
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Filler19-Text-0", "Don\'t get too comfortable.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions1-Text-0", "You have done this before, right?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions2-Text-0", "You have used one of these before, right?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions3-Text-0", "Set it up. The sooner the better.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions4-Text-0", "You need to deploy it now.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions5-Text-0", "Are you planning to deploy it, or are we waiting for a written invitation?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions6-Text-0", "Prospector, the equipment needs repairing.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions7-Text-0", "It is damaged. See to it, quickly.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions8-Text-0", "Your device has taken a hit. I suggest you address it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions9-Text-0", "Your device has taken a hit. I suggest you address it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions11-Text-0", "Defend the device. It won\'t work if they tear it apart.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions12-Text-0", "Do not let them damage it further, unless you\'re keen on extensive repairs.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions13-Text-0", "You may want to return to the device.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions14-Text-0", "Careful. Your equipment appears to be malfunctioning.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions15-Text-0", "Right. That is unfortunate. They\'ve destroyed it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions16-Text-0", "You\'ll need a replacement.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions17-Text-0", "They were clearly not fond of it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions18-Text-0", "You may not hear it, but that signal will draw attention.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions19
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions19-Text-0", "That frequency is likely to agitate the local wildlife.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Interactions20
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Interactions20-Text-0", "These devices do tend to attract unwanted interest. Stay alert.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS1-Text-0", "TPS. The People\'s Syndicate. They do enjoy a dramatic title.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS2-Text-0", "They claim to be for the people. The question is which people.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS3-Text-0", "If TPS are involved, expect bullets.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS4-Text-0", "They prefer ideals to protocol. Admirable, in theory.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS5-Text-0", "TPS never miss an opportunity to make a point.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS6-Text-0", "If you see their mark, tread carefully. They rarely do anything halfway.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS7-Text-0", "They are very fond of words like liberation and reclamation.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS8-Text-0", "TPS believe Icarus belongs to everyone. That tends to unsettle the shareholders.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS9-Text-0", "They mean well. That\'s often the beginning of trouble.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS10-Text-0", "You will know it is TPS work. They like to leave a mark.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS11-Text-0", "They distrust the UDA almost as much as the UDA distrusts them.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS12-Text-0", "If TPS are nearby, things are about to become bloody.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS13-Text-0", "They\'re not wrong about everything. Just loud about it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS14-Text-0", "TPS do not back down easily. Nor do they forget.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS15-Text-0", "If they are offering help, read the fine print.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS16-Text-0", "These were once good people, if you must fight back then do it cleanly, please.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_TPS17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_TPS17-Text-0", "It seems someone left something behind over there.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather1-Text-0", "That storm is drifting straight over you.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather2-Text-0", "That storm is coming this way. Best stay alert.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather3-Text-0", "Careful. These systems have a habit of throwing lightning about.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather3-Text-1", "Saw a prospector cooked inside their suit once... You don\'t really forget that sort of thing.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather4-Text-0", "It appears this storm is worsening.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather5-Text-0", "Forecast says it will intensify further.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather6-Text-0", "I would leave, if I were you.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather7-Text-0", "Give that storm a wide berth.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather8-Text-0", "You do not want to be standing in it.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather9-Text-0", "Back to safety. Now.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather10-Text-0", "These storms can turn vicious without warning.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather11-Text-0", "Shelter. It is a rather useful concept.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather12-Text-0", "Now is hardly the moment for sightseeing.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather13-Text-0", "Find shelter. Immediately.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather14-Text-0", "I would prefer not to see you reduced to ash.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather15-Text-0", "I have no desire to lose another colleague out here.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather16-Text-0", "This storm was not on any radar.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather17
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather17-Text-0", "This was not in the forecast.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather18
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather18-Text-0", "Drop everything and move.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather19
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather19-Text-0", "This system is completely unstable.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Weather20
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Weather20-Text-0", "Being struck by lightning is a nasty way to die.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings1-Text-0", "Before you ask, yes, it is bio research. I am aware that sounds deliberately vague.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings1-Text-1", "It usually means the work sits somewhere near the edge of acceptable practice.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings1-Text-2", "Let\'s deal with it efficiently.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings2-Text-0", "They need it tested before they can roll it out properly. You may as well gather your kit and get moving.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings3-Text-0", "The device should be in your supply crate nearby.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings4-Text-0", "You will find the device secured in your dropship.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings5-Text-0", "Everything you require is in that crate.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings6-Text-0", "Everything you require is stowed in your ship.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings7-Text-0", "Do not forget your supplies.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings8-Text-0", "Right. Time to begin. Stay alert down there.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings9-Text-0", "Right, time to begin.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings10-Text-0", "All right. Let\'s get started.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings11-Text-0", "Check your map and orient yourself properly.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings12-Text-0", "Let\'s track the wildlife.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings13-Text-0", "Let\'s do a bit of hunting.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings14-Text-0", "Let\'s start the search.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Landings15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Landings15-Text-0", "You have handled quite a few drops now. At this rate, you won\'t need me on comms at all.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction1-Text-0", "What on earth is that?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction2-Text-0", "What on earth is that?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction3-Text-0", "What exactly did you do?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction4-Text-0", "Are you seeing this too?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction5-Text-0", "I can\'t say I\'ve ever seen one of those before.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction6-Text-0", "What on Icarus are you doing?!")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction7-Text-0", "What on earth is that?!")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction8-Text-0", "Did you honestly think that was... wise?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction9-Text-0", "I, ah, thought you knew what you were doing?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction10-Text-0", "Not to be rude, but that does not strike me as your finest decision.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction11-Text-0", "On second thought- never mind.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction12-Text-0", "What exactly have they been tampering with down here?")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction13
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction13-Text-0", "I would step back, if I were you.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction14
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction14-Text-0", "I am not entirely convinced that is functioning as intended.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction15
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction15-Text-0", "Might be wise to keep your head down for a moment.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Reaction16
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Reaction16-Text-0", "In all my years, I have never seen anything quite like that.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Quips1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Quips1-Text-0", "That is Icarus for you. One step forward, one dropship ride back.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Quips2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Quips2-Text-0", "Do you know the one about the bear and the prospector? It rarely ends well for the prospector.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Quips3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Quips3-Text-0", "You do manage to make my job feel rather dramatic.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Quips4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Quips4-Text-0", "We need to clean this place up. Let\'s get started.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Quips5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Quips5-Text-0", "We might actually make it off this rock alive. Let\'s not sabotage that.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Quips6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Quips6-Text-0", "Here is to another successful drop. Let us keep it that way.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Quips7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Quips7-Text-0", "All perfectly routine. Nicely done.")

Rows.Name: Victor_Generic_Quips8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "Victor_Generic_Quips8-Text-0", "Icarus does have a talent for spoiling one\'s day. How surprising.")

Rows.Name: DH_AGENT_BM_MISSIONSTART
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_AGENT_BM_MISSIONSTART-Text-0", "Hello Meatbag!")

Rows.Name: DH_AGENT_BM_BOSSKILL
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_AGENT_BM_BOSSKILL-Text-0", "Stunning work!")

Rows.Name: FOBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FOBriefing-Text-0", "We have a fisheries officer that I\'m unable to get in contact with. He may require medical attention. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FOBriefing-Text-1", "Can you head out and see to him? I suspect he will also need assistance establishing his outpost.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FOBriefing-Text-2", "I appreciate your help on this, Prospector.")

Rows.Name: PCBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PCBriefing-Text-0", "A predator control specialist is setting up operations in the region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PCBriefing-Text-1", "They will need assistance establishing a secure outpost before they can begin thinning the local population.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PCBriefing-Text-2", "Get them settled and ensure the wildlife does not settle you first.")

Rows.Name: BMBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BMBriefing-Text-0", "A NOREX contractor has chosen a rather inconvenient patch of wilderness to conduct business.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BMBriefing-Text-1", "They require a degree of protection while they establish themselves.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BMBriefing-Text-2", "Strike a bargain, and try not to ask too many questions.")

Rows.Name: CSBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CSBriefing-Text-0", "A cultivation specialist is attempting to make something grow in soil that resents the effort.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CSBriefing-Text-1", "Help them establish their site and secure the resources they need to begin planting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CSBriefing-Text-2", "If this works, it may be the closest thing to progress we have seen here.")

Rows.Name: FishingBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FishingBriefing-Text-0", "There is to be some sort of fishing contest. I\'m told morale improves when people compete over aquatic life.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FishingBriefing-Text-1", "Assist with preparations, ensure the rules are followed, and try to keep it civil.")

Rows.Name: GribblerBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GribblerBriefing-Text-0", "We have been asked to domesticate a gribbler... Yes, intentionally.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GribblerBriefing-Text-1", "Subdue it, secure it, and attempt to make it cooperative rather than murderous.")

Rows.Name: IglooBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IglooBriefing-Text-0", "We are to construct a functional ice shelter in the Arctic region.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IglooBriefing-Text-1", "It must be structurally sound and properly furnished for extended habitation.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IglooBriefing-Text-2", "Build it well, as the cold will not tolerate mistakes.")

Rows.Name: AmbushBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AmbushBriefing-Text-0", "A team of prospectors has been driven out of their base and scattered.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AmbushBriefing-Text-1", "Your task is to help them reclaim the site, restore the structure, and restock essential supplies.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AmbushBriefing-Text-2", "Put it back together and remind TPS they do not get to keep what they take from the UDA.")

Rows.Name: LifelineBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LifelineBriefing-Text-0", "We have a team down in the field, scattered and in poor condition. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LifelineBriefing-Text-1", "Your task is to locate the survivors, stabilise them, and get them back to the forward base. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LifelineBriefing-Text-2", "If you can salvage anything from the wrecked speeders nearby, so much the better.")

Rows.Name: CourierBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CourierBriefing-Text-0", "We have a shipment stranded and a transport drone in need of repair. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CourierBriefing-Text-1", "Restore its power, fuel it properly, and see the delivery through hostile territory. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CourierBriefing-Text-2", "Expect resistance along the route.")

Rows.Name: TrialsBriefing
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TrialsBriefing-Text-0", "We have an opportunity to field test a prototype vehicle under live conditions.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TrialsBriefing-Text-1", "The team requires support establishing facilities and gathering performance data.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TrialsBriefing-Text-2", "Assist them, and try to keep the prototype in one piece.")

Rows.Name: FOIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FOIntro-Text-0", "Head to the marked position. If they are injured, treat them. If they are merely disorganised, try not to encourage it.")

Rows.Name: PCIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PCIntro-Text-0", "We have a situation developing. One of our officers has gone quiet. I would like you to go and determine why.")

Rows.Name: CSIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CSIntro-Text-0", "We have lost contact with a forward officer. No response to hails. Head to their last known position and assess.")

Rows.Name: BMIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BMIntro-Text-0", "You will find their coordinates in your system. Proceed there, confirm their condition, and render aid as needed.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro1-Text-0", "We have a UDA operative in need of assistance. Head to the marked location and see what they require.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro2-Text-0", "There is UDA personnel requesting support. Make your way over and lend a hand.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro3
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro3-Text-0", "A UDA team member has run into complications. You are closest. Go and resolve it.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro4
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro4-Text-0", "We have received a priority ping from UDA staff in the field. Investigate and assist as necessary.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro5
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro5-Text-0", "UDA personnel have encountered difficulties establishing their position. Go and help them stabilise it.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro6
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro6-Text-0", "There is a UDA operative awaiting support. Find them and determine what is required.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro7
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro7-Text-0", "A field contact from the UDA has asked for aid. Head out and see to it.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro8
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro8-Text-0", "We have a UDA presence in the area that needs reinforcement. That would be you.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro9
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro9-Text-0", "A UDA outpost is struggling to get operational. Go and ensure they succeed.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro10
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro10-Text-0", "There is a UDA specialist requesting logistical support. Make contact and provide it.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro11
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro11-Text-0", "One of ours needs help in the field. Travel to their coordinates and sort it out.")

Rows.Name: GenIntro12
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GenIntro12-Text-0", "UDA personnel are expecting assistance. Let us not keep them waiting.")

Rows.Name: FishingCompIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FishingCompIntro-Text-0", "Head to the marked location and get things organised. Let us see who can actually catch something out there.")

Rows.Name: TameGribblerIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TameGribblerIntro-Text-0", "Locate the gribbler and approach with caution. Try to keep your face attached in the process.")

Rows.Name: IglooIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IglooIntro-Text-0", "Begin gathering materials and head to the site. Precision matters here. Snow is less forgiving than it appears")

Rows.Name: AmbushIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AmbushIntro-Text-0", "Our forward scouts in the Arctic have gone quiet after reporting hostile TPS contact. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AmbushIntro-Text-1", "You need to locate them, secure the area, and retake the forward base.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AmbushIntro-Text-2", "Once it\'s clear, carry out repairs and deliver the necessary supplies to bring it back online for us.")

Rows.Name: LifelineIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LifelineIntro-Text-0", "Move to the search area and find the remaining team members.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LifelineIntro-Text-1", "Stabilise them with a stasis bag, then transport them back to base. ")

Rows.Name: CourierIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CourierIntro-Text-0", "Report to the forward base and speak with our contact.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CourierIntro-Text-1", "Repair the drone, supply the required fuel, then escort it across the Arctic and keep it intact.")

Rows.Name: TrialsIntro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TrialsIntro-Text-0", "Speak with our contact at the forward base to begin.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TrialsIntro-Text-1", "You\'ll need to craft the trail beacons, and mark the designated points.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TrialsIntro-Text-2", "Then take the speeder through the full run and see how it performs. Enjoy.")

Rows.Name: FOEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FOEnding-Text-0", "Alright. Good work prospector. You\'ve done well today.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FOEnding-Text-1", "We\'ve made some room at EDEN if you\'d like to invite your new friend back.")

Rows.Name: PCEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PCEnding-Text-0", "That should keep the local predators at bay. Solid work.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "PCEnding-Text-1", "Make sure to invite your new friend back to EDEN, if you wish to.")

Rows.Name: BMEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BMEnding-Text-0", "Good work, AGENT is fully operational. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "BMEnding-Text-1", "We\'ve made some room at EDEN if you\'d like to discretly invite them back.")

Rows.Name: CSEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CSEnding-Text-0", "Great work, prospector. ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CSEnding-Text-1", "Make sure to invite your new friend back to EDEN, if you wish to.")

Rows.Name: AmbushEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "AmbushEnding-Text-0", "The base is secure and stocked. Good work.")

Rows.Name: LifelineEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "LifelineEnding-Text-0", "The team is safe and secure. Efficient work.")

Rows.Name: CourierEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "CourierEnding-Text-0", "Delivery received, drone operational. A tidy result under pressure.")

Rows.Name: TrialsEnding
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TrialsEnding-Text-0", "Trail marked and trial completed. The data looks promising.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "TrialsEnding-Text-1", "Return to our contact for your reward. I believe you have earned a blueprint.")

Rows.Name: EdenInvite1
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "EdenInvite1-Text-0", "Make sure to invite them back to EDEN, if you wish to.")

Rows.Name: EdenInvite2
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "EdenInvite2-Text-0", "We\'ve made some room at EDEN if you\'d like to invite them back.")

Rows.Name: FishingOutro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FishingOutro-Text-0", "Contest concluded. No major incidents, which is impressive.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "FishingOutro-Text-1", "I suppose bragging rights are a kind of currency. Good work.")

Rows.Name: GribblerOutro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GribblerOutro-Text-0", "Remarkably, it seems to have taken to you.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "GribblerOutro-Text-1", "Let us hope that loyalty holds.")

Rows.Name: IglooOutro
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IglooOutro-Text-0", "Shelter complete, and surprisingly comfortable.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "IglooOutro-Text-1", "Proof that even here, civilisation can be improvised. Good work.")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_CHURCH_INJURED
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_CHURCH_INJURED-Text-0", "I\'m in a bad way! Can you help me out?")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_CHURCH_HEALED
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_CHURCH_HEALED-Text-0", "Ah thanks, my base has been overrun by the TPS! Can you help me get it back?")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_CHURCH_THANKS
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_CHURCH_THANKS-Text-0", "Thanks mate!")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_CHURCH_NEEDHELP
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_CHURCH_NEEDHELP-Text-0", "Hey there, I need some help!")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_CHURCH_RETURN_NEEDHELP
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_CHURCH_RETURN_NEEDHELP-Text-0", "We\'re gonna need your help with a few more things!")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_GRIFF_INJURED
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_GRIFF_INJURED-Text-0", "Please! I need help!")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_GRIFF_HEALED
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_GRIFF_HEALED-Text-0", "Ah thanks! I\'ll meet you back at base!")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_SIMMONS_NEEDOIL
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_SIMMONS_NEEDOIL-Text-0", "Hey! You came! Can you help me refuel this thing? ")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_SIMMONS_NEEDOIL-Text-1", "There should be an oil can somewhere deeper in the cave!")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_SIMMONS_NEEDOIL-Text-2", "Once it\'s sorted - I can make my own way back!")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_SIMMONS_THANKS
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_SIMMONS_THANKS-Text-0", "Ah that\'s it! Thanks a lot! See you there")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_SIMMONS_HELLO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_SIMMONS_HELLO-Text-0", "Hi prospector!")

Rows.Name: DH_SQ_GRIFF_HELLO
Text: NSLOCTEXT("D_Dialogue", "DH_SQ_GRIFF_HELLO-Text-0", "Hey Prospector!")
